name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: Update: The YES Campaign is leading but there are warning signs we could fall behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
We need your help to fight back against a surge of Republican support.
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260403-446&t=1&akid=446%2E12592%2ECDzI3b)
This just in from _The Washington Post_ on a new poll:
**A slim majority of Virginia voters favor the redistricting amendment, 52-47.**
That’s the good news. _The bad news?_**This could still go either way before April 21** , and Republican and opposition voters are showing up to the polls more enthusiastically than Democratic voters are.
[**Rush a donation of $3 today to help maintain the YES campaign’s slim majority until the polls officially close after Election Day on April 21.**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260403_2.6gwaqI&amount=3&refcode=20260403-446&t=2&akid=446%2E12592%2ECDzI3b)
It’s down to the wire, and if we don’t give it our all right now, we risk Republicans swarming the polls as they turn out in larger numbers.
It’s no exaggeration to say this all comes down to voter turnout. We need to leave it all on the table and reach as many voters as we can across the Commonwealth. That takes a lot of resources, and unlike our opponents, we rely on grassroots supporters to help power our campaign.
[**Can you donate $3 or anything you can right now to protect and expand the majority for the YES campaign by supporting our on-the-ground voter mobilization efforts?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260403_2.6gwaqI&amount=3&refcode=20260403-446&t=3&akid=446%2E12592%2ECDzI3b)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260403_2.6gwaqI&amount=3&refcode=20260403-446&t=22&akid=446%2E12592%2ECDzI3b)**
Onwards,
Virginians For Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=23&refcode2=446_12592_CDzI3b&akid=446%2E12592%2ECDzI3b)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=446%2E12592%2ECDzI3b)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/update-contact-information/?&t=25&akid=446%2E12592%2ECDzI3b)
* [Unsubscribe](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=446%2E12592%2ECDzI3b)

clean_body: We need your help to fight back against a surge of Republican support. This just in from The Washington Post on a new poll: A slim majority of Virginia voters favor the redistricting amendment, 52-47. That’s the good news. The bad news?This could still go either way before April 21 , and Republican and opposition voters are showing up to the polls more enthusiastically than Democratic voters are. It’s down to the wire, and if we don’t give it our all right now, we risk Republicans swarming the polls as they turn out in larger numbers. It’s no exaggeration to say this all comes down to voter turnout. We need to leave it all on the table and reach as many voters as we can across the Commonwealth. That takes a lot of resources, and unlike our opponents, we rely on grassroots supporters to help power our campaign. Onwards, Virginians For Fair Elections

name: SDC HQ
subject: The Supreme Court is poised to deliver a DEVASTATING BLOW to the MAGA agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
#
Peter: This week, something remarkable happened inside the Supreme Court.
Justice after justice – including ones appointed by Donald Trump himself – pushed back HARD against the radical effort to strip away birthright citizenship from babies born on American soil.
**In an unprecedented move, Trump showed up to the courtroom, sat there for 90 minutes, and then left before it was over.** _He didn't like what he was hearing._
**[FIGHT MAGA EXTREMISM: CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102522?refcode=em20260403-10268&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10268%2E614464%2EykeLDa)**
**Trump signed that executive order on his first day in office – an order that would have ripped citizenship away from hundreds of thousands of babies born in the United States every year.** _Every court that has looked at it has struck it down. And now the highest court in the land appears ready to do the same._
**But here's what we can't lose sight of: This fight isn't over.**
A final ruling isn't expected until June. And MAGA extremists will not stop with birthright citizenship. They are coming for voting rights. They are coming for reproductive freedom. They are coming for the democratic institutions that protect all of us.
The only thing standing between them and total power is a strong, organized, well-funded grassroots opposition. That's what we’re trying to build – but it will only be possible with help from grassroots supporters like you, Peter.
**Together, we can build a grassroots firewall that can stop this agenda at every level of government – where so many of these fights are ultimately won or lost.[Will you chip in $10 or whatever makes the most sense for you right now to help us do it?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102522?refcode=em20260403-10268&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10268%2E614464%2EykeLDa)**
**[FIGHT MAGA EXTREMISM: CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102522?refcode=em20260403-10268&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=10268%2E614464%2EykeLDa)**
The events this week signaled that the Supreme Court is poised to deliver a DEVASTATING blow to the MAGA agenda. But wins like these don't happen by accident. They happen because people like you show up, speak out, and invest in the work.
**We need you to show up today.**
For birthright citizenship. For the Constitution. For every working family in this country.
Thank you in advance.
– SDC HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdc-email-footer?refcode=em20260403-10268-footer&t=4&refcode2=10268_614464_ykeLDa&akid=10268%2E614464%2EykeLDa)**

name: Manny Rutinel (via Emily Randall)
subject: I sold my blood. I worked at McDonald’s. I tutored. It wasn’t enough.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
Emily endorsed Manny Rutinel to flip Colorado's 8th District from red to blue. See his message below ⬇️

| _Emily endorsed Manny Rutinel to flip Colorado's 8th District from red to blue. See his message below ⬇️_
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128736654/612196946/1076209229?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2026.04.03_MannyRutinel_90do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQzODE5OC1iYjJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3oSUvksOxAaZ4nF96gHdw_Wuwvzme3DK8mNOKai_-8=) Peter, in high school, I worked nearly every day after school. Monday through Friday, I took Advanced Placement (AP) classes, and twice a week, I attended a local community college. I did this to get as many credits as possible to make my college tuition more affordable. Tuesdays and Thursdays, I’d go to a plasma center to sell my plasma after school — I donated over a hundred times, and still have the scar to prove it. From there, I’d head to my shift as a tutor. I needed to wear a long-sleeved shirt to hide the band-aid on my arm, and it wasn’t rare for me to pass out while tutoring the kids (from the plasma, not the tutoring). And then every weekend, I’d clock in at McDonald’s for at least fourteen hours. **I did the math — _that’s 66 hours of work every single week._** I did this to help my single mother pay the bills, and sometimes it still wasn’t enough. I’m sharing this with you because so many kids and families are still facing the same problems and barriers that we did. _Housing is too expensive. Higher education is out of reach. The minimum wage hasn’t budged in years. Even overtime isn’t enough anymore. _ It’s unacceptable that in the richest country in the world, people are working multiple jobs and struggling to put food on the table. I’ve experienced these struggles firsthand, and now, I want to ensure no kid ever has to live through them. clean_body: Emily endorsed Manny Rutinel to flip Colorado's 8th District from red to blue. See his message below ⬇️ | Emily endorsed Manny Rutinel to flip Colorado's 8th District from red to blue. See his message below ⬇️ = Peter, in high school, I worked nearly every day after school. Monday through Friday, I took Advanced Placement (AP) classes, and twice a week, I attended a local community college. I did this to get as many credits as possible to make my college tuition more affordable. Tuesdays and Thursdays, I’d go to a plasma center to sell my plasma after school — I donated over a hundred times, and still have the scar to prove it. From there, I’d head to my shift as a tutor. I needed to wear a long-sleeved shirt to hide the band-aid on my arm, and it wasn’t rare for me to pass out while tutoring the kids (from the plasma, not the tutoring). And then every weekend, I’d clock in at McDonald’s for at least fourteen hours. I did the math — that’s 66 hours of work every single week. I did this to help my single mother pay the bills, and sometimes it still wasn’t enough. I’m sharing this with you because so many kids and families are still facing the same problems and barriers that we did. Housing is too expensive. Higher education is out of reach. The minimum wage hasn’t budged in years. Even overtime isn’t enough anymore. It’s unacceptable that in the richest country in the world, people are working multiple jobs and struggling to put food on the table. I’ve experienced these struggles firsthand, and now, I want to ensure no kid ever has to live through them. This experience made me the leader I am today, Peter, and it’s why I’m running for Congress in Colorado — to work tirelessly to ensure everyone truly has a fair chance at success. = = I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so no amount you can afford is too small to make a difference. Thank you, from the bottom of my heart. — Manny Rutinel Democrat for Colorado's 8th Congressional District | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. subject: New poll out of Virginia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em03132026]
Peter ,
There’s a new poll out of Virginia today that needs your attention:
In Virginia, support for redistricting in the upcoming election is just 52% to 47% – and Republicans are showing more urgency than Democrats.
That should worry every Democrat, because this poll shows that despite enormous wins last November in Virginia, this election is still very close.
And it’s about to get even tighter now that billionaire Peter Thiel’s network is pouring money into the commonwealth in an effort to stop Democrats from winning and picking up FOUR House seats this fall. The Thiel-linked group just gave $2.5 million to the PAC behind ugly anti-redistricting mailers that Virginia leaders say were designed to mislead Black voters with racially charged messaging.
We’ve seen this before, Peter, and we’ve defeated it.
Last year, we helped stop Elon Musk from buying a Wisconsin Supreme Court seat, despite Musk and allied groups spending more than $21 million!
Now, another MAGA billionaire thinks he can go after Virginia.
GOTV PAC is working to make sure Democratic voters know what’s at stake and get to the polls before April 21. But if Republicans stay more motivated, and billionaires like Thiel keep flooding this election with cash, we could lose a huge chance to fight back against GOP gerrymandering.
Can you chip in now to help us reach more voters while there’s still time? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em04032026]

Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Trump just delivered a series of lies, misleading claims, and rambling, unclear answers about the war in Iran.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Donald Trump went on national television to try and convince the American people that his war of choice in Iran has been a success.
# [](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1269?t=1&akid=3061%2E21716%2EnojNES)
On Wednesday, Donald Trump went on national television to try to convince the American people that his war of choice in Iran has been a success. And he did it while delivering a deranged series of lies and misleading claims.
He lied about the war, made misleading claims about why our neighbors are facing rising gas prices, and gave rambling, unclear answers about how long our servicemembers will remain in harm’s way.
**He also said the quiet part out loud: that we can’t make childcare cheaper because we have to pay for his reckless wars instead.**
Instead of offering reassurance or a clear objective for the war, he delivered wildly contradictory statements and made it abundantly clear that he has no idea what he’s doing.
**We need to pull the emergency brake on this president.** That’s why I’m going to keep pushing back and holding him accountable in Congress. One of the best ways we can do that is by flipping the House this November, and I’m going to need your help to do it.
[**If you want to help me keep Delaware’s seat blue and support more Democrats in red-to-blue races across the country, will you pitch in $5 to power my campaign today?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260403-1.P-uj2d&refcode=em20260403-3061&amount=5&t=2&akid=3061%2E21716%2EnojNES)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260403-1.P-uj2d&amount=5&refcode=em20260403-3061&t=21&akid=3061%2E21716%2EnojNES)**
Together, we can win back the House—and with it, the power to hold Trump and his entire administration accountable for this disaster of a war.
Thank you,
Sarah McBride
* * *

clean_body: Donald Trump went on national television to try and convince the American people that his war of choice in Iran has been a success. On Wednesday, Donald Trump went on national television to try to convince the American people that his war of choice in Iran has been a success. And he did it while delivering a deranged series of lies and misleading claims. He lied about the war, made misleading claims about why our neighbors are facing rising gas prices, and gave rambling, unclear answers about how long our servicemembers will remain in harm’s way. He also said the quiet part out loud: that we can’t make childcare cheaper because we have to pay for his reckless wars instead. Instead of offering reassurance or a clear objective for the war, he delivered wildly contradictory statements and made it abundantly clear that he has no idea what he’s doing. We need to pull the emergency brake on this president. That’s why I’m going to keep pushing back and holding him accountable in Congress. One of the best ways we can do that is by flipping the House this November, and I’m going to need your help to do it. Together, we can win back the House—and with it, the power to hold Trump and his entire administration accountable for this disaster of a war. Thank you, Sarah McBride

You see the Democrats have a MASSIVE database with nearly 100% of their legions of radical left voters ID'd and secured.
And for years, House GOP has been playing catch-up...

subject: (tell Congress!!) Pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act NOW
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=24082%2E4449941%2EGOGPRt) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=24082%2E4449941%2EGOGPRt) **Team -- Senator Raphael Warnock issued a grave warning:** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73546?t=3&akid=24082%2E4449941%2EGOGPRt) He's right. Republicans use voter suppression to win their elections -- it's despicable.

Thankfully, Sen. Warnock and our Democrats in Congress just reintroduced the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_.

This incredible bill would restore the _Voting Rights Act of 1965_ and undo decades of Republican voter suppression. **_[So we're activating an urgent petition to DEMAND Congress PASS the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ and strengthen voter protections across the country. Will you add your name?](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73546?t=4&akid=24082%2E4449941%2EGOGPRt)_** **[PETITION FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com
DUE BY: 11:59 PM
RESPONSE: #PENDING#](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73546?t=5&akid=24082%2E4449941%2EGOGPRt)** | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73546?t=6&akid=24082%2E4449941%2EGOGPRt)
---
Voter suppression laws are corrupt and racist.

John Lewis fought his entire life to make sure every American could make their voice heard at the ballot box.

We need to honor his good fight and work to strengthen and expand voting rights.

Republican legislators are passing voter suppression laws by the minute.

The only way to stop them is to PASS the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_.
[**__**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73546?t=7&akid=24082%2E4449941%2EGOGPRt)**_[20,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT: SIGN TO DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE _JOHN LEWIS VOTING RIGHTS ADVANCEMENT ACT_ >> ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73546?t=8&akid=24082%2E4449941%2EGOGPRt)_**
[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73546?t=9&akid=24082%2E4449941%2EGOGPRt)

This is so important.

_\- Fight For Reform_

name: Katie Porter
subject: It’s still true: fuck Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41085%2E3422442%2EQ_7Ufr)
**_Katie Porter spoke at the California Democratic Party Convention earlier this year, and her speech is just as relevant today as it was then. Please take a moment to read her remarks below and[then donate to her campaign for governor.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260403_2_ak.83UJtY&refcode=em20260403-41085&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41085%2E3422442%2EQ_7Ufr)_**
I’m Katie Porter. Some of you know me as the whiteboard lady who held CEOs and billionaires accountable in Congress.
So today, I wanna start with one simple, powerful message we all agree on.
Say it with me. Ready, 1 ... 2 ... 3 ...
**_Fuck Trump._**
Yeah, that’s right, Fuck Trump. Together, we’re going to kick Trump’s ass in November and stop him in his tracks.
I’ll stand up to Trump and his cronies again and again, just as I did in Congress—with or without my whiteboard. But this election for governor is about far more than defeating Trump.
We _**KNOW**_ what Trump is willing to do and how far he’s willing to go – he’s willing to kill people in the streets, to rip health care away, to ruthlessly attack our democracy.
But this governor’s race asks US — what are WE willing to do? What is CALIFORNIA willing to do for our democracy?
Who we elect as our next governor is the biggest, most powerful statement we can make in 2026 about who Democrats are, in California, and nationally. About what we stand for, and about what we will do.
Let’s elect a bold leader who WILL DO big things – the things we have long fought for. When I’m your governor, I will deliver:
* Single payer health care,
* Less expensive housing,
* Free child care for all,
* Zero tuition charges at our UCs and CSUs,
* And, thousands of dollars back in families pockets, by eliminating California income tax for those earning less than $100,000.

Those are real affordability solutions!
For decades, we have fought for these ideas. We’ve organized. We’ve voted. We’ve pushed this party to be better.
I am running for governor because I am WILLING and READY to get those things done!
But you know who is standing in our way? Billionaires and huge corporations that have far too much power in our country—and too much influence in Sacramento. I’ll take them DOWN and LIFT UP the working people of this state.
Look I understand, there’s a lot that makes me unique in this race—and some of that scares people. I’m the single mom of three kids, I push a grocery cart, fill my minivan with gas, and pay the bills. I understand what it’s like to watch expenses like utilities and insurance go up and dollars not stretch far enough, because I’ve experienced that too.
We’ve never had a governor like that in California. Heck, we’ve never had a governor in heels! And I think it’s about damn time.
My differences will make me a better governor, better able to address the challenges Californians face.
California Democrats, our country is counting on us to lead the way—to send a message about our democracy—by rejecting billionaires and corporate-backed candidates—and picking as governor, the ONLY candidate who has NEVER taken a dime of corporate PAC money.
In this election, there is a very real possibility that Republicans could sneak two candidates into the runoff. We CANNOT let that happen.
But let’s aim higher than stopping them. Let’s seize the opportunity to elect someone who is WILLING to get big things done and READY to live up to our progressive ideals.
My campaign IS our Democratic values, powered by small donations from 70,000 people just like you. And how you campaign is how you serve. I humbly ask for your support, not to be governor “Of” California, but to govern FOR ALL Californians.
Thank you.
_And Fuck Trump._
Katie Porter is running for governor to stand up to Trump and lower costs for working families. We need your help to win.
**[Please donate $5 to our campaign for governor today to help us reach voters across California.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260403_2_ak.83UJtY&refcode=em20260403-41085&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41085%2E3422442%2EQ_7Ufr)**

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260403-41085&amounts=&t=5&refcode2=41085_3422442_Q_7Ufr&akid=41085%2E3422442%2EQ_7Ufr)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=41085&t=6&akid=41085%2E3422442%2EQ_7Ufr)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=41085)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41085&t=7&akid=41085%2E3422442%2EQ_7Ufr)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Records Show FBI Objecting to Mar-a-Lago Raid
body:
Judicial Watch Sues Fed for Subpoenas about $2.5 Billion Renovation

[INSIDE JW]

RECORDS SHOW FBI OBJECTING TO MAR-A-LAGO RAID

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37502&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9Lc0M4ZkhyV3prTT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=47c8039866cb79264f237a2b6f8af5a1b3c9300971d5e1d8ee0d1db773544089]

We obtained 207 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37478&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3BsYXNtaWMtZWNoby1tYXItYS1sYWdvLTIwMjYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f3672a4a01d578f436f2d665b82a9a083f9fd45aa2a103137308fd8029727d70]
of Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) records that reveal the
FBI’s concerns about the legal basis for the raid of then-former
President Donald J. Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home.

The records expose deep concerns within the FBI itself, including
explicit objections from field agents who warned the U.S. Department
of Justice that the unprecedented August 8, 2022, raid on Trump’s
home lacked probable cause.

We uncovered the documents in response to a March 11, 2026, Freedom of
Information Act (FOIA) request regarding the counterintelligence
investigation codenamed Plasmic Echo
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37479&F=T&&hash=be827768ea5c8c9ae9d5711f26a90a2890e29917404cd3c2c5f025db7e293608
“sensitive investigative matter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37480&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvYXJjaGl2ZS9vcGEvZG9jcy9ndWlkZWxpbmVzLnBkZl3igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6adc5d1b5d1772c659125b3e5b41489f5d29b3190e0a145d1c32164c5fe0761d launched

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37481&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3BsYXNtaWMtZWNoby1tYXItYS1sYWdvLTIwMjYtcGdzLTEwOC0xMTAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b5c43a8f30ff1cce91c77447826015f6846141e095b202ad77fb1ec0605bd681]

Finally, if the goal is to identify and recover classified records
quickly, so as to protect the information, the 5 weeks spent fixated
on probable cause for a search warrant have been counterproductive.

testimony before the Senate Banking Committee. That testimony
addressed, in part, the multi-year renovation of the historic Marriner
S. Eccles Building and the adjacent Federal Reserve East Building.

During his testimony, Powell denied the existence of luxury features
such as private dining rooms, special elevators, rooftop gardens, and
other high-end elements. The renovation project, originally estimated
at approximately $1.9 billion, has ballooned
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37507&F=T&&hash=f2051007cf08a3434d4e515b13c8f042995fe7b9604264e60ec9329578b77795]
to $2.5 billion amid questions about cost overruns.

In July 2025, U.S. Senate Committee on Banking, Housing and Urban
Affairs Chairman Tim Scott (R-SC) sent a formal oversight letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37508&F=T&&hash=e4d89b376083b021a4725bb6495e6b8e17e63f39843d31535c7f3cd1b6719705]
to Powell highlighting discrepancies between the testimony and
approved renovation plans, raising concerns about transparency and
accountability for the multi-billion-dollar project. The letter points
out that previously approved plans by the National Capital Planning
Commission appear to reference some of the luxury features—raising
questions about whether the plans changed, the features were removed,
or the testimony was incomplete.

Trump administration officials, including then-Office of Management
and Budget Director Russell Vought, sharply criticized the renovation
project. Vought sent a letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37509&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9XSE9NQi9zdGF0dXMvMTk0MzM4MDgwMDM5MDQ2Mzg0MD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8b76e32d0c81fbcc79366a7d4db425ad724c9eb160b3009f7597b0944bc853bd] to Powell on July 10,
2025, questioning the project’s management and compliance with
federal standards. Vought publicly compared
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37510&F=T&&hash=436a3f5e5008b57044083324d7f214cedcc1a9cc3d6fc1b6b877960693ef24e6]
aspects of the renovation to elements that belong in France’s
“Palace of Versailles.”

In March 2026, U.S. District Chief Judge James E. Boasberg nullified
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37511&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90aGVoaWxsLmNvbS9idXNpbmVzcy81NzgzNDEzLWp1ZGdlLXF1YXNoZXMtcG93ZWxsLXN1YnBvZW5hcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=fa7fa6fca4f1a1eaa0e3292943ece1d47ec56fc2349c9c6dd8bfa1453407d3e5]
the Justice Department grand jury subpoenas. Jeanine Pirro, U.S.
attorney for the District of Columbia, announced that her office would
seek reconsideration and plans to appeal the ruling.

Hiding grand jury subpoenas only deepens suspicions and erodes trust
in our financial institutions.

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37467&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2ZsaW5uLXYtZXZhbnN0b24tb3JkZXItMDQyNjkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=d5401af4107842e0c11ed04bb996f15f474875ab149666f3be2078824bbcca26]

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37512&F=T&&hash=6495ed0ffe47cb680a9519d9fc34338790755a2e7a89828b710ed791f00b5b41
far

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37469&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmFuc3RvbnJvdW5kdGFibGUuY29tLzIwMjYvMDIvMDUvb3Zlci00MC1yZXBhcmF0aW9ucy1wYXltZW50cy1leHBlY3RlZC10by1iZS1naXZlbi1vdXQtYnktc3VtbWVyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=f14da2debacd1c6ecb3238c5ab5f2edc8441782581c979b105e4ffae1d260e22]

U.S. District Judge John F. Kress rejected
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37467&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2ZsaW5uLXYtZXZhbnN0b24tb3JkZXItMDQyNjkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=d5401af4107842e0c11ed04bb996f15f474875ab149666f3be2078824bbcca26]

We
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37513&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2ZsaW5uLXYtZXZhbnN0b24tb3Bwby10by1kaXNtaXNzLTA0MjY5L11hcmd1ZWQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a74a5747209583aa8376f571d854ff357503f454fc29feb560d9c9c0854b0359

> [T]he program’s use of a race-based eligibility requirement is
> presumptively unconstitutional, and remedying societal
> discrimination is not a compelling government interest. Nor has

The Constitution forbids race-based government programs like this. We

forward against this woke, racist program.

> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=80627&L=37516&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudXNkYS5nb3Yvc2l0ZXMvZGVmYXVsdC9maWxlcy9kb2N1bWVudHMvdXNkYS1nZW5lcmFsLXRlcm1zLWNvbmRpdGlvbnMtMjAyNS5wZGZdZm9yY2luZz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=39cd84f0688433abaf61a6e1b274b4db885c1aaa9c0a8111d210c6432c5e14b1

clean_body: Judicial Watch Sues Fed for Subpoenas about $2.5 Billion Renovation [INSIDE JW] RECORDS SHOW FBI OBJECTING TO MAR-A-LAGO RAID [] We obtained 207 pages [] of Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) records that reveal the FBI’s concerns about the legal basis for the raid of then-former President Donald J. Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home. The records expose deep concerns within the FBI itself, including explicit objections from field agents who warned the U.S. Department of Justice that the unprecedented August 8, 2022, raid on Trump’s home lacked probable cause. We uncovered the documents in response to a March 11, 2026, Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request regarding the counterintelligence investigation codenamed Plasmic Echo [ “sensitive investigative matter [ launched following a referral from the National Archives and Records Administration. The records include a July 13, 2022, email [] between FBI field agents explicitly stating they did not believe probable cause existed to search Mar-a-Lago and urging the Justice Department to cooperate with Trump’s attorney instead of insisting on a raid: WFO [Washington Field Office] has made numerous suggestions to DOJ [Justice Department] over the course of this investigation that the most expedient way to ensure recovery of all classified documents would be to go through Mr. Corcoran [then-Trump’s attorney Evan Corcoran]. DOJ has persistently disagreed. * New NARA Referral for all PRA vs. classified. If NARA pursued “presidential records” which are likely to still be located at Mar a Lago, they could recover any additional records which may, upon review, identify additional classified material. WFO has been rebuffed in this request by DOJ. WFO does not believe (and has articulated to DOJ CES [Counterintelligence and Export Control Section]), that we have established probable cause for the search warrant at Mar a Lago. DOJ has opined that they do, requesting a wide scope including residence, office, storage space. Finally, if the goal is to identify and recover classified records quickly, so as to protect the information, the 5 weeks spent fixated on probable cause for a search warrant have been counterproductive. A separate internal communication [] reinforces that agents rejected the legal basis and scope: DOJ has inquired as to an Ops [operations] Plan for a SW of MAL. WFO relayed that we are not in agreement for PC [probable cause] on the SW [search warrant]. WFO has an Ops Plan in place that will/can be quickly updated between FBI/MM [Miami] and FBI/WF, however, [Redacted] does not believe we have PC for the 45 [Trump] Office or the bedroom due to recency and issues of boxes versus classified information. Therefore, as we are in disagreement on the SW and its scope, we are not yet finalizing a SW as we are missing relevant logistics and details. A May 10, 2022, FBI email [] shows direct coordination with the Biden White House Counsel’s Office and identifies a Trump aide as a target: “Coordination with DOJ and WH Counsel are in work to start the process to confirm and interview current administration employee Walt Nauta (former WH Valet).” An August 4, 2022, FBI email [] documents Justice Department officials dismissing optics: Because the search warrant operational plan has contact with FPOTUS’s [Trump’s] attorney as the first step, I’d respectfully request that the contact be handled by FBI, not by DOJ. As the ASAC [assistant special agent in charge] who will be responsible for the execution of the warrant, this first contact will set the tone for the day. The FBI intends for the execution of the warrant to be handled in a professional, low key manner, and to be mindful of the optics of the search. Safety of the search team is always of a concern during any such operation. Since we heard Mr. Toscas say yesterday in the call that “he frankly doesn't give a damn about the optics” and Mr. Bratt already has built an antagonistic relationship with FPOTUS’s attorney [redacted] I think it is fair to say that the DOJ contact with Mr. Corcoran just prior to the execution of the warrant will not go well. A May 24, 2022, FBI email [] indicates that the press had advance knowledge of the investigation’s actions: “an inquiry from the Washington Post seeking confirmation on two items from the FBI WFO Public Affairs team.” A February 24, 2022, FBI report [] shows the left-wing advocacy group Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington (CREW) helped spur the investigation into President Trump: Letter to AG and Director from [redacted] Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington (CREW) and [redacted] National Security Archive, dated 2/8/2022, writing regarding President Donald Trump and other White House officials demonstrating a serious disregard for their recordkeeping responsibilities under the Presidential Records Act. Requesting DOJ investigate whether former President Trump violated federal criminal law by willfully mutilating and destroying critical records of his presidency before leaving office. FBI Director Wray sent a bureau-wide email [] the day after the search stating the FBI does not cut corners and does not play favorites, while the WFO’s own internal documents show field agents had formally disputed the probable cause basis for the search. Director Wray’s August 11, 2022, bureau-wide message—filed into the Plasmic Echo case file—states the investigative steps taken were measured and scrupulously consistent with national security obligations. This was sent the day after WFO’s internal emails documenting its disagreement with Justice Department over probable cause had already been filed into the same case record: As always, the way we maintain the trust and confidence of the American people isn’t by joining the public commentary. We do it through our work. By showing, when all the facts come out, we stuck to the process. We don’t cut corners. We don’t play favorites. We ask the tough questions – including of ourselves, making sure among other things that the investigative steps we take are measured and scrupulously consistent with our national security obligations and our role upholding the Constitution. These documents show the FBI knew there was no probable cause, yet Biden’s Justice Department pushed forward with an abusive raid on President Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home. This is a historic abuse of power that demands full accountability. Judicial Watch will continue pursuing additional disclosures to uncover the full truth behind one of the most controversial federal investigations in American history. We are at the forefront of the court battles for transparency regarding the Biden administration’s targeting of former President Trump. In June 2023, we uncovered records [] from the Justice Department that show top officials of the National Security Division discussing the political implications of Trump allowing CNN to use closed-circuit TV (CCTV) footage of the raid on his Mar-a-Lago home. The documents confirm that the Justice Department had asked that Mar-a-Lago CCTV be turned off before the raid. A separate Judicial Watch lawsuit [] against the National Archives and Records Administration resulted in the release of 1,276 pages of records [] [ the unprecedented document dispute between the National Archives and Trump. Click here [] or here [] to review the records. In August 2022, we sued to unseal [] the search warrant affidavit [] used to justify the unprecedented raid on the home of former President Trump. In September 2022, we filed [] lawsuits against the DOJ for its records and the FBI’s records about the Mar-a-Lago raid search warrant application and approval, as well as communications about the warrant between the FBI, Executive Office of the President and the Secret Service. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FED FOR SUBPOENAS ABOUT $2.5 BILLION RENOVATION The Deep State is trying to decorate its club house with taxpayers picking up the bill, and we’re determined to expose the shenanigans. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System for failing to produce the grand jury subpoenas [] served in connection with allegations that Chairman Jerome H. Powell may have misled Congress about a $2.5 billion headquarters renovation project (Judicial Watch Inc. v. Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System [] (No. 1:26-cv-01113)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Federal Reserve failed to comply with Judicial Watch’s January 26, 2026, FOIA request seeking access to the subpoenas issued by the U.S. Department of Justice. In a public statement [] in January 2026, Powell disclosed that the Justice Department had served the Federal Reserve with grand jury subpoenas “threatening a criminal indictment” related to his June 2025 [] testimony before the Senate Banking Committee. That testimony addressed, in part, the multi-year renovation of the historic Marriner S. Eccles Building and the adjacent Federal Reserve East Building. During his testimony, Powell denied the existence of luxury features such as private dining rooms, special elevators, rooftop gardens, and other high-end elements. The renovation project, originally estimated at approximately $1.9 billion, has ballooned [] to $2.5 billion amid questions about cost overruns. In July 2025, U.S. Senate Committee on Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs Chairman Tim Scott (R-SC) sent a formal oversight letter [] to Powell highlighting discrepancies between the testimony and approved renovation plans, raising concerns about transparency and accountability for the multi-billion-dollar project. The letter points out that previously approved plans by the National Capital Planning Commission appear to reference some of the luxury features—raising questions about whether the plans changed, the features were removed, or the testimony was incomplete. Trump administration officials, including then-Office of Management and Budget Director Russell Vought, sharply criticized the renovation project. Vought sent a letter [] to Powell on July 10, 2025, questioning the project’s management and compliance with federal standards. Vought publicly compared [] aspects of the renovation to elements that belong in France’s “Palace of Versailles.” In March 2026, U.S. District Chief Judge James E. Boasberg nullified [] the Justice Department grand jury subpoenas. Jeanine Pirro, U.S. attorney for the District of Columbia, announced that her office would seek reconsideration and plans to appeal the ruling. Hiding grand jury subpoenas only deepens suspicions and erodes trust in our financial institutions. FEDERAL COURT ALLOWS SUIT AGAINST EVANSTON REPARATIONS TO CONTINUE An Illinois federal court has allowed [] our class action civil rights lawsuit against the City of Evanston, Illinois’ reparations program to move forward. We filed the class action civil rights lawsuit [] in May 2024, challenging Evanston’s use of race as an eligibility requirement for its “Local Reparations Restorative Housing Program,” which makes $25,000 direct cash payments to black residents and descendants of black residents who lived in Evanston between the years 1919 and 1969 (Flinn et al. v Evanston [] (No. 1:24-cv-04269)). We argue that the program’s race-based eligibility program violates the Equal Protection Clause of the Fourteenth Amendment to the U.S. Constitution. [ far [], 137 people have received reparations payments [] totaling $3.47 million. U.S. District Judge John F. Kress rejected [] the city’s attempt to dismiss the case, finding that the plaintiffs have sufficient standing to pursue their constitutional claims and that requiring the plaintiffs, who are white, to first file for a program they were ineligible for due to their race was a futile gesture. We [ [] to the court: [T]he program’s use of a race-based eligibility requirement is presumptively unconstitutional, and remedying societal discrimination is not a compelling government interest. Nor has remedying discrimination from as many as 105 years ago or remedying intergenerational discrimination ever been recognized as a compelling government interest. Among the program’s other fatal flaws is that it uses race as a proxy for discrimination without requiring proof of discrimination. The Constitution forbids race-based government programs like this. We welcome the court’s decision to allow this historic lawsuit to move forward against this woke, racist program. We are being assisted in the lawsuit by Christine Svenson of Chalmers, Adams, Backer & Kaufman, LLC. In January 2025, the City of San Francisco, in a 7-3 vote by the Board of Supervisors of the City and County of San Francisco, authorized a settlement agreement [] in a taxpayer lawsuit we brought, agreeing to discontinue its discriminatory guaranteed-income program funded by taxpayer money in favor of transgender individuals with a preference for biological black and Latino men who identify as women. The agreement commits the city to pay $3,250 in attorney fees and costs and not to create a new guaranteed income program with the same eligibility criteria. In September 2025, we announced that we wrote letters [] to the Offices of Civil Rights in the Departments of Education and Labor requesting they investigate the collective bargaining agreement between the Minneapolis Public Schools and the Minneapolis Federation of Teachers. The letters point out that the contract violates the equal protection clause of the Fourteenth Amendment to the U.S. Constitution. The City of Asheville, NC, in January 2022, settled [] a Judicial Watch federal civil rights lawsuit after agreeing to remove all racially discriminatory provisions in a city-funded scholarship program. Additionally, the city also agreed to remove racially discriminatory eligibility provisions in a related program that provides grants to educators. In December 2022, we announced the California Court of Appeal has upheld two [] injunctions against California quota requirements for corporate boards. Earlier this year, two California trial courts had found (here [] and here [ state quota mandates for sex, race, ethnicity, and LGBT status. On December 1, 2022, the California Court of Appeal denied (here [] and here []) two separate emergency requests by the California Secretary of State to lift the injunctions. STATES SUE USDA OVER GENDER, IMMIGRATION RULES TO GET BILLIONS As President Trump works to undo the feverishly liberal policies of the Biden era, recipients of the easy money from Washington are fighting back. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. Twenty Democrat-run states and the District of Columbia are suing the U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) over a new policy that prohibits all grant recipients from using taxpayer funds to promote gender ideology, benefit illegal immigrants or on programs that deprive women and girls of fair athletic opportunities or permit male competitive participation in women’s sports. In late December the federal agency that annually disburses tens of billions of dollars in food assistance announced the antidiscrimination rule [] [ states to certify compliance with the new regulations before receiving money for costly welfare programs such food stamps, free school lunch and a special program for low-income women known as Women, Infants and Children (WIC) and their kids under the age of five. The states suing over the new requirements receive over $74 billion annually from the USDA and they want their federal funds while still supporting the biased leftist policies of the previous administration. The new Trump administration policy is unconstitutional, according to their lawsuit [], which alleges that the conditions are vague, arbitrary, coercive and unrelated to the federal interest. The complaint also accuses the USDA of exceeding its legal authority and imposing the measure without following required legal procedure. The agency has “thrown unconstitutional and unlawful roadblocks between the programs created by Congress and the States that rely on them, threatening critical nutrition support, vital agricultural research, and the safety of our national food chain and communities,” according to the complaint, which also accuses the USDA of imposing extraneous and unreasoned conditions on all programs, grants and cooperative agreements. The lawsuit further alleges that the spending clause of the U.S. Constitution requires that “funding condition be communicated with sufficient clarity that it can be accepted knowingly and voluntarily, and it prohibits coercive conditions that place a gun to the head of recipients that cannot forgo critical funding.” The “ambiguous, coercive conditions” advanced by the USDA “undermine the status of the States as independent sovereigns in our federal system,” the complaint states. Among the officials suing the USDA is New York Attorney General Letitia James, who was federally indicted [] [ year with bank fraud and making false statements to a financial institution. She says millions of New Yorkers depend on government assistance to put food on the table and their benefits could be threatened or delayed. “The federal government cannot hold critical funding hostage to force states to comply with vague, ideological directives,” James said in a statement [] [ the lawsuit. The other states suing are California, Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Hawaii, Illinois, Maine, Maryland, Massachusetts, Michigan, Minnesota, New Jersey, New Mexico, Oregon, Rhode Island, Vermont, Virginia, Washington, and Wisconsin. New Jersey Attorney General Jennifer Davenport [], who has previously filed five lawsuits “challenging unlawful grant conditions imposed by the Trump Administration” confidently asserts that the president cannot make “cruel funding restrictions” that, she says in this case will result in people going hungry. Connecticut Attorney General William Tong [] says the administration’s immigration, diversity, equity, inclusion, and gender identity policies are unrelated to the purpose of USDA funding. “Trump’s message to Connecticut—fall in line with extreme MAGA ideology, or your families go hungry,” Tong said. “Trump wants states to sign hateful pledges that have absolutely nothing to do with food assistance.” The updated USDA funding policy is part of broader initiatives launched by President Trump early last year to defend women from gender ideology extremism and restore biological truth to the federal government and end the taxpayer subsidization of open borders []. Under the first measure the federal government will “defend women’s rights and protect freedom of conscience by using clear and accurate language and policies that recognize women are biologically female, and men are biologically male,” according to a presidential order []. The second aims to prevent taxpayer resources from acting as a magnet and fueling illegal immigration to the United States by ensuring that no taxpayer-funded benefits go to unqualified aliens. States only need to comply with the new rules to receive their billions in USDA funds. HAPPY EASTER! “Easter says you can put truth in a grave, but it won’t stay there.” ~ Clarence W. Hall In this season, Christians around the world are celebrating the resurrection of Christ. There are no more powerful symbols of hope than the cross and the empty tomb. From me and mine, I wish you and yours all the joy of Easter! For those celebrating Passover, I wish you a Happy Passover, as well! Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2026, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: These Fighters Need You Right Now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
The Senate is a big problem.

| | | | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: The Senate is a big problem. The Democrats want to destroy our country, and far too many Republicans are unwilling to do anything about it. That's why we must unite to support strong Senate candidates in the midterm elections. Not the candidates hand-picked by the Washington machine. We need fighters — proven by their records, battle-tested, and ready to take on the establishment. The Senate Conservatives Fund has endorsed a strong group of them, and we need your help to get them across the finish line. Here's who's in the fight:
---
|
---
---
# Nate Morris

---
# U.S. Senate | Kentucky

---
# May 19 (Primary)

---
Mitch McConnell's seat is finally open, and Nate Morris is making sure another establishment Republican doesn't fill it. He built a $700 million company from a $10,000 line of credit, and he's running on mass deportation, a full immigration moratorium, and zero tolerance for career politicians. The primary is on May 19. This race is winnable — and your support can deliver the knockout blow to McConnell's failed legacy.
---
|
---
---
# Barry Moore
---
# U.S. Senate | Alabama

---
# May 19 (Primary)

---
Congressman Barry Moore was the first elected official in America to endorse Donald Trump — at the 2015 Mobile rally, before anyone believed Trump could win. He carries a 98% Heritage Action score, Trump's full endorsement, and a lifetime of fighting for conservative values. He currently leads the primary field by 6 points, but with 47% of voters still undecided, money matters.
---
|
---
---
# Kevin Hern
---
# U.S. Senate | Oklahoma

---
# June 16 (Primary)
---
A McDonald's franchisee who built a business empire, Congressman Kevin Hern chaired the Republican Study Committee and carries a 95% Heritage Action score. Trump endorsed him two days after he launched — along with SCF heroes like Senators Ron Johnson (R-WI) and Rick Scott (R-FL). If Hern wins, he will be one of the strongest America First voices in the Senate.
---
|
---
---
# Harriet Hageman
---
# U.S. Senate | Wyoming

---
# August 18 (Primary)
---
Congresswoman Harriet Hageman crushed RINO Liz Cheney 66-29%. Now she's bringing that same fight to the Senate. A fourth-generation Wyoming rancher with 34 years of battling federal overreach, Hageman has a 98% Heritage Action score and Trump's endorsement from day one. This is a once-in-a-generation chance to send a proven MAGA warrior to the upper chamber.
---
|
---
---
# Ashley Moody
---
# U.S. Senate | Florida

---
# August 18 (Primary)
---
As Florida's Attorney General, Ashley Moody was the first in the nation to demand fentanyl be declared a weapon of mass destruction — and the first to demand Biden designate the cartels as foreign terrorists (Trump did it on Day 1). Now she's in the Senate, fighting to stay. Her 2026 special election is one conservatives cannot afford to lose.
---
|
---
---
# Roger Marshall
---
# U.S. Senate | Kansas

---
# August 4 (Primary)
---
Senator Roger "Doc" Marshall is leading the biggest election integrity fight in the Senate right now. He's championing the SAVE America Act — requiring proof of citizenship to vote — and he's willing to launch a talking filibuster to force a vote. When every single Senate Democrat voted against a clean voter ID bill, Marshall called them out. He's also fighting to stop China from buying American farmland.
---
|
---
---
# Bill Hagerty
---
# U.S. Senate | Tennessee

---
# August 6 (Primary)
---
Senator Bill Hagerty just hosted President Trump in Memphis to celebrate a landmark win: the Memphis Safe Task Force drove overall crime down 43%, robberies down 51%, and car thefts down 67% — and located 150 missing children. He's also authored the BIOSECURE Act to exclude Chinese military-linked biotech firms from federal contracts. Hagerty is delivering, and he needs our support.
---
|
---
# Fuel the Fight
---
Here's what makes giving to candidates through SCF different:
You can support any or all of these candidates in a single transaction. SCF covers 100% of the processing fees, so every dollar you designate goes directly to the candidate's campaign. No RINOs, no WinRed, no tricks – just support sent straight to the best Senate candidates in the country. [**Support these candidates with a split contribution today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt6440fb3jjgafj4p94huv750etu2gsgk4q7380o_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpg60ob6clh2bs)
These races will shape the Senate — and the country — for years to come. No matter where you live, the senators elected in 2026 will vote on your taxes, your borders, your Second Amendment rights, and the direction of this nation.
[**Donate and help us build a conservative Senate.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6heaojhvt8f1iaar88ov5pu07sog61muusc319o_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpg60ob6clh2bs)
Thank you for fighting for America's future. Thank you for standing with us when it matters. Sincerely,
---

---
---
Co-Founder & CEO Senate Conservatives Fund
---
|
---
# END OF MONTH DEADLINE
---
---
[**SUPPORT SENATE CONSERVATIVES**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqtpcck77qfc27rlb15mqli5ap187rpeor8bc3u8_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpg60ob6clh2bs)
---
[**TAKE ACTION**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvf709jjqqmbufq59egae69o38nerhah4f7irbbo_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cpg60ob6clh2bs)
---
|
---
**_Secure America's future. Support Senate Conservatives._** Senate Conservatives Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

---
---
|
---
Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Democrat demands answers on ICE detention of Islamic leader in Milwaukee — and DHS slaps her down
body:
The Department of Homeland Security has shut down a Democrat suggesting that an immigrant had been targeted over his skin color or religious beliefs.Democratic Sen. Tammy Baldwin of Wisconsin posted an article about the detention of the president of the Islamic Society of Milwaukee, the largest mosque in Wisconsin, by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents.'This terrorist will remain in ICE custody pending removal proceedings. | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/oKskavPMa38qDuqqlq6dwQ)

[](http://trk.libertyledger._jEMO91iXtDg)

# **[Democrat demands answers on ICE detention of Islamic leader in Milwaukee — and DHS slaps her down](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The Department of Homeland Security has shut down a Democrat suggesting that an immigrant had been targeted over his skin color or religious beliefs.Democratic Sen. Tammy Baldwin of Wisconsin posted an article about the detention of the president of the Islamic Society of Milwaukee, the largest mosque in Wisconsin, by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents.'This terrorist will remain in ICE custody pending removal proceedings.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Judge dismisses final charge in Kamala Harris' assault on pro-lifer](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
A California judge on Wednesday cleared the final legal hurdle in the long-running prosecution of a pro-life activist who alleged in undercover videos that abortion providers were illegally profiting from fetal tissue. “As promised, the final charge has been DISMISSED and the case completely expunged— —after a couple months’ administrative delay, and a truly bizarre [...]...Click to read more

# **[White House seeks $5.6 billion cut to NASA budget in 2027](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/KdFgsGR2PB-IQ0sVDeq6nQ)**
---
The White House on Friday proposed a $5.6 billion cut to NASA’s budget for 2027, including a $3.4 billion cut to the space agency’s science unit, a 23% cut as NASA’s new chief plans an array of new missions under the flagship U.S. moon program....Click to read more

---
Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche says he “never heard” President Trump tie Pam Bondi’s firing from the Justice Department to the files on late financier and convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. “I have never heard President Trump say anything that the attorney general was, that anything that happened to her had anything to do with [...]...Click to read more

body:

| | | | | I hope all is well. Please don't scroll past this.

It's Byron Donalds, and I'm urgently asking you to complete a CRITICAL MAGA Voter Census before tonight.

President Trump has trusted me with a major mission: build the momentum needed for a massive RED WAVE in November.

But that only happens if real MAGA patriots speak up.

That's why this census was sent to a very small group of trusted supporters -- people we believe will answer honestly and never stop fighting for MAGA.

Your response helps guide where we focus our fight next, and I'll be sharing it DIRECTLY with President Trump.

Right now, your input is still missing.

Please take a few seconds to submit your answers before the midnight deadline so your voice is counted.

Our movement runs on the voices of patriots like you.

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 4.3.2026
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-adiikhl-didthutlhu-m/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-adiikhl-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot,From the very moment Anti-victim Chris Taylor announced her candidacy for the Wisconsin Supreme Court, the Republican Party of Wisconsin mobilized with speed and intensity, using recommendations from the 2025 post-election commission. We launched an aggressive counter-campaign, working to expose Taylor's record, recruited and nominated 5,300 poll workers for this cycle, increased our digital presence with ads, trained over 500 local candidates, and mobilized the grassroots.

With just FOUR days remaining until Election Day, Judge Maria Lazar is on her "Road to Victory" tour, traveling across Wisconsin to meet voters and make her final push. This is the critical moment to get involved, whether by volunteering, making calls, knocking on doors, joining the team for events, or spreading the word online. Join the effort today before it's too late!-Team WisGOP **NEW VOTER CONTACT PROGRAM** Judge Maria Lazar's campaign has a new app. Super easy to use and helps us reach more voters!You can help Maria Lazar win on April 7th by following the instructions below.
1. Download the app
2. Contact identified voters in the app.
3. Ask them to vote for Judge Maria Lazar on April 7 using the messages set up for the issue topic.

[Download on Apple](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-adiikhl-didthutlhu-y/) [Download on Android](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-adiikhl-didthutlhu-j/) **Take Action!****We need Letter to the Editor Signers!**
Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at [arickard@wisgop.org](mailto:arickard@wisgop.org). [BECOME A LTE SIGNER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-adiikhl-didthutlhu-t/) **Become a Poll Observer!**
Missed the poll worker deadline? Don't worry, there's still time to become a poll observer. Sign up below! [BECOME A POLL OBSERVER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-adiikhl-didthutlhu-i/) **Help us bring victories to Republican candidates!**
Campaigns take money, and we need YOUR help to fund campaigns at every level. While Democrats rely on out-of-state billionaires, Republicans are dedicated to the grassroots and the State of Wisconsin. subject: Billionaire Peter Thiel unleashing hell to defeat Dem redistricting

body:
Our campaign to authorize emergency redistricting to counter MAGA is the most urgent point of resistance right now. We have to fight to win this, and we need your help to do it.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ACzsjVxGA421xU9pwr_l8S54fAT2yBp80CaolC_0UQ4ZYP6SnqJvOjIWmYQSPK8ELzSS9l10wpCPTAGI35vVthGHuL4Z2l57mGRdDzO7gbPn-GQ5H0I3zVNV7OGQVvI5cxeykmnuN-MRTjqYmF3cx11BJve4G1G3OMll635JCrg5hWD3CuylNor0JKtPcmfntSdT4Of2f8iZE98fXNie5A==&c=DZiXe-bl-rfVleufQuKoIan95oNxrBDzV-deG_wM3xJZmeHIDIxLsg==&ch=9RdIZkKVyFvcsb44wMHU3byxhniF0iAoMYYcEAuBSR3GzZB9e5q4YQ==)
---
Peter,
Things were already looking tight in Virginia's redistricting referendum election.
But now news has broken that Peter Thiel, the founder and chairman of the AI-based surveillance technology company Palantir, is funneling millions of dollars into defeating the referendum.
Thiel is one of the most vocal and outspoken proponents of right wing authoritarianism, writing as early as 2009 that "I no longer believe that freedom and democracy are compatible."
His company Palantir has been amassing mind-boggling amounts of data on Americans to compile a comprehensive database for Big Brother style surveillance. Palantir has even partnered with ICE to assist in targeting immigrants for Trump's mass deportation agenda.
Thiel and his Tech Bro billionaire friends are already planning to do the same against us here in Colorado. But if they succeed in thwarting Virginia's redistricting referendum, they're going to throw 10 times what they are spending in Virginia at us to stop our initiative to redistrict blue state Colorado.
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ACzsjVxGA421xU9pwr_l8S54fAT2yBp80CaolC_0UQ4ZYP6SnqJvOjIWmYQSPK8ELzSS9l10wpCPTAGI35vVthGHuL4Z2l57mGRdDzO7gbPn-GQ5H0I3zVNV7OGQVvI5cxeykmnuN-MRTjqYmF3cx11BJve4G1G3OMll635JCrg5hWD3CuylNor0JKtPcmfnTOvqRZmlsE_-xDMwEnsCVA==&c=DZiXe-bl-rfVleufQuKoIan95oNxrBDzV-deG_wM3xJZmeHIDIxLsg==&ch=9RdIZkKVyFvcsb44wMHU3byxhniF0iAoMYYcEAuBSR3GzZB9e5q4YQ==)
---
Trump just signed an unconstitutional Executive Order to ban mail-in voting. Congressional Republicans are doing everything they can to pass Trump's signature voter suppression legislation called the "SAVE Act."
Trump has even pledged to send the FBI and possibly even ICE to patrol the polls during elections.
This is not a drill: MAGA is coming for free and fair elections.
Our ballot measure campaign to allow Colorado voters to authorize emergency redistricting to counter MAGA is the most urgent point of resistance right now. We have to fight to win this, and we need your help to do it.
[Colorado Draws The Line is on the frontlines of the fight against right wing fascists and MAGA billionaires who don't believe in freedom and democracy. |
---
| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

If you missed out on gold's recent run ...

You've been given a second chance.

Because the gold market is moving to the next phase.

Something we call the Golden Paradox.

It's a hidden opportunity that's played out for nearly 100 years.

A way that could've helped investors make 31 times more ...

You've been given a second chance. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | If you missed out on gold's recent run ...
