subject: Fighter Jet Downed, Trump's Sports Order, and TSA Shoes-On Policy
body:
A U.S. F-15E Strike Eagle fighter jet [was downed over Iran on Friday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAUhZ8GOwxcYBwLir-xm7_d0iBcRgyKwbtj5u037u4bbHeSk3wn3_l4jA-Xctqe_92KlmIZNzyPjERYx5ieM2FdkEI5NwxUP9f9OPYygoAbF5oLPQaX8nvUTbAREVA1aGXXGejvQppmtsoE572EToXQGaW88L3oIeIUjFN-apK9aEILLQUIqdrYmXvsZfSg_KRQMS0wJCq1XUraaMaY3-WFtfVlbbKdifaDqX8MBgbDeZ6tn47L4uoZDFdkMLgVa_Ju479WfEHiURrkP3L8QvJU3cZgaKoN-5lyTsetY1o8V5fy9x796aSXha8AAAD__9JafS0), marking the first manned American aircraft known to be lost over enemy territory during Operation Epic Fury.

| | |

# Saturday, April 4, 2026
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1776, after driving British forces out of Boston, [Gen. George Washington](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOtCAUBeCn0Q6DgKMWFH9jN3-7pWHkIncWwcDdIb79Zjb7Blt_Oeck5-O-3g0GjPt_c4Aml9YItQQggrw63D1BfgLZVCNYyl_HWcqZVsHFjXHFuFqtwXCtqrXaAQiQLeh-HAcxT7wfWq_5KOZemnlQo5M3NcE0PzazbWYajIJZtajfbVxx1XPBe9m5cZjc3LtNyO0hQTaKg0VKuXsmjOTBhSu9IHdbOtqgPdFZGvmvEUsjllpr57FQytfbG7GQx8KsuRhG9iuNWMyZMTD1TpjiMe6UInvAjrGww-TNM0osQmVXyp9t1vasGAKW29govh8Gw888_emzlxbfAQAA__8EZILR) set his sights on New York, beginning a march to defend the city from an expected invasion. NASA just shared breathtaking new photos of Earth from the _Artemis II_ crew as America's astronauts, now beyond Earth orbit for the first time in decades, expressed their awe at the experience. You can [see the images](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OrDAQhE9jMiP_AUPg4CVk89INkcFt6JHByO4da26_Yq-wWUklVen7vp7z02HEc_vvDrAU0nxCLRGIIM8Bt50gv4B8qid4yt_HVcqVZiVUz4XhwszeYfzMpvE2ACjQDVg5DJ0aH0J2zW6997156GGUnfBGyzB6FTofhkWbpV_7Bu29JowwUighdRuG7hFGGVal10WDZkaAR0q5fSU8aYcQP-kNuV3T0US7E12F6X9MTUxNtdZ2XcpNcfdMTXdkanKZ4MDCETm4TDu_9kSJn644ngE9r1jgcCdTU5OtvyrGiKUfmBHb4TD-vtGfFL2t-gkAAP__l9h8dA) and hear the astronauts interviewed from space in our story below. Today's sponsor, [FinanceBuzz](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkEFuwyAQRU-Dd7HGA8b2gkWlyLt02yUiMMSk2FiYxM3tq7SReoAu5z1p_tf_OOmTCTEsl3czkyo-6YX2LVIplLUPl6lQvlJxaV_IlXyb121bk0ZAeQBxAKGdCfGhReWUJ0LiFamm61ocemjaalKCBos42NagdD0CAPTS9VaSa6l3QxXU8xsIEA0gNLz2Xdv7ofEWuT1z4kwAuVBSrq8pLGUiHx_pTrm2aa6imkpZN8bfGI4Mx33f60f-KvnzqRmOxnttGR-T95R1cIwfUUjeMZRP9Qugwde93c6c8eMr4g8i48fFlJAWEw-iFlVWbt1DjGGTHRNwmU2IP43Kv2a8K_wOAAD__3XUhPM), is sharing simple, practical tips to help you cut expenses and create extra breathing room--even small changes can make a meaningful difference.

## US Jet Downed Over Iran, One Pilot Rescued
A U.S. F-15E Strike Eagle fighter jet [was downed over Iran on Friday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAUhZ8GOwxcYBwLir-xm7_d0iBcRgyKwbtj5u037u4bbHeSk3wn3_l4jA-Xctqe_92KlmIZNzyPjERYx5ieM2FdkEI5NwxUP9f9OPYygoAbF5oLPQaX8nvUTbAREVA1aGXXGejvQppmtsoE572EToXQGaW88L3oIeIUjFN-apK9aEILLQUIqdrYmXvsZfSg_KRQMS0wJCq1XUraaMaY3-WFtfVlbbKdifaDqX8MBgbDeZ6tn47L4uoZDFdkMLgVa_Ju479WfEHiURrkP3L8QvJU3cZgaKoN-5lyTsetY1o8V5fy9x796aSXha8AAAD__9JafS0), marking the first manned American aircraft known to be lost over enemy territory during Operation Epic Fury. U.S. Special Forces located and rescued one of the two crew members on Iranian soil. [A search and rescue operation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u5CAQhE-Dsx7hBv9MQLCJs7fphhY2zZgRBgt6nuXbr7zaG7ykkpI-1Vd_vuYvG2JIr992J8M-z4nOGomZyuzDa2Mqb2KXz0SOy2c_aj3yjBJ7kBqknp0N8Zp144wnQlINmXYYOnyOsu2azYyjVyt2Xj21lXZZfb9oPSyOlFxcb7EJ5qZJLXUrUbbq4Ydu9M_Wr6jWRZESWpILnMvjnUPijXy88jeVx5r3JpqN-ahC_RI4CZzSdeTKdyVwusECJ6nvUAKnM5fo4FYUOIViE6zRhr1CYKhbZrhF4VPhvzq8icFWWPIn8QVHtCs5yAmOEDMLnJpi3HGGGEPtB6Hla7ch_hvGP3rz2-DfAAAA__-c5YoN) involving helicopters and a C-130 aircraft was underway for the second aviator. Iranian state television urged civilians to help capture the pilots and offered a bounty for capturing them alive. Israel canceled planned strikes in Iran to avoid interfering with the rescue effort. The fighter jet downed over Iran would be [the fourth F-15E lost in Epic Fury.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SrCAUhJ8GM6b4c9SA4CZmc9MNLYRzlFkEC3As335rdvcNNu_q7u_7eEwP44OPy3-zga6YpghnCVAr5An9slbIT6gunRFczce2l7KnSTBxp0xRpiZnfLgm1TiNAAJkA5p3XSuGnvG2WXU3yJ7bWfbOWX5HbBF745DNMx9waG3j9buNKaY4E4zLG3ZtjwNHK6SdJUiiGDhfU749k491BQxXekG-2bQ1Qa-17oXIf0SMRIxzBvPp4-IAIRZ4Z4gY3wtEjEwRMR6FIuUt0F88-oRKfwDpfFGfTaQZij2Aph2yqT7FQo_oIJ_mImJssnb76UPw5d4RxZbN-PB9pv7J4EuLrwAAAP__FjiG1Q) On March 1, three F-15Es were shot down over Kuwait in an apparent friendly fire incident. All six crew members involved in that incident ejected and were safely recovered.
## NASA Shows 1st Photos of Earth from Artemis II
NASA on Friday released the [first photographs of Earth](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OrDAQhE9jMiP_AUPg4CVk89INkcFt6JHByO4da26_Yq-wWUklVen7vp7z02HEc_vvDrAU0nxCLRGIIM8Bt50gv4B8qid4yt_HVcqVZiVUz4XhwszeYfzMpvE2ACjQDVg5DJ0aH0J2zW6997156GGUnfBGyzB6FTofhkWbpV_7Bu29JowwUighdRuG7hFGGVal10WDZkaAR0q5fSU8aYcQP-kNuV3T0US7E12F6X9MTUxNtdZ2XcpNcfdMTXdkanKZ4MDCETm4TDu_9kSJn644ngE9r1jgcCdTU5OtvyrGiKUfmBHb4TD-vtGfFL2t-gkAAP__l9h8dA) taken by the _Artemis II_ crew, showing the full planet with auroras visible over both poles, captioned "Hello, World." In a [live interview Thursday night](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkc2umzAUhJ_G7Bz5DwILFleKUDe3u7ZLZOxjOKnxQbYTlLevklfo-hvNaGb-fM_fFiOm9afdYayB5gRniVAr5DngulXId6iezgS-5sd-lHLQrITquDBcmNlbjK_ZNH4MAAp0A6O8Xls19EK2zTZCd-2F9UOvg3WtUT0s1qp2WXTvLUjZ4Ph2E0YYKZSQ-hKubR8GGZzSbtGgmRHgsVK-3AlT3SDEFz0hXxztTRy3Wo_C9BdTE1PTeZ6XvaQ3Y2qCxB-FqeldiqmpgtsSRVpfTE02V9ixcETuMpzcQ3EZFyg8YgBuF7LZc8pIiZfDOnDZhsop8Q1LpYyO3-mRE7x4JV434DtR4jZ5vlj395PAv76U0N3vH0xP5NAzfdsL-DXVg6nucEzffrVaMtW554d2gwvg--C1DgaC7hffSutFaKV30ryVgEzf9NDk0R8nxoiluzIj1t1i_ExS_-vH56j-BQAA__-w-bIp), the four astronauts described life aboard the Orion capsule, including sleeping in zero gravity and their awe at leaving Earth's orbit for the first time in over 50 years. Commander Reid Wiseman said the view of Earth from pole to pole, with the Northern Lights visible, left all four crew members stunned. Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen said the crew was "glued to the window." The mission, which launched Wednesday from Kennedy Space Center, will carry the crew around the far side of the moon on Monday, testing systems for future long-duration lunar stays.
## Men's Final Four Tips Off Tonight
The 2026 Final Four tips off tonight in Indianapolis, where No. 2 UConn faces No. 3 Illinois, followed by No. 1 Arizona vs. No. 1 Michigan at Lucas Oil Stadium. The Huskies will face an Illinois team led by freshman Keaton Wagler, who scored 25 in the Elite Eight to send the Illini to their first Final Four since 2005. U.S. Special Forces located and rescued one of the two crew members on Iranian soil. involving helicopters and a C-130 aircraft was underway for the second aviator. Iranian state television urged civilians to help capture the pilots and offered a bounty for capturing them alive. Israel canceled planned strikes in Iran to avoid interfering with the rescue effort. The fighter jet downed over Iran would be On March 1, three F-15Es were shot down over Kuwait in an apparent friendly fire incident. All six crew members involved in that incident ejected and were safely recovered. NASA Shows 1st Photos of Earth from Artemis II NASA on Friday released the taken by the Artemis II crew, showing the full planet with auroras visible over both poles, captioned "Hello, World." In a , the four astronauts described life aboard the Orion capsule, including sleeping in zero gravity and their awe at leaving Earth's orbit for the first time in over 50 years. Commander Reid Wiseman said the view of Earth from pole to pole, with the Northern Lights visible, left all four crew members stunned. Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen said the crew was "glued to the window." The mission, which launched Wednesday from Kennedy Space Center, will carry the crew around the far side of the moon on Monday, testing systems for future long-duration lunar stays. name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Help Us Build a Conservative Senate

body:
The Senate is a big problem. The Democrats want to destroy our country, and far too many Republicans are unwilling to do anything about it.

| | | | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: The Senate is a big problem. The Democrats want to destroy our country, and far too many Republicans are unwilling to do anything about it. That's why we must unite to support strong Senate candidates in the midterm elections. Not the candidates hand-picked by the Washington machine. We need fighters — proven by their records, battle-tested, and ready to take on the establishment. The Senate Conservatives Fund has endorsed a strong group of them, and we need your help to get them across the finish line. Here's who's in the fight:
---
|
---
---
# Nate Morris

---
# U.S. Senate | Kentucky

---
# May 19 (Primary)

---
Mitch McConnell's seat is finally open, and Nate Morris is making sure another establishment Republican doesn't fill it. He built a $700 million company from a $10,000 line of credit, and he's running on mass deportation, a full immigration moratorium, and zero tolerance for career politicians. The primary is on May 19. This race is winnable — and your support can deliver the knockout blow to McConnell's failed legacy.
---
|
---
---
# Barry Moore
---
# U.S. Senate | Alabama

---
# May 19 (Primary)

---
Congressman Barry Moore was the first elected official in America to endorse Donald Trump — at the 2015 Mobile rally, before anyone believed Trump could win. He carries a 98% Heritage Action score, Trump's full endorsement, and a lifetime of fighting for conservative values. He currently leads the primary field by 6 points, but with 47% of voters still undecided, money matters.
---
|
---
---
# Kevin Hern
---
# U.S. Senate | Oklahoma

---
# June 16 (Primary)
---
A McDonald's franchisee who built a business empire, Congressman Kevin Hern chaired the Republican Study Committee and carries a 95% Heritage Action score. Trump endorsed him two days after he launched — along with SCF heroes like Senators Ron Johnson (R-WI) and Rick Scott (R-FL). If Hern wins, he will be one of the strongest America First voices in the Senate.
---
|
---
---
# Harriet Hageman
---
# U.S. Senate | Wyoming

---
# August 18 (Primary)
---
Congresswoman Harriet Hageman crushed RINO Liz Cheney 66-29%. Now she's bringing that same fight to the Senate. A fourth-generation Wyoming rancher with 34 years of battling federal overreach, Hageman has a 98% Heritage Action score and Trump's endorsement from day one. ## Big Bend Border Wall Put on Hold
The Trump administration appears to have shifted plans for a [border wall](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOnDAQBOCngW5PxjYGChdp6P60KdHa3gNLBhN7-e_u7SOSR0g90mi--fW1fGFM8Vh_4k6W38-8HPSqiZipLC6ujo7gcglUXpiSx_3cP5UXKaQBoUHoJWBMn0W3wToRpq4l2w1Dr4QwSrWbdWqYfK_H8Wn6bvKDUUKNfujdSEF36Nto7zKhhe46oXr5EGrE3iihzRQGM4VGCwqRc3nwRkxvrM_0yd9UHj7vbbIb81kb9aORcyNn7ypeleNxp42cb04j55Q9pkbOCP80cHOAt5KvdQMXV7ilgOdJWCpwBkeQD9hyCoBPpgL5Yl8-4C6G3xdVjvmoUGjHeLTFhvMVU4rVDI0W644x_Z3H_3fqt5V_AgAA___ORo4h) running through Texas’ Big Bend National Park after a widespread outcry from both political parties against the proposal. A map on the U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) website no longer includes a planned wall through the park. Instead, it indicates plans for a “[virtual wall](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OpDAQBeDTmMyo_N8EDjYh6003ROW2AUs2RsbbNLcfMXOEyUoq6T19799zemJMcVv-Yg62feYybeE8Umgt1MnFxYXNu1J9qCem9MK85-toEweuKUgKcvIY0zXJzlsHfmBdsMwYJQC0EN1q0Xmlkc1hMFo5KbQxTvjhwdXs2QNZF-0dBhIkYyAU70E8UGkBUg_e6METCcHHVmrf1tDCB485XeUdav8quUt2bW0_iPhD-Ej4eJ5nf-Fayv0lfLw5hI9YW3ylcJ-t_s87_UHRW0X3hNtBXVwo08JwGJTq15ZTV63fz5hSPLQhEpaMMX23tt9t9bb8KwAA___hm316)” that could notify officials of illegal border crossings in the area. No official announcement on the border wall has come from the Trump administration, and the CBP map has changed legends multiple times in recent weeks, leaving lingering questions on the proposed 150-mile project. Meanwhile, Big Bend canceled its highly anticipated project to tear down and rebuild the [Chisos Mountains Lodge](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAQhJ8GMlD7hx8HDi6ZbC69ELXtBnxqMDLWMPP2K1b7Bpt9qpJKVfXvOT0xctyXv7iRLe85TTtdJ1MplCcXF0d7cCkHyhcye9yO7XOWSYLsG9AN6Clg5M-k62AdBCNqsmIYOgXQK1Wv1o2ip1khGomEQno0wRmQs6MROufqaO8w0KCFANXJFtSIXa9A9yYMvQmVBgqxpNyWlQq98Zz5k16UW5-2mu1aynFW6k8lH5V8XNfV-jWn_XYr-eA40y1HDj-IuUTPN7m4NPfAhlNYqDly-k--NB53T8wUGinF2Clh2mM96mzDcUXmePZDpWHZMPJ3hfK7415WfgUAAP__IFCCtA), one of its most iconic visitor hubs, citing funding issues. There's no indication that the decision is linked to the border wall proposal.
## Camp Mystic Files To Reopen for Summer Camp
Camp Mystic officially applied to operate summer camp this week, planning a [partial reopening](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3znCAQhz8NdjgrIEhBkcbunzalg-x6MkFxkJx33z7jJUX6lL99eWaf_fE1ffmY4v747jdy9bXkaafrTFQrlWmOj5l2nHNBKpdPKfjt2N5nnQQIzUFxUBP6mN6TatDNgLZryHXG9BJAS9msTgaPZglgICjo1TwsvhtIEgWrrSHTRHfDQIHqOpC9aEEOvtcSlLZotEWmgDDWXNq6UqWXP5f0zk8qbchbk9xa63Ey-Y2JkYnxuq7255p_3U0mRl9qDImYGG8vJsaz-nrHD4j_Lf4JS8oZmRhvS35rxsAL5YN2nmKg_ST-z-C9J4aeIyAKj4Hbflm4UlbzwXTA-xkHKbUNxs9NcXhcMaV4asMUPDYf0-f8-n9PfzrxOwAA___3JZVm) after last year's deadly floods took the lives of 25 campers, two counselors, and the camp's director. Families of victims are [back in court](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ8Guj0ttoGjcJGG7k-bEi32crf6jY1s5zjePrrkEdLOSKP5vl9fyxdJkPj4STvb-t7SEvksgWvlvKzyWDn6NWXP-aQQHO3HfpW6KFQDoAE0iycJ12Jab1f0U9ey7cax14iD1u3T3s2q0K1TT73rCHs1UqcN6_swmU57bMV-xtCg6TrUvbqhvlM_aDTD5Mdh8o1B9lJTvtUnV35T2cKVXpxvLu1tsM9aj9LoH42aGzWf53n7flP8lI2aJXo-OHqOjsHTBVtIyZdGzRvtEi5I278IXuKq7LCS-waJ4NLvXIEKfJjhAy0O6DiCcIEtZSiVKkMQx7Ew1ASZ08GxUXObrT9OCUHKMDYGHztJ-Hu2_p_il1V_AgAA__-MqZLe) after the filing, seeking to block the reopening as one camper's body, 8-year-old Cile Steward, has yet to be recovered. The Stewards' attorney has stated that _" in their rush to reopen, Camp Mystic is offering up fun playtime in the waters that may hold Cile Steward."_ Camp Mystic would offer summer camp at its Cypress Lake site in compliance with all new state [camp safety laws](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQhZ8Gd0RjIPZ1QbGNu7vtlhY_kxgJDILxTfz2K_IKt5lmjo6-7_z73r5NiOF4_jUJNb0feTvw1SISYd1seFo8vM3VY32ZGJ1JJV2NNgFi4qA4qM2bEK9NDV5b8Ms4oB7n-S4BJimHXeP0EGDBggBxx1EpVItfULkvh36xcgi6l4ECNY4g7-IG8svcJwlqWvw8LZ4pQB8o1xvtSPg27RGv_IP15nIaot6JSmPyDxMrE2sr6KieKWZnYnfpKSZWevdnPmnnnw6OkRfTMhNrTzGxdgwmVlD9SCbWbsu7bnC8nTYFatyUEoMzFPLBKfOKueDBTQqeN1dPCsc1VO3LK8QY2jQzBc9kQvyw0u8W_tHifwAAAP__oaCRZQ), according to the camp's attorneys. Cypress Lake is a short distance from the Guadalupe site where the fatalities took place last summer.
## Paxton No Longer Has To Represent Comptroller
A federal judge has allowed Attorney General Ken Paxton to [excuse his office](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGypCAQRb8Gs7YQUcfAYBOzt-mGFkKr7EOgmp5x5u-3fL-wyc3uqXvq_vlavowPPu6_zYkTv7e0RLxKQGakZfX7itGtiRzSZUKw5sznp_CipOpBapB6ccaHz6IrN63SjU2FUzMMXStl37bVMUnVPQaU2Pa6eXRb343j6B561QbVIEdb-emGSS1108i2U7VsH6brW6n70Q396ISW6DwnqvlAxrcpW_ikF1Jt01mF6WDORbS_hJqFmvdzh-9MFjIlV1sXa0M2P9fgy-HjfneEmm9JoeYfmlDzvUCoWeo7lFDz36fbEUwI6SpgmBNF_MCOEckE-MYI2bw5ReAEl-fDkblgo3QCYSYsGNnHHWw6M1MKAalA2jZvEXyEV3raAwmsKSjUXNHk8uVD8KUfhJb7aXz4keP_u-Q1qX8BAAD__zG1ouU) from representing acting Comptroller Kelly Hancock in a discrimination lawsuit amid fallout between the two Republicans. Judge Alfred H. Bennett granted Paxton's request on condition the comptroller's office find a [new attorney](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAUAL9GOxxExLOgSGN3aVM6CA8lQXCe7-Tu7zOXX0i9Mzs7-3Wf7ybEkNZPs4Omp89zgnJGIAKcl7AukNyS0QEWE6M1-7G_TpoFF4pxybicnQnxNcva6YW7sa1Bt8PQd5yrrqs3rYabHHrwo3VmUe0iF2-883KQzt-4sHXQbxmXXLYt73rR8O5metVxqUY3qNFVkoMLlLGhDQie5vTxlS_Axua9jnojOs6q-6jEVImplNL8PPB6w0pM3w-3AjvMk3Ji1iRWAm0OTWEe884QDoQTEoW0Mpv3gzDHCMhCYld-2A2QWXNCJaYatTtKiDGcaqgkX3cT4l8C_W_cpcVvAAAA__-MBIWp), saying _" I do not want the comptroller to be unrepresented. Not one day."_ Hancock's office manages the new Texas education voucher program and has been sued for not allowing Islamic schools to participate. His feud with Paxton began last week when he sent a letter to the attorney general criticizing his strategy in the case. Paxton's request to withdraw from the case said that Hancock's _" petty politics ... single-handedly destroyed my ability to defend the Comptroller's office in these cases."_

Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Big Bend Border Wall Put on Hold The Trump administration appears to have shifted plans for a running through Texas’ Big Bend National Park after a widespread outcry from both political parties against the proposal. A map on the U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) website no longer includes a planned wall through the park. Instead, it indicates plans for a “” that could notify officials of illegal border crossings in the area. No official announcement on the border wall has come from the Trump administration, and the CBP map has changed legends multiple times in recent weeks, leaving lingering questions on the proposed 150-mile project. Meanwhile, Big Bend canceled its highly anticipated project to tear down and rebuild the , one of its most iconic visitor hubs, citing funding issues. There's no indication that the decision is linked to the border wall proposal. Camp Mystic Files To Reopen for Summer Camp Camp Mystic officially applied to operate summer camp this week, planning a after last year's deadly floods took the lives of 25 campers, two counselors, and the camp's director. Families of victims are after the filing, seeking to block the reopening as one camper's body, 8-year-old Cile Steward, has yet to be recovered. The Stewards' attorney has stated that " in their rush to reopen, Camp Mystic is offering up fun playtime in the waters that may hold Cile Steward." Camp Mystic would offer summer camp at its Cypress Lake site in compliance with all new state , according to the camp's attorneys. Cypress Lake is a short distance from the Guadalupe site where the fatalities took place last summer. Paxton No Longer Has To Represent Comptroller A federal judge has allowed Attorney General Ken Paxton to from representing acting Comptroller Kelly Hancock in a discrimination lawsuit amid fallout between the two Republicans. Judge Alfred H. Bennett granted Paxton's request on condition the comptroller's office find a , saying " I do not want the comptroller to be unrepresented. Not one day." Hancock's office manages the new Texas education voucher program and has been sued for not allowing Islamic schools to participate. His feud with Paxton began last week when he sent a letter to the attorney general criticizing his strategy in the case. Paxton's request to withdraw from the case said that Hancock's " petty politics ... single-handedly destroyed my ability to defend the Comptroller's office in these cases." | Flying together with our sponsor Car insurance isn 't exactly getting cheaper right now. In a nod to the “tax the rich” narrative, Democrats plan to extract the needed funds by capitalizing on [...] The post Massachusetts Democrats Redistribute Wealth To Fund Attorneys For Illegal Immigrants () appeared first on The Maine Wire () . We need to raise $7,000 in the next 72 hours to stay on track. | | | **[CLICK HERE TO LEARN MORE ABOUT KEVIN FORD JR](https://z6h1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=69d0faf088faad49bec530fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfordjr.com%2Fmeetkford%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D69d04e45774292555f6a632d%26ss_email_id%3D69d0faf088faad49bec530fb%26ss_campaign_name%3DThis%2Bis%2Bhow%2Bwe%2Bwin%2Ba%2Bhead-to-head%2Brace%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2026-04-04T11%253A50%253A15Z&w=67e59626f08d7b1924bf5048&c=b_69d04e45774292555f6a632d&l=en-US&s=9du7IFYkequsXMgige4xIl94bX4%3D)**

#### Kevin Ford here — I wanted to catch you before you start your Saturday.
#### We’ve set a [**$35,000 goal for April**](https://z6h1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=69d0faf088faad49bec530fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fkfordweb&w=67e59626f08d7b1924bf5048&c=b_69d04e45774292555f6a632d&l=en-US&s=I54FRnqpcyZS4Xsg8N0LdBRgn00%3D). How we start this month will determine whether we win this race.
#### [**Our polling shows we’re in position to win this race—but only if we have the resources to get our message out. The next 72 hours will set the pace for everything that follows, and we need to raise $7,000 to set the tone for the entire month.**](https://z6h1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=69d0faf088faad49bec530fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fkfordweb&w=67e59626f08d7b1924bf5048&c=b_69d04e45774292555f6a632d&l=en-US&s=I54FRnqpcyZS4Xsg8N0LdBRgn00%3D)
#### **That early push allows us to:**
1. #### **Launch our April canvassing program**
2. #### **Reach voters sooner, not later**
3. #### **Win a head-to-head race**

#### If we fall behind now, we spend the rest of the month trying to catch up instead of building real momentum.
#### 👉🏾 [**Can you chip in $25, $250, or whatever you can today to help us hit this month’s first benchmark?**](https://z6h1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=69d0faf088faad49bec530fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fkfordweb&w=67e59626f08d7b1924bf5048&c=b_69d04e45774292555f6a632d&l=en-US&s=I54FRnqpcyZS4Xsg8N0LdBRgn00%3D)
---

---|---|---
#### Let’s set the tone the right way.
#### With gratitude,
#### Kevin Ford, Jr. for State Senate
Maryland’s 24th Legislative District
#### [**P.S. I’m doing my part every day on the ground—can I count on you to step up with a contribution today?**](https://z6h1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=69d0faf088faad49bec530fb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fkfordweb&w=67e59626f08d7b1924bf5048&c=b_69d04e45774292555f6a632d&l=en-US&s=I54FRnqpcyZS4Xsg8N0LdBRgn00%3D)

Non-Contribution Account (For TPPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TPPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. name: Roy Cooper
subject: 5,000 signatures (including yours?)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roy Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Before politics, before party and before power, I will always put the people of North Carolina first.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=936%2E124072%2E7KRRkE)
| | | |
---
Peter – over the past few weeks, I’ve been out on the road meeting with North Carolinians directly on the Make Stuff Cost Less tour. They tell me versions of the same thing:
⛽ Gas prices are spiking, and it’s costing more to put food on the table.

🩺 They can’t keep up with skyrocketing health insurance costs and get the care they need.

🇺🇲 They’re fed up with the chaos in Washington DC, and they’re worried about the future of our country.
I know we can do better. That’s why I’m in this fight.

**Before politics, before party and before power, I will always put the people of North Carolina first – as I’ve done my entire career in public service. As Governor:**
✅ I expanded Medicaid for hundreds of thousands of working North Carolinians.

✅ I created hundreds of thousands of good-paying jobs.

✅ I increased teacher pay and expanded paid parental leave.
**Now, I’m ready to fight in the Senate for working families – but getting there won’t be easy. The GOP is going all in to defeat me, and I need to know that folks like you are in my corner.**
**[Will you add your name now to personally endorse my campaign for U.S. Senate? I’m looking for 5,000 signatures before midnight, and I’m hoping I can count on you. It would really mean a lot.](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/endorse-cooper-2026-email-v2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=jtk245-su-nd&t=8&akid=936%2E124072%2E7KRRkE)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/endorse-cooper-2026-email-v2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&source=jtk245-su-nd&t=9&akid=936%2E124072%2E7KRRkE)
---
Thank you,

Roy Cooper
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=936%2E124072%2E7KRRkE)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=936%2E124072%2E7KRRkE)_**

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: The Southern Resurgence - What the Numbers Tell Us
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msmomentum-12852721?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**Something significant is happening in America's South, and it deserves more attention.**

While New York and California are losing residents, states like South Carolina and Alabama are gaining population at a record pace - and alongside that growth, it is southern states like ours that are generating some of the most impressive economic numbers in the country.

**A recent JL Partners poll found that 36 percent of Americans now expect the South to lead economic growth over the next decade.** That puts it well ahead of the West Coast (23 percent), the Northeast (21 percent), and the Midwest (19 percent). Young graduates are even more bullish: nearly four in ten name the South as the region most likely to grow fastest in the coming decade.

**The data backs up the optimism.**

Real GDP growth in 2024 tells the story clearly. Mississippi and South Carolina grew at 4.2 percent. Alabama and Arkansas at 3.8 percent. Tennessee at 3.0 percent. All surpassed the national rate of 2.8 percent. **Between 2020 and 2024, 78 percent of all U.S. jobs added to the economy were located in the South.** The region's population has grown by seven million since 2020 — and the pace appears to be accelerating.

Manufacturing is a key part of the picture. U.S. industrial output has roughly doubled since the Reagan era, and much of that expansion went South rather than overseas. Alabama alone has added over 50,000 auto jobs since 2000. **Combined, Alabama and Mississippi now produce more vehicles annually than Italy or the United Kingdom.**

Finance is following manufacturing. Charlotte, Dallas, Miami, and Nashville have become major financial hubs. JPMorgan Chase now employs more people in Texas - around 31,000 - than in New York.

Even higher education is shifting.**SEC universities have seen a 91 percent surge in out-of-state undergraduate applications between 2014 and 2023,** with many of those students coming from the Northeast.

**What explains it?**

The answer is policy. **Southern states like Mississippi have built environments that are straightforwardly more attractive for businesses and workers alike.**

**Taxes are lower.** Several southern states have no income tax — Texas, Florida, and Tennessee among them - while Mississippi and South Carolina are on a path to eliminating theirs entirely.

**Regulatory burdens are lighter:** South Carolina recently repealed a range of Certificate of Need rules that had constrained its healthcare economy, a stark contrast to California's expanding compliance requirements.

**Labor markets are more flexible,** with most southern states operating as right-to-work states. Occupational licensing restrictions are being reduced, making it easier for people to enter the workforce. And electricity costs are significantly lower, in part because the South never adopted the rigid renewable mandates that have driven up prices in the Northeast and California.

This is, in many ways, a natural experiment in governance. Fifty states, trying different approaches side by side - and some are producing markedly better results than others. **The South appears to have found a formula that works.**

None of these policy wins happened by accident. They were the result of years of sustained advocacy - and you have been a vital part of that. Your support has helped make the case for lower taxes, lighter regulation, and greater economic freedom. The results speak for themselves.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e2c216a66b&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
With thanks for your continued support,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=3f20b00141) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=3f20b00141).

name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: Don Scott and L. Louise Lucas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
Virginia has a responsibility in this moment.
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260404-434&t=2&akid=434%2E12592%2E1ikwE7)
****
Two of Virginia’s top leaders just laid out what’s at stake in this election and why this moment matters so much. Their message is simple, but powerful:
_This is about thwarting Trump’s power grabs and protecting Virginians’ voting rights when they are under direct threat._
In a new op-ed, **Speaker Don Scott and Senator L. Louise Lucas** make it clear that Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are trying to tilt the playing field before the 2026 midterms by manipulating maps in states across the country.
[__](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260404_1.ktvWdY&amount=3&refcode=20260404-434&t=3&akid=434%2E12592%2E1ikwE7)
_“When leaders believe they may lose, they change the rules without citizens’ approval,”_ they wrote. _“It is Trump insulating himself from accountability.”_
Virginia has a choice, we can sit back while that happens, or we can act.
Early voting is already underway. Ballots are being cast every day. And Republicans are working just as hard to confuse voters and protect Trump’s power grab.
We can’t afford to fall behind.
[**Will you chip in $3, or whatever you can right now to help us reach more Virginians and win the YES vote?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260404_1.ktvWdY&amount=3&refcode=20260404-434&t=4&akid=434%2E12592%2E1ikwE7)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260404_1.ktvWdY&amount=3&refcode=20260404-434&t=23&akid=434%2E12592%2E1ikwE7)**
Early voting runs through April 18 and Election Day is April 21. Every single dollar we raise right now helps us reach voters, cut through misinformation, and make sure they know what’s at stake.
So please:
[**Can you make a donation today to help us meet this moment and ensure Virginia voters have the final say?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260404_1.ktvWdY&amount=3&refcode=20260404-434&t=24&akid=434%2E12592%2E1ikwE7)
Onwards,
Virginians For Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=25&refcode2=434_12592_1ikwE7&akid=434%2E12592%2E1ikwE7)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

name: Jose Javier Rodriguez
subject: Floridians are drowning in costs. Our AG is worried about the NFL.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ, DEMOCRAT, FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
This is not a joke. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128747110/612241426/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_NFL_040426&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmExYjg5MzAtMjYzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9CNt0Q24yNztfhRuqpudN1f9QNqr_5IC0EF4lQLDIJQ=&emci=75826dca-a02f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=ba1b8930-2630-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=32374386)
---
Peter — While Floridians get slammed with skyrocketing utility bills, insurance premiums that are some of the highest in America, and a cost of living that never seems to stop climbing — _our Attorney General has decided his priority is picking a fight with the NFL._ James Uthmeier is going after the Rooney Rule, a two-decade-old policy that simply requires NFL teams to interview minority candidates for head coaching and executive positions. He wants it eliminated. So let's keep score: No action on your electric bill. No action on insurance costs. No action on the corruption he's personally implicated in. But he found time to write a letter to the NFL commissioner threatening civil rights enforcement action over job interviews. This is pure political theater and a culture war distraction designed to get attention in Washington while Florida families pay the price. **[As your next Attorney General, I'll be focused on the issues that actually affect your life: fighting corruption, lowering costs, and standing up for working families. Not manufacturing controversies for cable news. clean_body: This is not a joke. | Peter — While Floridians get slammed with skyrocketing utility bills, insurance premiums that are some of the highest in America, and a cost of living that never seems to stop climbing — our Attorney General has decided his priority is picking a fight with the NFL. James Uthmeier is going after the Rooney Rule, a two-decade-old policy that simply requires NFL teams to interview minority candidates for head coaching and executive positions. He wants it eliminated. So let's keep score: No action on your electric bill. No action on insurance costs. No action on the corruption he's personally implicated in. But he found time to write a letter to the NFL commissioner threatening civil rights enforcement action over job interviews. This is pure political theater and a culture war distraction designed to get attention in Washington while Florida families pay the price. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Onward, Jose Javier Rodriguez = | = = POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ, DEMOCRAT, FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. body:
#

Hey Peter,
Before you close this email... we’re asking you to take a second and hear us out, then [**chip in $25 to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260404-1-subs-b&t=1&akid=2011%2E5691347%2EnMvDGv)
**$25** because Jon is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state Trump won, and beating him is the GOP’s top priority in the midterms.
**$25** because between Jon’s opponents and right-wing Super PACs, we’re already being pummeled by more than $11 million in spending, with months to go until Election Day. **We need your help to fight back.**
**$25** because we are witnessing the most corrupt administration in the history of the Republic, and they’d love nothing more than to replace Jon (a relentless anti-corruption fighter) with a MAGA loyalist.
**$25** because **we have to win in a landslide.** Trump is threatening to “take over” our elections, and our best insurance is an overwhelming margin of victory.
**$25** because there is no path to taking back the Senate majority and finally holding Trump and his administration accountable without winning Georgia.
It’s the whole ballgame, Peter. And Jon can’t do it alone. _Nobody can_. So we’re reaching out today in the hopes that you understand what’s at stake in this race, and the impact your $25 can have.
[**Please, chip in $25 or whatever amount feels right directly to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign here in Georgia. We wouldn’t ask if it couldn’t make a real difference, Peter.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260404-1-subs-b&t=2&akid=2011%2E5691347%2EnMvDGv)

****
Thank you!
Team Ossoff

name: Save the Persecuted Christians
subject: A brutal new wave of slaughter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save the Persecuted Christians
body:
Don't let Easter pass without reading this | | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bfa8a5903c844c479d6ba1d378bcb003&_e=sfCoR4n27YzcPGjehJpKPsOsQRGbrrltidZgKnAKbZNPhOr4Zen4tMGt39myW9QyJEGvlk224T1FPOk4rd0dIE_jf9Vo4Q6zuqqzn3pR7KPh4aQQmn7uhvfDe7thXaVQcUQ1dd8SaO3oZeK6kFPwbEoNUhYaaX2yKQqGoXvKomxPMFUgxw71q5UVtcM0pxpeqlg4IBOvgvH8QcxQiyXvMyMoMAuuz1Vl5_qZxccduTc0v9FZJ5YJge3Ah0xTF2yKgt_u0vT8ql46wa95sTA83AaUCN12HIBXrNkazc0fSWNw72yFK4nivRWxmWxJRM-5OG6t6IylsSvqYl_77gi8-_9DVvXN5jZv64AnOvBg1d_JbXUszzlluHUFTZqqAF-jjq7DjUHrXi_xPBbOOcHuYDCZHXUd3t80Nu4yasY3jpL3vq0aVVJehM4O2_pL8YLvDCvsHfUi2uIpBeVWndgxjUsDtmiqy0fISMuGh3Thx7oKMjKAp1V_LXxatBJxSC-SeNH-VrdF22hwC_XWh49e8bKqqG7Ntx5b2a5Y17CRZd-Yo3__u2WkTXgSzVF9wnBfBEJgI1yMY-8ENagGP51LWBjAWn7IaFX3s9SeobDBwXaBCZ8m7b3OhdwDXw8vLPhdQ0X4kT8O--LoaDAgQuLJFqNh7Ds7mZnjCxNyimynRyM%3D)
---
Peter, This Easter, as we rejoice that He is risen, our brothers and sisters in Christ in Nigeria are weeping over fresh graves and tending to the wounded from a brutal new wave of jihadist slaughter. **Just days ago, during Palm Sunday week, terrorists unleashed horror after horror on defenseless Christian communities.** Gunmen stormed neighborhoods, opening fire on families gathered after worship — slaughtering dozens in the streets. **At least 28 believers cut down in one community alone.** That same night, attackers raided a Christian wedding celebration, **mowing down 13 guests and dragging others into the darkness.** Across multiple attacks this week, **nearly 100 precious souls were killed** — fathers, mothers, young believers, entire families wiped out _simply for loving Jesus._ The volume of this evil is staggering. One massacre after another. Blood in the streets. Widows left sobbing. Children orphaned overnight. Survivors maimed for life, crying out in agony while far too many across the world look away. **Easter is one of the most dangerous times of the year for persecuted Christians around the globe.** When the Church gathers visibly to proclaim the risen Savior — singing, worshiping, remembering the cross — the enemy strikes with fury. Year after year, hundreds die in Easter attacks. **This Palm Sunday massacre is a heartbreaking reminder that for millions, Holy Week means terror, not triumph.** Yet amid the bloodshed, they still refuse to deny Christ. Their unshakeable faith in the empty tomb humbles and convicts us. **Here at Save the Persecuted Christians, the cries of these suffering saints demand our immediate response. We ended Q1 short of our goal, and the needs are exploding — more widows, more orphans, more displaced families facing starvation and fear.**
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bfa8a5903c844c479d6ba1d378bcb003&_e=sfCoR4n27YzcPGjehJpKPsOsQRGbrrltidZgKnAKbZNPhOr4Zen4tMGt39myW9QyJEGvlk224T1FPOk4rd0dIE_jf9Vo4Q6zuqqzn3pR7KPh4aQQmn7uhvfDe7thXaVQcUQ1dd8SaO3oZeK6kFPwbEoNUhYaaX2yKQqGoXvKomxPMFUgxw71q5UVtcM0pxpeqlg4IBOvgvH8QcxQiyXvMyMoMAuuz1Vl5_qZxccduTdgZVecFoVzRR0MEtXsqUSpptgCQQMqylq1bC6FcX2X0Ui_miWcdWfF_E-5DtB3WGRR-m6ZnLkYBUwQuq9tKfzrsUVj5_M_9v4ywBHkf5rZTYIwnI8hLf65oSPY-Vepp6YVXJyTidooznagXZiz2p2PWnYfIC-UWNwMaFBHfFVdCzGzse_CQf5j880_Y6FnbxwJYJibNh8umCaIvZUZOROi9IXGVf4s1CkCknmY5D0VE-6iMqR6ZYqWskFOVs0zD05fT7kimx7yACnYGvLqLQhaxFmyMKdcvYekhP6h7VdqbRdRnP8GGjrxm7kXlnjSDq0xbc11os1O6zywL2aK9NwTNDI8XhqavUd348nGRnEUDfGeMbt4ZqFjCx9p_msumnGM5-9KB7o9-B9bz3dexhyQ2r4b2M2nirnWFw8rbpQWTd9HTRs8zC00hVQd2eV51e8%3D)
---
These precious believers desperately need our prayers. But beyond that they need a loud, persistent voice raised on their behalf — exposing the evil to the world, rallying the global Church to stand with them, and pressing leaders in D.C. and abroad to take real action that stops the slaughter and protects the vulnerable.

**[Your gift today will fuel our advocacy, amplify their stories, open doors with policymakers, and send a powerful message to the persecuted: You are seen. You are not alone. The risen Christ stands with you — and so do we.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bfa8a5903c844c479d6ba1d378bcb003&_e=sfCoR4n27YzcPGjehJpKPsOsQRGbrrltidZgKnAKbZNPhOr4Zen4tMGt39myW9QyJEGvlk224T1FPOk4rd0dIE_jf9Vo4Q6zuqqzn3pR7KPh4aQQmn7uhvfDe7thXaVQcUQ1dd8SaO3oZeK6kFPwbEoNUhYaaX2yKQqGoXvKomxPMFUgxw71q5UVtcM0pxpeqlg4IBOvgvH8QcxQiyXvMyMoMAuuz1Vl5_qZxccduTe08kvkk0Z3aZYK95FgJUCmSxZID8aDXOpQh0c3w-ItX42pShpCPKMvrQSvXk4ChniAUue6JtX9eAL9TCve5YBe3XQN4Mo2JVH8a40ujr_Mee5OicdMtNUc6iP6y5jT1q5iplevcx9ZBn0zeGP6a_gwNP9-aFqqpivROf1RsUzoXufmmXWgcoFQ616xyyg0MxCzNA6o0EgdB0miO0i1rmsY-cFhuGSv5NF32kxec-AMoiLNbxZ24ygLDGSoLcqREuaFbz3anAP2mFw3XURM2M42qJtrWRQJIYk6jUBadHh5i3lntVHATkv7TEQKp_uiAbtPgPgMwdxlESgnWEr_gtDbmwhkLfpbMwYhH7YnN9ORtXTfr7f7CcNeVYhI9Jrx6ZMqVihenQcNAxRsQm2F0enBCUVdZ0puedxbx2ZTzb9mffNS1bYr2W5ed7RPy-nPLnw%3D)**

_Will you act now?_ Every hour we hesitate, more blood may be shed. More families shattered. Your generosity right now declares: The risen Christ has overcome the grave — and we will not abandon His suffering Church.

He is risen. Let’s act like it — urgently, sacrificially, with hearts fully engaged.

In faith and urgent prayer, Dede Laugesen
President & CEO
Save the Persecuted Christians
---

[SAVE CHRISTIANS](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bfa8a5903c844c479d6ba1d378bcb003&_e=sfCoR4n27YzcPGjehJpKPsOsQRGbrrltidZgKnAKbZNPhOr4Zen4tMGt39myW9QyJEGvlk224T1FPOk4rd0dIE_jf9Vo4Q6zuqqzn3pR7KPh4aQQmn7uhvfDe7thXaVQcUQ1dd8SaO3oZeK6kFPwbEoNUhYaaX2yKQqGoXvKomxPMFUgxw71q5UVtcM0pxpeqlg4IBOvgvH8QcxQiyXvMyMoMAuuz1Vl5_qZxccduTcJEyhP9ccIuEIJenRD-wxPvne9q_i2EGZgvilXd5LlRe3LEFdHq2IP8o0sANKSsy8wcmzEtzkVuAFNJHq7JISULIPm2AKayqAPGqnx4XistIKjV3TpRtE5oQh06IDPmrFZdGtzXCih-dp_rD4T84-64nbVhRtiFS-XDAIxxGJ-9z6v5oiAzx0WEABcZrxbgPvyrkBVnTZp9pP_bUZZ18JBmwDZ6QUbmvUCm5DDurc26_860oAZjIqFQIGr-Slmbu-cPNji2am3kr5RqNKXE_HHWYkh4eSB111NwZBKS_wDqURCCE4rG30h9H9RUNzO02lXWtEAhbQ3lRTOMasp2b62oNQElK_fZ1dc9MuCibz7_dIpcfWyP0fGpl4Ekp4Mfqa8NX06hrh9ntR10Y5SOlSER0CtSDkniD2rOcVmSyiyBfLQplJ5xTru4MlmuNDKcsI%3D)

name: GIFFORDS.org
subject: Tim Walz announced…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Folks,
Big news: Governor Tim Walz announced that he is calling for a ban on assault rifles in Minnesota.
[](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ban_assualt_weapons_q22026/?source=em264304-1-b&refcode2=11360.3935704.f93eHz&akid=11360%2E3935704%2Ef93eHz)
**If you agree that it’s time to get weapons of war off of our streets, then please add your name to our petition today.**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ban_assualt_weapons_q22026/?source=em264304-1-b&refcode2=11360.3935704.f93eHz&akid=11360%2E3935704%2Ef93eHz)**
Minnesota has been at the heart of our battle with gun violence.
In June, Minnesota House Speaker Melissa Hortman was shot and assassinated in an act of politically motivated violence.
Just two months later, a shooter opened fire at Annunciation Catholic Church — killing two kids and wounding more than 20 other people.
Enough is enough.
Right now, it is appallingly easy for dangerous people to get their hands on guns. Our leaders must strengthen our nation’s gun laws to prevent more communities from experiencing similar tragedy and devastation.
[**Please add your name alongside Governor Tim Walz: It’s time to take action and get assault rifles off of our streets >>**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ban_assualt_weapons_q22026?source=em264304-1-b&refcode2=11360.3935704.f93eHz&akid=11360%2E3935704%2Ef93eHz)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ban_assualt_weapons_q22026/?source=em264304-1-b&refcode2=11360.3935704.f93eHz&akid=11360%2E3935704%2Ef93eHz)**
Thank you,
GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=11360%2E3935704%2Ef93eHz) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Scott Presler
subject: I stopped waiting on Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC
body:
Congress debates. We register voters. Here's why that matters more.
| Peter, I'll be honest with you. I've been watching the debate over the SAVE America Act in Washington — and while I'm cheering for it to pass, I've been in this fight long enough to know something most people won't say: **We cannot afford to wait on Washington to save our elections.** While politicians debate, the Democrat ground game does not stop. Their voter registration staffers are at their tables right now. Their ballot chasers are making their calls. Their door knockers are hitting their lists. _And if we are not doing the same thing — right now — we are falling behind._ **I know this because I've lived it.** In 2024, my team spent over a year embedded on the ground in Pennsylvania before Election Day. We helped register hundreds of thousands of new Republican voters. We chased down every outstanding mail-in ballot we legally could. We drove voters to the polls on Election Day. **That is why Pennsylvania went red.** Not because of any law. Not because of any court ruling. Because of boots on the ground, day after day, doing the unglamorous, exhausting, absolutely essential work of grassroots organizing.

clean_body: Congress debates. We register voters. Here's why that matters more. | Peter, I'll be honest with you. I've been watching the debate over the SAVE America Act in Washington — and while I'm cheering for it to pass, I've been in this fight long enough to know something most people won't say: We cannot afford to wait on Washington to save our elections. While politicians debate, the Democrat ground game does not stop. Their voter registration staffers are at their tables right now. Their ballot chasers are making their calls. Their door knockers are hitting their lists. And if we are not doing the same thing — right now — we are falling behind. I know this because I've lived it. In 2024, my team spent over a year embedded on the ground in Pennsylvania before Election Day. We helped register hundreds of thousands of new Republican voters. We chased down every outstanding mail-in ballot we legally could. We drove voters to the polls on Election Day. That is why Pennsylvania went red. Not because of any law. Not because of any court ruling. Because of boots on the ground, day after day, doing the unglamorous, exhausting, absolutely essential work of grassroots organizing. My team is on the ground in Pennsylvania and preparing for the 2026 midterm elections. We are registering new Republican voters every single day. We are building the infrastructure to chase ballots and knock doors at a scale we've never done before. But I need sponsors to keep my team in the field. Whatever you can do makes a real, direct, measurable difference in the number of Republican voters who are registered, mobilized, and ready to vote in 2026. The SAVE America Act debate will resolve itself one way or the other. What's not going to resolve itself is the Democrat ground game — unless we outwork them. I'm on the ground. I'm not stopping. I just need to know you're with me. In Liberty, Scott Presler Founder, Early Vote Action | | Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC 2465 Centreville Rd J17-714 Herndon, VA 20171

[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zHBQha6mLn3090jnD2s2p-wC8fF4FPs95Q0AptAS_9E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=193160535)
* * *
Secretary of War Pete Hegseth **[announced on Thursday](https://substack.com/redirect/01afcfb0-45d0-4298-b81f-83cebf2142ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he is ordering base commanders to loosen restrictions on service members' ability to conceal carry their personal firearms while on base. Normally, it is only military police who carry firearms in a non-training setting.
"Our rights as citizens are not granted to us by government, but instead, by God," Hegseth said in a video on X. "These warfighters entrusted with the safety of our nation are no less entitled to exercise their God-given right to keep and bear arms than any other American."
[| | | | | Secretary of War Pete Hegseth
---
@SecWar
Our military installations have been turned into gun-free zones--leaving our service members vulnerable and exposed. That ends today.
| 8:35 PM * Apr 2, 2026 * 11.1M Views13.3K Replies * 21.5K Reposts * 115K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/d4964420-fd81-491f-9844-f8d95d6c2aef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Pointing to terrorist attacks on military bases, which are sometimes the size of small to medium-sized cities, Hegseth explained it is only right to allow service members to be able to confront attackers when minutes count.
Hegseth said he signed a memo telling base commanders to accept requests from personnel to conceal carry while on post, "with the presumption that it is necessary for personal protection.
"If a request is for some reason denied, the reason for that denial will be in writing and will explain in detail the basis for that direction," the Secretary added. "Not enemies are foreign, nor are they all outside our borders. Some are domestic."

* * *
_**(Piece continues below)**_
U.S. Special Forces veteran Jim Hanson praised Hegseth's memo, drawing from his own experience when he was stationed at Fort Lewis in Washington.
"I had a WA state concealed carry permit. But I was supposed to leave my gun at home to go to 1st Special Forces Group where I was a Special Forces WEAPONS guy. It was absurd," Hanson said on X.
[| | | | | Jim Hanson
---
@JimHansonDC
While stationed at Ft. Lewis I had a WA state concealed carry permit But I was supposed to leave my gun at home to go to 1st Special Forces Group where I was a Special Forces WEAPONS guy It was absurd Good Call @SecWar , trust the troops
| | | | | Secretary of War Pete Hegseth @SecWar
---|---|---
Our military installations have been turned into gun-free zones--leaving our service members vulnerable and exposed. That ends today.
| 10:36 PM * Apr 2, 2026 * 99.4K Views67 Replies * 473 Reposts * 3.25K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/8f221ced-2a29-4808-902d-ecc953cac84c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The logic certainly follows that if troops are trusted and trained to carry actual weapons of war, which includes machine guns, grenades, and missile launchers, they can be trusted to carry their personal firearms while on base as well. As previously stated, some military bases are huge and it can take military police time someone might not have in a life or death situation.
Democrats and liberals have criticized Hegseth's new memo, saying it will only make installations more dangerous. The problem with that logic is the U.S. has heard these arguments before when concealed carry was being implemented across the country for regular citizens. There was never a spike in crime after conceal carry laws went into effect.
### **Help us beat and replace the mainstream media! Support PolitiBrawl by becoming a paid subscriber today:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zHBQha6mLn3090jnD2s2p-wC8fF4FPs95Q0AptAS_9E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=193160535)
Take Florida, which was one of the first to implement a shall-issue license system in the 1980s. After 2023, law-abiding Florida residents no longer need a license to conceal carry in the state. The fear-mongering of the state becoming one big O.K. corral never manifested. After the Florida First District Court of Appeal ruled the state's open carry law was unconstitutional in 2025, Florida has been an open carry state with the same results.
That said, I'll repeat what many service members have heard during weekend or holiday safety briefs from their leadership: Don't be the one that ruins it for everyone else.

That said, I'll repeat what many service members have heard during weekend or holiday safety briefs from their leadership: Don't be the one that ruins it for everyone else. Don 't Miss It! President Trump delivers Holy Week message to American christians * | A guest post by| reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media covering immigration, protests, and national flashpoints across the U.S. Subscribe for full podcast episodes, unfiltered interviews, and on-the-ground reporting you won't see on MSM. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

| | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | A broken woman. Alone. Ashamed. Cast out. She came to the well at noon, hoping no one would see her. But Jesus did see her. He didn’t shame her. He didn’t cancel her. She was stunned. Jesus said: That story hits me deep— because I was that woman. I’ve been told I wasn’t good enough. At 17, I dropped out of high school. My parents gave me two choices: Go back to school, or get a job. So I got to work...at Waffle House. Graveyard shifts. Spatula in hand. It was humbling. It was hard. But it wasn’t the end of my story. 25 years later, that high school dropout became the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, and the first Republican woman elected to Congress from South Carolina. And I didn’t do it alone— God carried me. He carried me through trauma, heartbreak, single motherhood, public failure, and private grief. He carried me when I was assaulted. When I was raped. When I was diagnosed with PTSD. When I moved four times to keep my children safe. When the world called me unworthy, God called me redeemed. When the Left tried to silence me, God gave me a voice. When I had nothing left to give, God filled me with living water. I know what it means to be broken. And I know what it means to be rebuilt by grace. A fight for our churches , our daughters , our freedom —and our souls. And I won’t sit back while spineless politicians sell out our country for fame and favor. If you believe in grace , truth , and second chances , Because there are millions of women out there still waiting at the well. And America still has fighters who won’t back down. — Nancy Mace P.S. name: Dan Steiner
subject: Before Easter Sunday, read this
body:
If you’re looking for a way to engage with Easter more thoughtfully this year, I hope this devotional serves you well.

| | | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkM2KrDAQhZ8m7pT8qe0ii8sVYRY9MJueZYhJtRZoIkl0mLcf7O55gNkVdT4-qs7nVV8NLuind7OCsgfqmPQI9xABTMoQ0-6d-Y5gXJ5Rc8qbksqSypNjhVPWNYIXoFjb1oJRwetiVnxsWnHhFuSdSXuXprtQ68YRrHFd18kC1WmikkomZM1F5aTg7FIzJpi1LXVE0n1zJkOqbPAJ4mEyHoDeh3MKvrJhLRY157wlIv4RPhA-REhhjxZStUUYQ3xQhA8zlJjKiAk8EcOeV_3kiOi3GNIGNqOfCG_OaAWH-0pED6vB5bW0Zt0MTp6IfgaNST9lrzD4DD4T0d9q_dGW_29v5e9_RVRu-8JlwdS0RNLplD6Oz3-v-1D8JwAA__8Ar5CI)
---
Friend of Life, Have you ever reached Easter Sunday feeling spiritually unprepared or wishing you had spent more time reflecting beforehand? I know I have. Easter has a way of coming up fast. So before the services, before the plans with family, or the big dinner to follow, I wanted to share something my team created with you in mind. [**_He Is Risen: 12 Scriptures to Prepare Your Heart for Easter_**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkM2KrDAQhZ8m7pT8qe0ii8sVYRY9MJueZYhJtRZoIkl0mLcf7O55gNkVdT4-qs7nVV8NLuind7OCsgfqmPQI9xABTMoQ0-6d-Y5gXJ5Rc8qbksqSypNjhVPWNYIXoFjb1oJRwetiVnxsWnHhFuSdSXuXprtQ68YRrHFd18kC1WmikkomZM1F5aTg7FIzJpi1LXVE0n1zJkOqbPAJ4mEyHoDeh3MKvrJhLRY157wlIv4RPhA-REhhjxZStUUYQ3xQhA8zlJjKiAk8EcOeV_3kiOi3GNIGNqOfCG_OaAWH-0pED6vB5bW0Zt0MTp6IfgaNST9lrzD4DD4T0d9q_dGW_29v5e9_RVRu-8JlwdS0RNLplD6Oz3-v-1D8JwAA__8Ar5CI) is a free devotional designed for the days leading up to Easter. It’s meant to be simple, steady, and grounding as you prepare your heart. Here’s what you’ll find inside:
---
* One full Scripture passage each day
* A short reflection to help you process what you’re reading
* A prayer to help you pause and respond

---
If you’re looking for a way to engage with Easter more thoughtfully this year, I hope this devotional serves you well. You can download your free copy here: [https://resources.preborn.com/he-is-risen](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkM2KrDAQhZ8m7pT8qe0ii8sVYRY9MJueZYhJtRZoIkl0mLcf7O55gNkVdT4-qs7nVV8NLuind7OCsgfqmPQI9xABTMoQ0-6d-Y5gXJ5Rc8qbksqSypNjhVPWNYIXoFjb1oJRwetiVnxsWnHhFuSdSXuXprtQ68YRrHFd18kC1WmikkomZM1F5aTg7FIzJpi1LXVE0n1zJkOqbPAJ4mEyHoDeh3MKvrJhLRY157wlIv4RPhA-REhhjxZStUUYQ3xQhA8zlJjKiAk8EcOeV_3kiOi3GNIGNqOfCG_OaAWH-0pED6vB5bW0Zt0MTp6IfgaNST9lrzD4DD4T0d9q_dGW_29v5e9_RVRu-8JlwdS0RNLplD6Oz3-v-1D8JwAA__8Ar5CI) Wishing you a meaningful Easter season, Dan Steiner

name: ChrisForJustice.com
subject: Before you kick off your weekend…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
With 53% of voters still undecided, what we accomplish this weekend could decide everything.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260404-1337&t=1&akid=1355%2E294397%2EnkVsco)
Before you kick off your weekend, we have to ask: [**Can you donate to fuel our final get-out-the-vote weekend?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/146?c0=em_ms_jct_20260404_1_ak.CzOjnK&refcode=em20260404-1337&t=3&akid=1355%2E294397%2EnkVsco)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/146?c0=em_ms_jct_20260404_1_ak.CzOjnK&refcode=em20260404-1337&t=4&akid=1355%2E294397%2EnkVsco)**
* * *
This is it.
We’re kicking off the final weekend before Election Day.
From now until polls close on Tuesday, we’re working around the clock to reach as many Wisconsinites as possible.
**With 53% of voters still undecided, what we accomplish this weekend could decide everything.**
[**So before you take a screen break, can you chip in to help us elect Judge Chris Taylor? Even $5 helps us make the most of this final push.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260404_1_ak.Ebfk4-&amount=10&refcode=em20260404-1337&t=5&akid=1355%2E294397%2EnkVsco)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/146?c0=em_ms_jct_20260404_1_ak.CzOjnK&refcode=em20260404-1337&t=24&akid=1355%2E294397%2EnkVsco)**
Thank you,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20260404-1337&t=25&refcode2=1355_294397_nkVsco&akid=1355%2E294397%2EnkVsco)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=1355%2E294397%2EnkVsco)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)

Madison, WI 53701

| We are still $29,388 short.
And with just 5 days left, that gap could decide this race.
We're not slowing down. We're not scaling back. Because we know what's possible when this team shows up.
In 2025, more than 100,000 grassroots donors powered our victory in Pennsylvania. With an average donation of just $26, we reached 750,000 low-turnout voters--and nearly doubled turnout from 30% to 60%.
That's what grassroots action can do. Now, we have to do it again in Wisconsin. This is a critical swing state. This election happens before the midterms. And the majority decided this Tuesday will be locked in through 2030.
If we win, we are guaranteed a pro-democracy court before MAGA's next wave of election interference.
If we lose, we risk losing that firewall only months before the 2028 Presidential election--paving the way for MAGA to rig the '28 election in Wisconsin.
These races don't always make headlines. But they decide everything. And you already know that. That's why we're asking: [Can you step up right with a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us close this final $29,388 gap and reach every last voter before Election Day?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QcrjtQmaY4DcT3rMK8x5h_qtI2nMzHQLU-0AJ5ROlFXhLOeS3uCG2vcRhnKyQ1hNAX7md2D58vMgQbNTVnPmsbyCClwsiiG61-ZGWvQ1965zt7iShv6P46ehQ6LZ_jkKuCvk8yK0vX9uRxSVSr7jwhDk9VJavBg3uewo0GWc1TMPDOqLd0mqy8KBfFRXHiNwNcCiD2UfDW9GJ2vL89HrBsE4VJji3foiDslQmAVLcw2v5SWrSrocIYrcl0e5A-ZuwxlJXPRNoGo=&c=lrlspTHL2ibMB01E3zjM0k0AMIaufnBd0IMXJ3a6U5eJIjoT0DMlIg==&ch=mCaRFI01N6026UyhlgNTS0EwRv2P-GVXEJKUojktdFRWd1Usgh3spQ==)

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128763733/612284109/-209663061?refcode=em-4.4.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWZkN2M4Zi0yZTMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dT7Zojzzs2bFuSEZ4Nc1agH8HJkGgp4XwuvKGdKGRNI=) Friend, Across the country, Republicans are working to make it harder for people to vote – purging voter rolls, limiting early voting, and putting up barriers that silence eligible voters. **That’s why electing Democratic Secretaries of State has never been more important.** Secretaries of State are on the frontlines of our democracy. They oversee our elections, protect voter access, and ensure every voice is heard. And in 2028, they will be responsible for certifying the results of a presidential election that will shape the future of our country. If the wrong people are in those roles, they won’t just restrict access to the ballot – they could decide whether the will of the voters is upheld at all. We can’t leave that to chance. In 2026, there are 26 critical races across the country that will determine who holds these positions – and whether our elections are protected or politicized. subject: Republicans are trying to TERMINATE this bill >>>

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=24086%2E4449941%2ECxm2QE) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=24086%2E4449941%2ECxm2QE) **_[Sen. Amy Klobuchar just introduced her historic _Register America to Vote Act_ - and we need to show that our Democrats are FIRED UP to get this passed and BLOCK Trump's voter suppression agenda. That's why we need to raise another $50,000 before our 9PM deadline - but we're still $7,323 short of our goal! SO ASAP: Rush $10 to fund our fight and help our campaign to pass the _Register America to Vote Act_ once and for all. >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73564?t=3&akid=24086%2E4449941%2ECxm2QE)_** | [RUSH $10 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73564?t=4&akid=24086%2E4449941%2ECxm2QE)

* * *
Here's the deal, team.

Amy Klobuchar just introduced a MASSIVE new bill that would MANDATE Automatic Voter Registration nationwide... This could change EVERYTHING!!

Trump is currently **FREAKING OUT** - because it would undo ALL of his voter suppression efforts! (We're SO EXCITED!!!)

**_[We know you get a lot of fundraising asks- but this is our most important one yet. Will you show Sen. Klobuchar you have her back - and hand Donald Trump a MASSIVE defeat - by rushing in $10 to fund our campaign ASAP? >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73564?t=6&akid=24086%2E4449941%2ECxm2QE)_**

name: Team Stevens
subject: JD Vance was in Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=2653%2E49239%2EmtIqBu)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16344?t=2&akid=2653%2E49239%2EmtIqBu)
---
Null, ever since MAGA megadonors started spending in Michigan – including a MAGA Texas oil billionaire who poured $5 million into a super PAC backing Rogers – Tim Scott and the NRSC have _been bragging they're going to win in Michigan._
But recent polling shows Haley statistically tied with Mike Rogers – and she's still the ONLY Democrat who can beat him in November.
Trump even had JD Vance fly into Michigan to try to push Rogers ahead.
MAGA Republicans are all in, and the race is close – so we can’t afford to fall behind.
**We need to raise $25,000 by midnight, so will you rush $5 right now to help Haley fight back, keep Michigan blue, and take back the Senate?**
**[https:/secure.actblue.com/donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16345?t=3&akid=2653%2E49239%2EmtIqBu)**
Thanks,

Team Haley

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. Friend,

I want to start by saying thank you so much for supporting my campaign for governor.

I know you've been receiving a lot of emails from my team and from me asking for your donation, but we wouldn't be reaching out so much if it weren't absolutely critical.
You see, New Mexico is a top pickup opportunity for the GOP, and all eyes are on our race — **especially because they know that governors are the last line of defense when the federal government abuses its power as it has been.**
And now, my first fundraising deadline before the primary election is coming up on Monday, which means our numbers will become public and Republicans will be assessing the strength of our grassroots campaign.

**With so much on the line, I need to know I can count on you to help show the GOP we have what it takes to win and keep New Mexico blue:_[Please, will you chip in $5 or more now to help me reach my $150,000 goal before midnight on April 6?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7253?refcode=jtk519-fr-nd&t=2&akid=8717%2E400544%2Eb5fSpx)_**

[I’m coming to you today because I’m officially endorsing the YES campaign for Virginia’s redistricting amendment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128765695/612290237/-1935155459?amount=15&refcode=20260404_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ4MmYxNy0zMTMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8MyTKrXNnkWHXkMIKIBY-B0DfFnlpecP0_jOcpm8Hzs=)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: No one should ever accuse you of being a Democrat....
body:
After all you’ve done for our Party, I salute you, Patriot!
| Patriot,
---
I’m sick of seeing text messages that accuse you of abandoning the GOP after all you’ve done for us.
---
All because you didn’t give $15 before some random deadline, that’s supposed to mean you **_“betrayed”_** the Republican Party and became a Democrat?
---
So all the times you stood in line to vote, you knocked on doors, you put up a yard sign, you made phone calls, you filled out surveys, you sacrificed your time and money – suddenly, all of that means nothing?
---
**_Give me a break! That’s just insulting._**
---
_Hand to God, I will never stoop to that low._
---
Truth be told, I try not to write too many emails and texts as it is. I’m busy working in Washington to do the job you asked me to do.
---
Honestly, fundraising just isn’t Priority #1.
---
At the end of 2024, I transferred $2.5 MILLION _**away**_ from my own campaign to help conservatives in tough races who _truly_ needed help.
---
**You know what I care about most?** The _ONLY_ thing that WINS elections – **_VOTES_**.
---
_That means registering voters, verifying every Trump voter’s profile, and constantly getting LIVE feedback from voters like you so that the President and I _always_ have the best, most accurate data in the country._
---
That’s how we won in 2024. And it’s my plan to win AGAIN in 2026.
---

clean_body: After all you’ve done for our Party, I salute you, Patriot! | Patriot, I’m sick of seeing text messages that accuse you of abandoning the GOP after all you’ve done for us. All because you didn’t give $15 before some random deadline, that’s supposed to mean you “betrayed” the Republican Party and became a Democrat? So all the times you stood in line to vote, you knocked on doors, you put up a yard sign, you made phone calls, you filled out surveys, you sacrificed your time and money – suddenly, all of that means nothing? Give me a break! That’s just insulting. Hand to God, I will never stoop to that low. Truth be told, I try not to write too many emails and texts as it is. I’m busy working in Washington to do the job you asked me to do. Honestly, fundraising just isn’t Priority #1. At the end of 2024, I transferred $2.5 MILLION away from my own campaign to help conservatives in tough races who truly needed help. You know what I care about most? The ONLY thing that WINS elections – VOTES. That means registering voters, verifying every Trump voter’s profile, and constantly getting LIVE feedback from voters like you so that the President and I always have the best, most accurate data in the country. That’s how we won in 2024. And it’s my plan to win AGAIN in 2026. “Official GOP Voter Verification Questionnaire Scope: Measuring Voter Propensity” GOP Voter: dpwillis67@gmail.com Survey ID #: 8337-190 | Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128766415/612292557/-1473932214?refcode=logo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2Q5ZjZjMy0zMjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ca-69vHvuTS365FsttEGyFYURuKyqYFY38n_jDD3gl4=) Folks, it’s John. With the election year officially in full swing, I wanted to take a moment to explain more about why I’m running for re-election. **_[When I’m done, I hope you’ll consider chipping in a couple bucks to keep this seat blue. Whether it’s $1 or $10, every little bit helps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128766416/612292558/-584038332?amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&amount=10&refcode=email_040426_bio_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2Q5ZjZjMy0zMjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ca-69vHvuTS365FsttEGyFYURuKyqYFY38n_jDD3gl4=)_** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128766417/612292559/-584038332?amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&amount=10&refcode=email_040426_bio_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2Q5ZjZjMy0zMjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ca-69vHvuTS365FsttEGyFYURuKyqYFY38n_jDD3gl4=)
---
**I’m not exactly your typical politician.** I used to work as a scientist — a geologist to be specific. After our company was sold and I got laid off, I organized and opened Colorado’s first brewpub, helping revitalize a neglected warehouse district in Denver.
I found my way to public office because I was fed up with everyday Coloradans’ voices being drowned out by special interests and corporations. My friends and I felt like our elected officials were mainly making decisions to get re-elected, not solve problems for their constituents. I ran for mayor, then governor, and eventually senator, always focusing on the same thing: putting Colorado families first and getting sh*t done.
I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished together in the Senate — from lowering prescription drug costs, to defending our public lands, to standing up against Trump’s disastrous agenda.
**But just over a year into Trump’s second term, Colorado has faced nonstop attacks from the President — and it’s clear there are still plenty more important fights ahead of us.**
Trump has weaponized the federal government against us for refusing to bend to his will. He announced plans to dismantle the National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR) in Boulder, and threatened to rip away child care resources from our state and nation. The President actually vetoed a bipartisan bill passed by unanimous consent in both chambers of Congress that, for the first time, would bring clean drinking water to 50,000 rural Coloradans.
It’s hard to overstate the unprecedented threat working people and our democracy are facing under this administration — and it’s so important that we do everything we can to push back on Trump and his dangerous agenda.
**Taking back the Senate this November is a key part of that fight,_and that work starts with defending this must-hold seat in Colorado._**
**_[So I have to ask: Can you chip in $10 to keep Colorado blue and continue taking on the Trump administration? The GOP spent MILLIONS trying to beat us in 2020, so anything you can contribute will help our team in the race ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128766418/612292560/-584038332?amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&amount=10&refcode=email_040426_bio_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2Q5ZjZjMy0zMjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ca-69vHvuTS365FsttEGyFYURuKyqYFY38n_jDD3gl4=)_**
