clean_body: = Folks, it’s John. With the election year officially in full swing, I wanted to take a moment to explain more about why I’m running for re-election. = | | = I’m not exactly your typical politician. I used to work as a scientist — a geologist to be specific. After our company was sold and I got laid off, I organized and opened Colorado’s first brewpub, helping revitalize a neglected warehouse district in Denver. I found my way to public office because I was fed up with everyday Coloradans’ voices being drowned out by special interests and corporations. My friends and I felt like our elected officials were mainly making decisions to get re-elected, not solve problems for their constituents. I ran for mayor, then governor, and eventually senator, always focusing on the same thing: putting Colorado families first and getting sht done. I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished together in the Senate — from lowering prescription drug costs, to defending our public lands, to standing up against Trump’s disastrous agenda. But just over a year into Trump’s second term, Colorado has faced nonstop attacks from the President — and it’s clear there are still plenty more important fights ahead of us. Trump has weaponized the federal government against us for refusing to bend to his will. He announced plans to dismantle the National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR) in Boulder, and threatened to rip away child care resources from our state and nation. The President actually vetoed a bipartisan bill passed by unanimous consent in both chambers of Congress that, for the first time, would bring clean drinking water to 50,000 rural Coloradans. It’s hard to overstate the unprecedented threat working people and our democracy are facing under this administration — and it’s so important that we do everything we can to push back on Trump and his dangerous agenda. Taking back the Senate this November is a key part of that fight,and that work starts with defending this must-hold seat in Colorado. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks so much! subject: This wasn’t supposed to be public

body:
This is what America LAST looks like.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2155%2E791427%2E1L0Jcy)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/5685?t=2&akid=2155%2E791427%2E1L0Jcy)
Friend, for Trump and Republicans in Congress, it's always yes to bombs, but no to our babies. **This is what America LAST looks like.**
The video above wasn’t supposed to be public, but the White House accidentally published it online before quickly taking it down. Now the entire world can see Trump speak candidly about his goals: slash childcare and healthcare funding so he can pay for his illegal quagmire in Iran.
This is after Trump and Republicans already slashed nearly $1 trillion in funds for Medicaid, leaving millions of Americans without the healthcare they rely on.
**The American people are sick and tired of seeing their hard-earned tax money go towards death and destruction, whether it’s in Gaza, Iran, or the Caribbean.** We want to see that money go towards things that actually improve our lives, and childcare and healthcare are at the top of that list.
Our movement is fundamentally about resetting these spending priorities and building a nation where our government actually takes care of its citizens rather than picking their pockets and handing it over to defense contractors and war criminals.
If you’re with me in that fight, [**use this link**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr26.yEIO3a&refcode=em260404-1-180&t=3&akid=2155%2E791427%2E1L0Jcy) or the button below to chip in to my campaign and power our efforts to organize for progressive victory.
In solidarity,
— Ilhan

subject: Trump tries to plant election denier on swing state court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
MAGA’s handpicked WI Supreme Court judge hopeful not only has ties to election deniers, she’s touting their support.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ucrTH_xWWhPNtOgQCT0rqZTbLgO4Ar5wNWFHOiiYUIERoITvuuI4bKAW7Rvig7X1gxykvz-LSpGzU01WUy9w5CloIkZzo6FiHRcRw1KIcALOC-Ybjvvug47HGqfrxpzC4Hu_Zhr8bZ9ZM-LkKuf70T0R10OEpR2pB62kxCMW4i7dhWacHwh6AfyxEbpX4cEGKuabF-brN3weQl-Y7S0OTN0_0XJnI0Ri75FuumQw4mk=&c=sUcVKnYG2n89SU0qfGVazA-ZR3PoRPSl3dzdW8PTn6-rihQ5C4I4Ow==&ch=2uQXTPdl90OVUrpial61QhvszkIhVHs_cDgPUgBtJ4aZdorxswqrEg==)
---
|
Peter,
The first big race of 2026 for Democrats isn't a congressional or senate race, it's a Wisconsin Supreme Court seat that is up for grabs on April 7--only 3 days from now.
Stopping Trump from stacking state Supreme Courts is paramount. These courts decide election laws and even outcomes. If MAGA captures them, Trump can rig elections, lock in one-party rule, and clear the path to a third term.
And Wisconsin isn't just any state. If MAGA wins this election, they'll have an opportunity to seize control of the court just months before the 2028 presidential election. We all know how this works: the presidency comes down to a handful of swing states. If MAGA controls Wisconsin's highest court, it could be game over for Dems. Don't just take it from us. MAGA's WI Supreme Court candidate for the April election, Maria Lazar, shows Trump's endgame:

---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ucrTH_xWWhPNtOgQCT0rqZTbLgO4Ar5wNWFHOiiYUIERoITvuuI4bKAW7Rvig7X1gxykvz-LSpGzU01WUy9w5CloIkZzo6FiHRcRw1KIcALOC-Ybjvvug47HGqfrxpzC4Hu_Zhr8bZ9ZM-LkKuf70T0R10OEpR2pB62kxCMW4i7dhWacHwh6AfyxEbpX4cEGKuabF-brN3weQl-Y7S0OTN0_0XJnI0Ri05kzjbJGrZQ=&c=sUcVKnYG2n89SU0qfGVazA-ZR3PoRPSl3dzdW8PTn6-rihQ5C4I4Ow==&ch=2uQXTPdl90OVUrpial61QhvszkIhVHs_cDgPUgBtJ4aZdorxswqrEg==)
---

MAGA's handpicked WI Supreme Court judge hopeful not only has ties to election deniers, she's touting their support.
Jim Troupis and Michael Gableman were both instrumental in pushing the "big lie" after Trump lost the 2020 election, spearheading efforts for the Trump legal team to try and overturn the election results in Wisconsin.
Troupis was also involved in the fake elector scheme for Wisconsin, which he was later indicted for on a felony charge. In November, Donald Trump issued a pardon for him.
If these are the types of people Lazar openly touts the support of, we know exactly what she would do if a decision that could sway an election in MAGA's direction landed in her lap as a WI Supreme Court judge.
Lazar must be defeated.
Defend Our Courts is gearing up to make a big impact in this. After our huge success in helping protect the PA Supreme Court in November, we are expanding nationwide. Wisconsin is our first major target and we are bringing the same winning formula forward.
But here is the reality. We are only 3 days away from this election and we don't have enough resources to make as big of an impact as we did last year in PA. That's why we are are asking:
[We don't have time to waste, we have to ramp up our efforts NOW. Will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare right now to help us defend Wisconsin Supreme Court and defeat MAGA extremist Maria Lazar?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ucrTH_xWWhPNtOgQCT0rqZTbLgO4Ar5wNWFHOiiYUIERoITvuuI4bKAW7Rvig7X1IHOdIP-UMJisqzx3JZ0y7TAsMJi_WI4-KvtfzV0ZoZjwf6MgiN8INN0Sxaqy_5leBzTDSEDxDWPfWJroEMmGTSXiZtd7zrrgyKbS2j6pN1XhwxWj-zzX4QXqZwQpteYooijMVLKcGIEtzTX5X3AKwoySC2sQfs8eEtZLRL9GpW0ISgQB6udfYPSsfodxcQIp&c=sUcVKnYG2n89SU0qfGVazA-ZR3PoRPSl3dzdW8PTn6-rihQ5C4I4Ow==&ch=2uQXTPdl90OVUrpial61QhvszkIhVHs_cDgPUgBtJ4aZdorxswqrEg==)

body:

clean_body: They are looting your future| | | Hello Peter, Right now, our greatest enemy isn’t in China, Iran, or Russia. The real enemy is already within our borders dismantling our sacred nation from within. While Americans work to put food on the table, Gavin Newsom and his radical machine are overseeing the greatest looting operation in human history. It isn't just "fraud" — it is a $250 Billion death sentence for the American way of life. If they pull this off, your children will never know a free America. The radical left is rewarding this heist by backing Newsom for the Presidency. They want to export this crime scene to your front door. President Trump has issued a dire final warning. There is still hope, but the window is closing. We must pull the plug on the swamp. We must save our Republic. See how... Thank you, – Team Hilton Authorized by Steve Hilton for Governor 2026 | | Paid for by Steve Hilton for Governor 2026

name: Royce White
subject: Just $15, Peter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
This will be short and sweet
|
---

Peter,

I won't take too much of your time here.

[**I’ll be upfront from the get-go – I’m asking for just $15.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=8371c82a62aa4c48bf085cff0a20305b&_e=R-Ta8CUUbrC-ZMvQZdarQEq__Uhwfo4CNnrqVSTN8Q5gV8U1JvSEm0VoRSsG3z17IKzOBTcP4UZyd5gIXoL9p3US9C2xLMUi88fR5nYCGdfbHFdqulKomxEpBtmU438_lQ6Gbh3bgre0w_nr-hK7CZ6DLuUIiL9ZIaWblxGVAxy5E1aZlqyq0M7iWMHMmK9uTwng9DaK56i7dadBwku_ZHjFqbclKFJY7_3cZfx4PLMYzO3jm1zEzr8jqsFr6t6tnZzzoCmM-mcI9o685L9s5x3LOvI8tFRSyCB5BCwie3ilQca_N7EmOKkcqClASgBcAJU6DXgAOppwZdJszrSTlSKnCliJm4yRd6MlKjPN1F_V43NyCuqhBVZ1pjJPNXOX3vo15euJyQMI3znrQAmYaj-Sc5u54Y9S2-c9qRrKu864qBWU9quEtk2Vol1BkjfGkP-wZQ-uMyu-S8x0O0-VjbMyuIs_vTqwuXZB8CtxiEMtkk40XIYaA_0HkZ5-BLo0WLypP_I-WhhY7f3TboVc1RDCPnwMM_vqEmpTH-T_M5IYykt5UaGMp6CIfI2MJRd_)

It may not seem like a lot of money, but $15 will go a lot farther for my campaign than you'd think.

Every dollar, every cent, and every prayer to God helps me continue fighting. Our nation is in trouble, led by corrupt career politicians who try to herd us like sheep while they line their pockets. I'm working every single day, hour, minute, and second to save our United States of America from hellfire.

name: JanePAC.com
subject: War is a fossil fuel feedback loop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
And right now, we are trapped in it.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128767691/612296807/1328794144?refcode=ea.942413ad-3530-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.942413ad-3530-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0MjQxM2FkLTM1MzAtZjExMS05YTQ4LTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sY_RBPO0xNKDZUlXa6ZzsRbs6Q9mBGPn-mKX65nJ6XQ=&emci=c40d4490-722f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=942413ad-3530-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105)
---
14 days. That is all it took for Donald Trump’s illegal war on Iran to unleash more carbon emissions than **84 countries produce in an entire year.** That is the climate cost of war. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128767692/612296808/2105508926?refcode=ea.942413ad-3530-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.942413ad-3530-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0MjQxM2FkLTM1MzAtZjExMS05YTQ4LTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sY_RBPO0xNKDZUlXa6ZzsRbs6Q9mBGPn-mKX65nJ6XQ=) When people think about war, they don’t always picture oil fires raging or a flood of carbon pouring into an atmosphere that is already dangerously overheated. But that is exactly what is happening. _Climate experts warn that this war is accelerating the climate crisis at the precise moment the world can least afford it._ _So let’s be crystal clear:_ There is no path to climate safety through militarism and warmongering. There is only more heat, more instability, and more communities left to bear the consequences of decisions made by powerful interests that will never face the worst of the damage themselves. | _“Every refinery fire and tanker strike is a reminder that fossil‐fuelled geopolitics is incompatible with a livable planet. This war shows, yet again, that the fastest way to supercharge the climate crisis is to let fossil fuel interests dictate foreign policy.”_ \- Patrick Bigger, Research Director at the Climate and Community Institute, _The Guardian_
---
**War is a fossil fuel feedback loop, and right now, we are trapped in it.**
At JanePAC, we refuse to pretend these crises are separate. The climate crisis and war share the same roots in greed, unchecked power, and a political system that keeps choosing fossil fuels and corporate profits over people.
If we want a more just and livable world, we have to say that plainly, and we have to keep fighting like hell to protect it.
In solidarity,
Team JanePAC

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: You truly are one of a kind!
body:
I can’t thank you enough

| | | | [](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._b1_2w)Peter, I can’t believe you!

# [Antisemitism Has Reached a New Low in Fairfield, Connecticut](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=193166647&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkzMTY2NjQ3LCJpYXQiOjE3NzUzMTQ1NjMsImV4cCI6MTc3NzkwNjU2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wdzUq36snhjD61U6UwksfWnyLlXTr3hiuJZUiZ95G24)

| Apr 4
---

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=193166647&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkzMTY2NjQ3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTMxNDU2MywiZXhwIjoxNzc3OTA2NTYzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTQ1NDg1MyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aWRmXhebn1cqVtaufj0e3FArwj4g0hKIQCNAoI8FdJc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e51cbdbf-c994-4a3a-8aae-bd2c7f9e0d59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What happened at the hockey game between New Canaan and Fairfield Prep was not immaturity. It was not joking. It was not rivalry. It was antisemitism.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..QpXXfWxx2aJetkrmzZgaw2485jIf5_NsqbByMcPE874?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=193166647)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=193166647&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkzMTY2NjQ3LCJpYXQiOjE3NzUzMTQ1NjMsImV4cCI6MTc3NzkwNjU2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wdzUq36snhjD61U6UwksfWnyLlXTr3hiuJZUiZ95G24)
Supporters reportedly wrote and circulated phrases including **" Jew Canaan"** and **" Win or lose we booze, and at least we're not Jews."** Those words were not accidental. They were chosen. They were written. They were shared in public. This was deliberate, shameless antisemitism.
Here's a few of them:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f7658325-be98-4f2a-8981-92403b9ab3f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And the deeper scandal is not just that it happened. It is that antisemitism has become so accepted, so casual, and so normalized that people now feel comfortable saying these things out loud and in public. That is the real rot. That is the real warning sign. This must not become the new normal in Fairfield, in Connecticut, or anywhere in America.
**It is even more pathetic that after being defeated by New Canaan - they claimed that it was because they had Netanyahu.**
This disgrace has now traveled far beyond one rink and one town. _**It has reached Israel**_. We have received messages from Israeli Knesset representatives asking what the hell is going on in Connecticut. Think about that. They are in a war and they care about what happens in Connecticut as the war on antisemitism is the ninth-front.
_**Fairfield is now being spoken about internationally not for excellence, not for leadership, but as an example of open antisemitic hatred in America. They understand it in New York with Mamdani - but in Connecticut - really?**_
[State Representative Tom O'Dea](https://substack.com/redirect/47759d29-8303-46dd-9917-dc3b82887bd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), who represents New Canaan, North Stamford, and Darien, reached out to us in total shock and disgust after hearing about what transpired.
> _" I was disgusted by these acts in competitive athletics and condemn antisemitism in all forms," he said. "I have always stood with my Jewish brothers and sisters, who have always stood with us. I call on my colleagues in Hartford and throughout Connecticut to stand up against antisemitism with me. Hate has no place anywhere, whether on the ice or in any athletic or academic setting."_
_**As a family of Holocaust survivors, we do not need a lecture on where this leads.**_ We know exactly where it leads. Hate does not stay contained. It never does. It starts with slurs, humiliation, and public degradation. It escalates when decent people stay quiet, when institutions hide behind process, and when communities excuse what should be condemned without hesitation.
The numbers make clear that this is not isolated. The ADL recorded **9,354 antisemitic incidents in the United States in 2024** , the highest total ever recorded. Connecticut alone saw **159 antisemitic incidents** in 2024. So no, this is not random. This is part of a much larger disease, and Fairfield has now shown that it is not immune from it.
Even after October 7, even after communities like Fairfield organized efforts such as **Run for Their Lives** to stand with the hostages and against terror, antisemitism has only become more brazen. More visible. More acceptable in polite society. More mainstream. That is a moral collapse.
So let there be no hedging and no cowardice.
We call on **every elected leader in Fairfield** to publicly condemn this antisemitism.
We call on both the **Republican and Democratic Town Committees** to denounce it without spin, without excuse, and without trying to bend it to their own political purposes. Antisemitism is too often weaponized across the political spectrum for different ends, and that is exactly why leaders in both parties need to speak with absolute moral clarity now.
We call on the **First Selectman** and the **Board of Selectmen** to make clear that Fairfield will not be a place where antisemitism is tolerated.
We call on **Fairfield Prep** to do more than manage the optics of this scandal. Discipline is not enough. If students felt comfortable producing and sharing this filth, then something deeper is broken, and it needs to be confronted directly with serious education and moral accountability.
We call on **every religious institution in Fairfield** to speak out. Not softly. Not vaguely. Clearly. Publicly. Now.
And We call on the broader Fairfield community to decide what kind of town it wants to be. A town that shrugs at antisemitism is a town in decline. A town that confronts it without apology still has a moral backbone.
This is bigger than one game. Bigger than one school. Bigger than one incident. This is about whether antisemitism will be treated as the social poison that it is, or whether people will keep normalizing it until something worse follows.
**Never again is not a slogan. It is a test. Fairfield is being tested right now.**
[ Pledge your support](https://substack..QpXXfWxx2aJetkrmzZgaw2485jIf5_NsqbByMcPE874?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=193166647)

name: Andie Levien
subject: We’re suing Donald Trump:
body:
---
Derek, Trump signed an executive order yesterday to restrict mail-in voting and give the Department of Homeland Security direct oversight over who can vote. The DNC is filing a new lawsuit to stop him immediately, and [**you can chip in here to help power our fight to protect mail-in voting.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260404_6617_fr&refcode2=6617_22930333_H-Wcoq&akid=6617%2E22930333%2EH-Wcoq) **[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260404_6617_fr&refcode2=6617_22930333_H-Wcoq&akid=6617%2E22930333%2EH-Wcoq)** Derek, the unfortunate truth here is that we have a narrow window to act here, which is why we need your help right now. Your donation will be put to work immediately to help us shape the future of voting rights in America. If you’re skeptical about how your donation can do this, please let me explain:
* **Last year,** Trump signed an executive order that could have disenfranchised married women who changed their names and members of our armed services. We sued, this grassroots team rallied behind us, _and we won in court._
* **Since then,** Trump has sought to “take over” state-run elections, he’s used the FBI to seize ballots from election offices in Georgia, and he’s tried to coerce states into giving him access to their voter rolls.
* **Now, he’s taking it to a new level:** His new executive order directs the federal government to build a voter list for each state to decide who can and cannot vote — and he’s told the Postal Service to refuse to carry ballots for anyone not on its new list of eligible voters.

This isn’t the time for fear, though, Derek, it’s the time for action. I want to tell you directly that the DNC won’t let this happen. [**With the help of grassroots supporters like you,**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260404_6617_fr&refcode2=6617_22930333_H-Wcoq&akid=6617%2E22930333%2EH-Wcoq) we’ll block his order from going into effect. We’ll defend your right to vote. We’ll protect your right to a free and fair election. And, when November rolls around, we’ll make sure Democrats can kick these right-wing authoritarians out of office. [**I hope you’re with me, Derek, and I hope you’ll consider chipping in $7 or any amount you can spare right now to help us fight back.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260404_6617_fr&refcode2=6617_22930333_H-Wcoq&akid=6617%2E22930333%2EH-Wcoq) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260404_6617_fr&refcode2=6617_22930333_H-Wcoq&akid=6617%2E22930333%2EH-Wcoq)**
---
****
| **[Donate $32](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=32&refcode=em_20260404_6617_fr&refcode2=6617_22930333_H-Wcoq&akid=6617%2E22930333%2EH-Wcoq)**

Your donation will be put to work immediately to help us shape the future of voting rights in America. If you’re skeptical about how your donation can do this, please let me explain: Last year, Trump signed an executive order that could have disenfranchised married women who changed their names and members of our armed services. We sued, this grassroots team rallied behind us, and we won in court. Since then, Trump has sought to “take over” state-run elections, he’s used the FBI to seize ballots from election offices in Georgia, and he’s tried to coerce states into giving him access to their voter rolls. Now, he’s taking it to a new level: His new executive order directs the federal government to build a voter list for each state to decide who can and cannot vote — and he’s told the Postal Service to refuse to carry ballots for anyone not on its new list of eligible voters. This isn’t the time for fear, though, Derek, it’s the time for action. I want to tell you directly that the DNC won’t let this happen. we’ll block his order from going into effect. We’ll defend your right to vote. We’ll protect your right to a free and fair election. And, when November rolls around, we’ll make sure Democrats can kick these right-wing authoritarians out of office. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you, and I’ll have more updates to share soon. Andie Andrea Levien General Counsel Democratic National Committee If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The real truth about Red Lobster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Warren for Senate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/370?source=em-header&t=1001&akid=2843%2E4032634%2ECsXtR3

Did you see
this recent article?

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-stop-wall-street-looting/?refcode=EMZ30O_FIN_E_20260404_V1S1&t=1006&akid=2843%2E4032634%2ECsXtR3 ]Red Lobster set to bring back endless shrimp that drove it to
bankruptcy

It makes a good headline: Restaurant brings back the thing that put them
into bankruptcy in the first place. How could a company that offers
endless shrimp NOT run out of money AGAIN?!

But if anyone looked right beneath the surface, they’d be able to see that
Red Lobster’s real downfall wasn’t offering endless shrimp — it was
private equity’s endless greed.

You see, a private equity firm bought Red Lobster in 2014, and did their
thing: Looted profits, loaded Red Lobster up with debt, and saddled the
restaurant chain with extra real-estate costs — following a model that
reaps rewards for private equity owners but leaves communities, workers,
and customers holding the bag.

At the end of the day their menu items and promotions don't matter: that's
not what sent them to bankruptcy.

And Red Lobster isn’t the only victim of this blood-sucking phenomenon.
Private equity’s harmful effects go far, far beyond the restaurant
industry — from retail stores to nursing homes to fisheries to
manufactured housing communities to hospital systems.

Private equity should not be allowed to loot one business after another,
and I have introduced the most comprehensive bill to overhaul the private
equity industry.

My Stop Wall Street Looting Act would put private investment fund managers
on the hook for the companies they control, end looting, empower workers
and investors, and safeguard the markets from risky corporate debt.

But it’ll be an uphill battle to overcome the powerful interests who want
to preserve a status quo that means big profits for them — even as stores
get closed, consumers get cheated, workers get laid off, and pensions get
raided.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-stop-wall-street-looting/?refcode=EMZ30O_FIN_E_20260404_V1S1&t=1007&akid=2843%2E4032634%2ECsXtR3 ]Say you’re in this fight to stop private equity from ransacking our
economy, and sign on to say you support my Stop Wall Street Looting Act.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-stop-wall-street-looting/?refcode=EMZ30O_FIN_E_20260404_V1S1&t=1008&akid=2843%2E4032634%2ECsXtR3 ]ADD YOUR NAME

Here are a few big pieces of what my Stop Wall Street Looting Act would
accomplish:

* Fundamentally reform the industry by closing the legal, tax, and
regulatory loopholes that allow private equity firms to capture all
the rewards of their investments while insulating themselves from
risk.
* Require private investment firms, the firm’s general partners, and
their insiders to share responsibility for the liabilities of
companies under their control — including debt, legal judgments, and
pension-related obligations — to better align the incentives of
private equity firms and the companies they own.
* Ban dividends to investors and the outsourcing of jobs for two years
after a firm is acquired — ending the extraction of resources from
acquired companies.
* Prevent private equity firms from walking away when a company fails
and protect workers by improving rules so workers are more likely to
receive severance and pensions in a bankruptcy.
* Require private equity managers to disclose fees, returns, and other
information about their funds so that investors can monitor their
investments and shop around.
* Reinstate Dodd-Frank provisions that require regulators to address
risky leverage.

Big private equity firms have fat profits on the line here, so they’ll do
everything they can to block our reforms. That means we can win only if we
link arms, raise our voices together, and fight from the heart.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-stop-wall-street-looting/?refcode=EMZ30O_FIN_E_20260404_V1S1&t=1009&akid=2843%2E4032634%2ECsXtR3 ]Add your name here to say you support my Stop Wall Street Looting Act,
and side by side, we’ll tackle the private equity industry’s abuses.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

Donate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3571?t=1012&akid=2843%2E4032634%2ECsXtR3

Facebook: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=1002&akid=2843%2E4032634%2ECsXtR3
Twitter: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=1003&akid=2843%2E4032634%2ECsXtR3
Instagram: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=1004&akid=2843%2E4032634%2ECsXtR3

subject: Trump’s tradeoff
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20260404-2114-foote&t=1001&akid=2114%2E342411%2E-feRmd ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Republicans are once again trying to rip healthcare away from working
class families — this time, it’s to bankroll Trump’s illegal war in Iran
and ramp up immigration enforcement.

Instead of fixing our broken healthcare system, the GOP is working to gut
it, pulling from the very programs families rely on to survive just to
fuel more violence and division.

This isn’t about safety. It’s not about stability. It’s about sacrificing
innocent lives to push a hateful and dangerous agenda, all so this
administration can double down on the chaos they’ve caused.

They’re counting on people feeling overwhelmed by this chaos to accept it
as normal.

We refuse to let that happen.

At the Squad Victory Fund, we’re organizing and mobilizing to push back.
Our leaders, Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are on the front
lines, making it clear that our movement won’t stand by while Republicans
take reckless actions that put lives at risk both home and abroad.

We’re holding them accountable for their unchecked, dangerous decisions —
fighting for a future where our government invests in care, not cruelty.

But this fight takes all of us,
Peter.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20260404-movement.d4qc6l&refcode=em20260404-2114&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=2114%2E342411%2E-feRmd ]Chip in $3 today to help us keep pushing back, powering
our progressive champions who refuse to stay silent, and sending the
message that we will not accept a government that sacrifices working
people for political agendas.

The Squad Victory Fund

I could _tell_ you about my commitment to our state until I was blue in the face. But actions tend to speak louder:
* → In my time serving Colorado, I’ve visited each of our 64 counties multiple times. I always want to hear directly from you, the people I’m looking to serve. **_We entered this race early because I wanted to be sure your priorities went into my plan for a more affordable and resilient state._**
*
* → Over the course of this campaign, I’ve taken part in event after event where I’m the only candidate for governor who made time to attend. **_I’ve said from the start that real leaders show up. And I’ve stood by it._**
*
* → As your attorney general, I’ve returned hundreds of millions of dollars to your wallets and protected your rights by taking on irresponsible corporations, abusive employers, and the lawless Trump administration. **_As your next governor, I’ll keep answering to everyday Coloradans — not the ultra-wealthy or special interests._**

A combat aviator responds | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYE5U9NTRbOMLNsSMiwuHsSrn4JnyYtk1EREaCYHldIw2Es-lCsKe-k7RYeRErCjUmpL6YWg0aqprxBCSlqaUKjL6uf8EDq6vQVEaFZEFWaTvOKtPnFc2PEalY2SnM4_7XvbQtAt5jtQfMDJVHAl2xrtFeBqE6gDkYzt620q0wablsS_SKi6-lyEg7mMUq-UFrhAh5guVXAUMdWHnT7G2gyvvOZ6iVNTfzt86WsA_M-lmPrygrdPDufM4QesM33uSw/4pi/NvrEbbVMSa-cB-C7BQrH2Q/h0/h001.E9G0Vpp5FljCav1omvA-q0wBB8czDFTm_-yli5NsmRg)
---
Peter, Details are still unfolding, but it appears an American F-15E has been downed over Iran and a search and rescue operation is underway for the crew. One member of the two-person crew has reportedly been rescued while the search continues for the second servicemember. **As someone who has flown those missions, my thoughts are with them and their families right now.** I've been in that cockpit. I have strapped in, run my pre-flight, and flown into hostile airspace trusting that the people who sent me there had a plan worthy of what they were asking me to risk. **The servicemembers in that aircraft this morning deserved that same trust honored. ** Every American in uniform in that theater does. And yet, this administration still cannot tell you what winning this war looks like or how it ends. [**Help us put a combat veteran in Congress who will demand answers before more Americans find themselves in harm's way.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs6gc2C5hUDUAX_oNaSPVDobFeqfVfzIW2x4J26hzyt8xDNFok1sexv-VFFhfBgQzIKohFUie7JHradb-bnGN_8p9XBKmDAjzHdlrQbRsJ5K3uTJFTe9KX6uCQKx4tUn7uNjoAXvlu3ClCa-6lZOKTqbbf5cjNVHH57zZ66ADDDr6wblxOdS_72VAsrdcIxQZFuhmT_jRfD0DuTF5f-eQVvobbhQrhObNthSPmomtPwhSZuBpXEVlyuGOccogkV8b2SK453pJaGU55PjBAWTEsppMzjdn4vbjjyMXmdS9DtbfIhpLTDGGjV3uMRKjIYIGAF1AK6RjUk7KxirQDGwsg5/4pi/NvrEbbVMSa-cB-C7BQrH2Q/h1/h001.Pv9o7ffilMQ12bhvTsYJsHofjF3G3Ptioacxxd4P79o) American search and rescue aircraft are flying low over hostile territory looking for our service members right now. That is what the people we send to war do for each other without hesitation and without asking whether the mission made sense. The least the rest of us can do is make sure the people who send them are held to account for it. This week Trump stood in the White House and told the American people we cannot afford daycare, Medicaid, or Medicare because we are fighting wars. Wars he started. **So we cannot take care of our kids or our parents, but we can send an F-15 crew into hostile airspace with no plan for what comes next.** Keith Self has cheered every moment of this senseless war from his Foreign Affairs Committee seat without demanding a plan or an exit. **If those service members are wounded or killed he will undoubtedly say nice words without once considering what a congressman willing to do his job might have prevented.**
---

But before I do, please let me explain why your donation today is so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128769700/612301314/156431970?refcode=20260404am-nd&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTgxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmE0YmU0ZjItMzYzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i978Yj8B8Lw5YoxZ4lNOX2eBOdeBUtTOcjzW0jEQZMY=)
I never thought I’d run for Congress. After 34 years in the Navy, I retired planning to spend a lot more time with my husband and our kids. But when I see our constitution and our democracy under attack the way they are right now by people like Lauren Boebert, there was no answer other than to try to serve once again.
We can defeat Lauren Boebert and finally end her embarrassing political career. Adam Frisch only lost to Boebert by 546 votes in what was the closest race in the entire country. She is not invincible.
And if we do defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue, Democrats are basically guaranteed to take back the House this November!
But Lauren Boebert has taken millions of dollars from corporate PACs and the likes of Elon Musk. **If we are going to be able to fight back against the Super PAC lies and win, I am counting on grassroots donors like you to chip in to my campaign now.**
[**Please, will you make a monthly donation to my campaign right now – no amount is too small – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128769703/612301318/156431970?refcode=20260404am-nd&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTgxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmE0YmU0ZjItMzYzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=i978Yj8B8Lw5YoxZ4lNOX2eBOdeBUtTOcjzW0jEQZMY=)

clean_body: Hello – it’s Eileen Laubacher, the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Admiral running against Lauren Boebert. Hello – it’s Eileen Laubacher, the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Admiral running against Lauren Boebert – = I never thought I’d run for Congress. After 34 years in the Navy, I retired planning to spend a lot more time with my husband and our kids. But when I see our constitution and our democracy under attack the way they are right now by people like Lauren Boebert, there was no answer other than to try to serve once again. We can defeat Lauren Boebert and finally end her embarrassing political career. Adam Frisch only lost to Boebert by 546 votes in what was the closest race in the entire country. She is not invincible. And if we do defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue, Democrats are basically guaranteed to take back the House this November! But Lauren Boebert has taken millions of dollars from corporate PACs and the likes of Elon Musk. If we are going to be able to fight back against the Super PAC lies and win, I am counting on grassroots donors like you to chip in to my campaign now. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We can finally give Lauren Boebert the boot – but we can only do it together. Thank you, Eileen Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired) United States Navy ** Paid for by Eileen for Colorado Eileen for Colorado 9249 S Broadway #200-172 Highlands Ranch, CO 80129 United States Contributions or gifts to Eileen for Colorado are not tax deductible.

I’m a husband, farmer, father, retired Brigadier General – and I’m the Democrat running to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene on April 7th. Republicans have a historically low majority in Congress. If I flip this seat, it will bring the MAGA agenda to a halt. And that’s what they’re afraid of. Republicans know this race is important, so they’re flooding this election with cash. clean_body: | | | ALERT: We have just 3 days left to win the Georgia runoff election and break Republican control of Congress. I’m Shawn Harris. I’m a husband, farmer, father, retired Brigadier General – and I’m the Democrat running to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene on April 7th. Republicans have a historically low majority in Congress. If I flip this seat, it will bring the MAGA agenda to a halt. And that’s what they’re afraid of. Republicans know this race is important, so they’re flooding this election with cash. I need your help now more than ever. We rely on your grassroots support to keep this campaign going. = = = Thank you for standing with me, Shawn Harris = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia Jasmine Clark for Georgia 4370 Lawrenceville Hwy #96 Lilburn, GA 30048 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Trump didn’t wait.
He’s already endorsing a MAGA Republican in CA-01 — far earlier than expected. That tells you exactly how high the stakes are and how nervous Republicans have become about losing their majority.
They know what’s possible.
This special election isn’t just another off-cycle race. With the Republican majority hanging by a thread, flipping CA-01 from red to blue could shift control of the U.S. House before the midterms in November.
That’s why we need to act immediately. Will you rush a donation right now to help us scale the organizing needed to flip CA-01 and other critical districts across California? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april26?&refcode=&amount=]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april26?refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april26?refcode=&amount=] CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april26?&refcode=&amount=]The math doesn’t lie: If we win CA-01, there’s a true plausibility that Democrats could take back the U.S. House before November.
That’s exactly why Trump is jumping into the fray of a seemingly minor special election — and why we can’t afford to fall behind in our work to flip seats from red to blue in California.
When you donate to the California Democratic Party, you’re directly funding the organizing infrastructure that wins elections:
➡️ Voter outreach programs in key swing districts;
➡️ Door-to-door canvassing and volunteer recruitment every week;
➡️ Training new organizers to expand our footprint statewide;
➡️ Rapid-response efforts to push back on GOP attacks in real time.
This is what we call Forever Organizing.
It’s how we flipped three seats in 2024. It’s how we’ve built the strength to compete everywhere up and down the state. And it’s how we can flip CA-01 — and potentially take back the House sooner than anyone expected.
But none of this happens without sustained grassroots support.
We’re asking directly and humbly: Will you chip in today to help power the organizing that can flip seats and secure a Democratic House majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april26?&refcode=&amount=]

Washington is broken because too many politicians never leave. | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/HojLsUv371y5PsKcLS54wfj578FBDk_0nVefdFFldz6luax0DQjlT_fyz_52ooFrKQUOkXgOXOX6KBqVDP-SNyV2T7237mOkhv47rZoqgIvDfo8QFFyY9nlrEcqJS5jjamWN3dEPcahMNk7v3P1vmQ8D37aj7GGEJ1tH4ofeNniTJ-HXP_vMAmj6/L1A37iNuBXkxr604L1mLS1tGxrdFmQZr/19)_

| | Peter, Washington is broken because too many politicians never leave. They get elected, cut backroom deals, enrich themselves, and forget who they're supposed to serve:**the American people.** That's why I've introduced legislation for a Term Limits Amendment to the U.S. Constitution: ✅ No more than 3 terms in the House ✅ No more than 2 terms in the Senate ✅ Then it's time to go home and let new citizen-legislators serve
---
[ **SIGN TO DEMAND TERM LIMITS** ](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/NBVM7BklWT77k3KpION9YOLHAwGBppjV7RwvQZ8rbKBJzPgCoOUGhyniTpSUeQ3Os9Uzvhu5XjM4hFyQcElGP0duYRLkBeOtRaWVKdFn1jU-eJ3xcmml-_Pw-qXw0NZK-L5Omz1TwfRYe7q_V7VSYu-LBT5FdH20y_TLHxTnTXN36mrEUdI4T-hdDA3EdA2bHZRRvM2cCZEjgHckQ1CotV-PGDW2Z_7MY-rGKk9m4xCYIT-DY-NObg6bBzVyv2dJvXQ7qKdJgbisZJUAZ8-AYRq3G-az4jvkMvC32f2OYag2BHqpp4AQ5s9WIGJCXQdvSqotFcBD-l1MfyE_-FispipHWXfy5YLOtUSrLshXW2fM_MqgLVgaxk6nSGM6tVIDLz1vNxzZ5vGvL-WaZU1m0bFQfWQ-5uuQjpFKNFfTonu08v8xdtAnXsFnER0g4YqT4LRp7MtB_anFPjmny6YeqK4Tqb3l7-xVNal3SK4hFywkADSMsBnMJkcgY3t0nJ8dOl9TXNKHZWpoTNIOosnnROYK04OfzXndqcP95gnnUeE1t6-QpLPbs8rGhBbucYMVHqrEw5bDX4OhPWoj5AjnFxmOiumDweFITHs0qnO0Vnm5fVQm59IH55H3D97QFh-sxk8xWYSodPgrqOQgWXcKNvarycpnTg_CFK3T9SyilSFGf-vvkC2xwLddS9ORfB99CClBw6brkldaS6taxjU1emWSGlhVgFzWQleaX3NlaLNepJrwZPivhwzU0ul3tNNgYTea6JQ/LraCT6FW6hSl2IgD9R_P7_salyDWUZni/19)

This is about cleaning up the swamp once and for all. Career politicians have had decades to fix the mess -- instead, they created it. Just look around: ❌ "Woke" policies pushed by entrenched elites and special interests ❌ Pay-to-play schemes where lobbyists get favors and taxpayers get stuck with the bill ❌ Corrupt politicians like Nancy Pelosi who used insider information to get rich while in office **The American people have had enough. And that 's why I need you to join me right now.**

We are delivering these petitions directly to Capitol Hill. The bigger the stack, the louder the message. Congress needs to see, in no uncertain terms, that Americans demand term limits. This fight is not about party. It's about restoring government of, by, and for the people.** Polls show that more than 80% of Americans support term limits.** Republicans, Democrats, and Independents all agree: it's time to end the gravy train. clean_body: Washington is broken because too many politicians never leave. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Peter, Washington is broken because too many politicians never leave. They get elected, cut backroom deals, enrich themselves, and forget who they're supposed to serve:the American people. That's why I've introduced legislation for a Term Limits Amendment to the U.S. Constitution: ✅ No more than 3 terms in the House ✅ No more than 2 terms in the Senate ✅ Then it's time to go home and let new citizen-legislators serve This is about cleaning up the swamp once and for all. Career politicians have had decades to fix the mess -- instead, they created it. Just look around: ❌ "Woke" policies pushed by entrenched elites and special interests ❌ Pay-to-play schemes where lobbyists get favors and taxpayers get stuck with the bill ❌ Corrupt politicians like Nancy Pelosi who used insider information to get rich while in office The American people have had enough. And that 's why I need you to join me right now. My friends at Club for Growth have prepared an official addressed to your senators and representative. We are delivering these petitions directly to Capitol Hill. The bigger the stack, the louder the message. Congress needs to see, in no uncertain terms, that Americans demand term limits. This fight is not about party. It's about restoring government of, by, and for the people. Polls show that more than 80% of Americans support term limits. Republicans, Democrats, and Independents all agree: it's time to end the gravy train. Together, we can finally break the cycle of corruption and send career politicians packing. So please, don't wait. Every signature matters. Every petition adds pressure. And every American who joins this movement brings us one step closer to victory. For liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Club for Growth 2001 L St. NW, Ste 600 Washington, DC 20036 ph 202.955.5500

Nearly a year later, the Supreme Court ruled that the President does not have the power to impose broad-based tariffs. But there’s no clear process for how and when businesses and consumers will get their money back. [**That’s why I introduced the RELIEF Act, which would fix that for small businesses and Americans. It would require refunds within 90 days of when the government wrongfully collected tariffs. It would eliminate the need for businesses to file long applications. It would ensure refunds for tariffs that have been collected since January 1, 2025.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128771828/612307742/10378510?refcode=email_040426_reliefact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWY5ZDI3NTQtMzgzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Tb6l0RADYVUO5IRXwyJoRXTUZzM3-qtxuLvNBsYCvek=&emci=ebb7caa4-d32d-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=9f9d2754-3830-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=14434323) [_**Americans shouldn't have to pay the price for Trump’s incompetence. As of December 2025, the United States government collected $130 billion in tariffs.
Despite the Supreme Court ruling that these tariffs are illegal, businesses and consumers are still waiting to see their money returned.
Businesses and consumers shouldn’t have to foot the bill for the President and his administration’s reckless policies. It's past time this administration starts putting the American people first.
[_**That’s why I’m urging Congress to swiftly pass the RELIEF Act—and I need your support to get this done. body:
My resume is just a little different

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128771958/612308193/-1360420019?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_040426_futurecongresswomanRS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjlkMjc1NC0zODMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NEBYu-zJgIhkORvQbUAZtcV74rrjjij_w7CDAc2HhiQ=) Let’s be real: Before I won my first election, not a lot of people looked at me and thought: _That’s a future Congresswoman._ My resume? It’s just a little different from everyone else in Washington. I was raised by a single Army mom, paid my own way through college, worked on Native American reservations, and fought professionally in MMA on the side. **_[Even today, there are people who think I don’t belong here. But they’re wrong. I believe Congress should look more like the people it serves — more working people, more fighters, more real-world experience. When we won in 2018, we didn’t just break the mold of what a Congresswoman can look like.
**We smashed it.**
And together, we’ve delivered real results:
* We’ve brought tens of thousands of clean energy jobs to Kansas.
* We’ve passed the most significant bipartisan gun safety law in a generation.
* We’ve secured millions of dollars for early childhood education programs in the Third District.

That’s what happens when you send someone different to Washington — someone focused on getting things done.
But there’s more work ahead.
We need to ban Congressional stock trading. We need to close tax loopholes for billion-dollar corporations. And we need to make our economy work better for the Americans who are struggling today.
**And I’m more determined than ever to get it done.**
**_[If you’re with me — and you think someone with my background and my record deserves a seat in Congress — I’m humbly asking for your support. We just set a brand new April fundraising goal, and we need at least 100 individual donations within the next 24 hours to stay on track to hit it. clean_body: My resume is just a little different = Let’s be real: Before I won my first election, not a lot of people looked at me and thought: That’s a future Congresswoman. My resume? It’s just a little different from everyone else in Washington. I was raised by a single Army mom, paid my own way through college, worked on Native American reservations, and fought professionally in MMA on the side. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = When we won in 2018, we didn’t just break the mold of what a Congresswoman can look like. We smashed it. And together, we’ve delivered real results: We’ve brought tens of thousands of clean energy jobs to Kansas. We’ve passed the most significant bipartisan gun safety law in a generation. We’ve secured millions of dollars for early childhood education programs in the Third District. That’s what happens when you send someone different to Washington — someone focused on getting things done. But there’s more work ahead. We need to ban Congressional stock trading. We need to close tax loopholes for billion-dollar corporations. And we need to make our economy work better for the Americans who are struggling today. And I’m more determined than ever to get it done. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for standing with me. — Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Hi Peter, Yesterday morning, I proudly cast my vote to elect Chris Taylor to the Supreme Court of Wisconsin. **If you live in Wisconsin, you have until Tuesday, April 7 to cast your vote._[Make a plan to vote here, and be sure to bring a friend!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.A3cd-kVlFz1CzUMSYeTvVY6-Sz78ikC3E2WaOAHG34fY7YnKA2Lw1b9hlBog1agYAPFQb9WGQlwmiVMcSA_Cibr-Yn6ruCE5_hdNVg4UX0J-NtTITImqG2D3YbTQI5XMFmkxxKfktVkOVK725e65oaQKUPrDWeM5proehBCd-6NMh99oxhqhHM0hA50kDe1b3-z1OqRy-39oQeQ3f-fV_vcemPPy4uBoEz_8U7PdMfn-nUvoV7uZ2_i83B0VX3YoMI3G4Sd7_fT7Coo1tgLE9Q/4pi/cTlw6vwpRE2crQqHP0dqWQ/h1/h001.Wzqh8prl8OhSuQb_ve49FGf24o_NlnTT3a8fLJq_DgM)_** [Make a plan »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.A3cd-kVlFz1CzUMSYeTvVY6-Sz78ikC3E2WaOAHG34dgSsOyQ6YVcKQL4BrKnlZmVX6693ME9INjLICfHQzVHTpIv9w4qeegjPNGS_i7BO3Wt1d8XRWQMVD3EU_t6td7yq5XZXxziDXJvkduUGJJlJj20jrCAzWG5QlJVBzmwZP2GULQUYQ0n39r75UF3oIe-cqBl-0kZNp7RC2Z1PgIfCng9NR17ZwYKW73o3mHXhBy857OsFNdcBkTtm3Te8o_MBwNg1VZtg-d1QfLpEfLMQ/4pi/cTlw6vwpRE2crQqHP0dqWQ/h2/h001.EJJ-uvVg7XduEXrn1ENLy6YhCqEI6rPHgz18y5ZLXmI) If you've already voted, or don't live in Wisconsin, **can you reach out to 5 friends** and make sure that they have a plan to vote? A few reminders about voting in Wisconsin:
* If you have any questions about voting or encounter any issues while returning your ballot, **call or text the Voter Assistance Hotline at 608-336-3232.**
* **Bring your photo ID to vote!** Most voters use a Wisconsin Driver's License or State ID or a US Passport, but there are many convenient options.
* **You can register to vote at your polling place!** Just bring a document that proves your residence, like WI Driver's License or State ID, government correspondence, utility bill, or pay stub. It is never too late to register in person at a polling place.

clean_body: Find your nearest polling location and more by visiting wisdems.org/vote then make a plan to cast your ballot! | | Hi Peter, Yesterday morning, I proudly cast my vote to elect Chris Taylor to the Supreme Court of Wisconsin. If you live in Wisconsin, you have until Tuesday, April 7 to cast your vote. If you've already voted, or don't live in Wisconsin, can you reach out to 5 friends and make sure that they have a plan to vote? A few reminders about voting in Wisconsin: If you have any questions about voting or encounter any issues while returning your ballot, call or text the Voter Assistance Hotline at 608-336-3232. Bring your photo ID to vote! Most voters use a Wisconsin Driver's License or State ID or a US Passport, but there are many convenient options. You can register to vote at your polling place! Just bring a document that proves your residence, like WI Driver's License or State ID, government correspondence, utility bill, or pay stub. It is never too late to register in person at a polling place. We know that elections in Wisconsin often come down to the wire. That means that the work we do between now and Tuesday — talking to your friends and reminding them to vote — can decide the future of our state. Then, share this link with 5 friends. Here's the truth: If voting didn't matter, Republicans wouldn't be fighting tooth and nail to make it harder to cast your ballot. But here in Wisconsin, voting is safe, secure, and easy. So Peter, if you haven't already, make a plan to vote on Tuesday, April 7 to help shape the future of Wisconsin. Let's get to work. — David P.S. If you're looking for other ways to support Judge Taylor, there's still time to . “I’m running for Governor because I know what it’s like to struggle — and I’ve spent my life fighting to make sure no one gets left behind. Every Wisconsinite, no matter where they live, deserves opportunity, safety, and a government that works. That’s what this campaign is about — delivering for all of us. ” – David Crowley | Paid for by Crowley for Wisconsin PO Box 510031 Milwaukee, WI 53203 | | Sent via . Peter, We’re down to the **FINAL DAYS** before the election in GA-14 this **Tuesday**. Our team is on the ground right now, knocking on doors and calling voters across the district. We’re reaching out to every last person who believes in Shawn Harris’s vision for lower costs, better jobs, and health care that works for working families. **But to finish strong, we need your help.** [Will you rush a donation of $10 right now to fund our final voter outreach?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128773674/612312662/-1692272226?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_040426_B1_GOTV1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGE4NjgxZi0zYjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uK5W1V4qEToXik8eHELFUDm5YGI8LvW-22b5liPdTMk=) Republicans are pouring millions into this race to defend MTG’s old seat. **We can’t let them outwork us in these final days.** Every dollar you give today will go directly to reaching more voters — through mail, texts, digital ads, and volunteer efforts that turn supporters into voters. | Georgia Democrats have a long history of fighting for change.

It's never been more important for every one of us to use our voices to speak up and be heard.

But we rely on grassroots support to fuel our fight. Without you, we’re nothing. name: Roy Cooper
subject: I know how to win a swing state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Will you join me in the fight?

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128773913/612313133/-148926518?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_RoyCooperSplit_260404_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGY5NjUyNS0zYjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADsqibubfm61_lBpWPjt2v2dA5IA6tDhXaChirhUd4c=) **Winning in a swing state isn’t easy, Derek.**

_Not when the other side is throwing everything they’ve got at you.

Not when President Trump makes you a personal target._

**That’s where things stand here in North Carolina ahead of the midterm elections.**

Our election is the most competitive U.S. Senate race anywhere in the country — it’s the one that will determine whether or not we can take back the Senate for the people and break the GOP’s one-party hold on Washington.

President Trump and his political allies are targeting me. Far-right PACs and megadonors are lined up to pour hundreds of millions into defeating me. _But I know that we can win._

You see, I’ve won some of the most competitive statewide races here in battleground NC. In fact, _I have never lost a race_. Over and over, we’ve won _together_ — and that’s how we’ll win again.

[_**Far-right Republicans are terrified that I’m the Democrat who can flip this seat from red to blue for the first time since 2008. I’m asking you to donate to help me prove that we can. Split any amount between our campaign and Mark Warner to join me in the fight.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128773914/612313134/-148926518?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_RoyCooperSplit_260404_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGY5NjUyNS0zYjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADsqibubfm61_lBpWPjt2v2dA5IA6tDhXaChirhUd4c=) ******[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128773915/612313135/-148926518?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_RoyCooperSplit_260404_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGY5NjUyNS0zYjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADsqibubfm61_lBpWPjt2v2dA5IA6tDhXaChirhUd4c=)****** Appreciate your help,

Roy Cooper ******[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128773916/612313136/-148926518?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_RoyCooperSplit_260404_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGY5NjUyNS0zYjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADsqibubfm61_lBpWPjt2v2dA5IA6tDhXaChirhUd4c=)******

name: Pennsylvania Working Families Party
subject: New reporting raises serious questions in PA-07
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
Bob Brooks’ Democratic opponent prosecuted immigrants — now he wants your vote. | | | Peter, **New reporting raises serious questions about a candidate challenging Working Families Party-endorsed Bob Brooks in Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District.** Ryan Crosswell, who is running in the Democratic primary against Bob, admitted to voting for GOP presidential candidates and actively carrying out immigration enforcement during Trump’s first term — all while he was a registered Republican. That raises real questions about his values and about whether we can trust him. In a leaked video, Crosswell admitted that he voted for George W. Bush, John McCain, and Mitt Romney.1 He was even a registered Republican until after 2024 — through the chaos of Trump’s first term and the full Biden administration. This is disqualifying. **This also means that Crosswell has support from big-money corporate interests who want to elect a Democrat in Name Only to this seat.** The primary is a little over a month away, and Crosswell is the most well-funded candidate in the race. [**We don’t need to match him dollar for dollar, but we do need the resources to out-organize him. Every dollar you chip in now helps WFP and Bob’s campaign knock doors, send texts, make calls, and fight for every vote to defeat a former Republican. Can you split a donation between PA WFP and Bob’s campaign today?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCTOJOlJtHjem5Jl-7GZopNw1CJ0sckAYY168-DNAaCEZxhUPGZDZpx0LRJk60aYSffGUQhnuG-vaY1VhZPye-wU6RIJHzQryK2-RPenWSQv_1s6mn1QInlSwAthJ4H2m11-qhkq5vCNmeZ77r8Qyvu-3WkKuBOzfC270ojIS4kTde6F4fo0eBivZ-IeKEXg_WonVSPdZJoBVvG6owqzyvxvO-EhkHX_muSWgp6abschrjCwrMo-rG2RXpYRJiPbY_4G3vacuZOm6p_XgCXAKpZyJml8VrCQ21scWE08icLQJwqlcS4L5PzhYD_ZRUxYt_EEOU4GhbeBNrA5QIyjhXMe7uHw6uTnGhNqS8gatjQ1g/4pi/0Q5gyfmATtm_RwQGQHJ-6w/h0/h001.2rT2NQ7QpzEk1WBMhmvSQmJ7JV11JR7O-9s_hj-jvS4) **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCTOJOlJtHjem5Jl-7GZopNw1CJ0sckAYY168-DNAaCEaBAmjsq9j-12gu1XX_n97b5pMxvKWi_iGZ4FJmNv75EzLX4KcRCo6DYOHvF5SVELvyCbIcINQfu1ahX4l9yX8bJyntVdFiGIcv_s4OdOBry1BSQmmdjmuq5han6ndo3R_XP5EveAFst9fzysRuubOE840OCFFe2E8d2DCTcSUvzV4V6h4NdgQhTLEMhpoUBQZw_tMrSL1TRARK0HzBXN6MSVy8o-WdazBsOhE3ym38U2JovK8nY9MDh_6kovtd9DOkj5rAGt6brUOEqhrjUbFsoDBkTj7wjljsiLOi0eK_yb91uL0nPN6cOpOSJgJRtf0/4pi/0Q5gyfmATtm_RwQGQHJ-6w/h1/h001.icYHC6KesMAjsGv3zJR4n6QVJ2Z64HpmI9PyiRsQ2ZY)** The new reporting raises additional questions about whether Crosswell has the values to represent this community in the House. **He spent three years prosecuting immigration cases for the Trump administration in San Diego** , through the administration’s disgusting immigration crackdowns and family separation policy. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCTOJOlJtHjem5Jl-7GZopNw1CJ0sckAYY168-DNAaCEZledRVNaWyNrstQB3ZBQqWwiLN7nZgsLTsxk9QMzg2eIkwLvYHO1J2Q74hFnn1MaZOoyMJn8ovyAFbXHbWQ1KnpXFPKPyaGSTzgOqmCbkvr1RztHnfxpmiGPhLC8tl6xY3frghidiHbijohaJvZybj9dULjr-mHxr-l78hQiNvHlmPuBNI61a61RmsB1UawMkeAcxYOLeiuhcezLiHh3kWUzYOwbhN9yG8ukMrhETYPnscU6tsQp72bcyxOiwUpYDQKp5Lf8uV4Ns9CuMEmFFBYRC7i69DI2x_BfVIciZwc6vAFjpXqwMIUhSj--hVxQ0/4pi/0Q5gyfmATtm_RwQGQHJ-6w/h2/h001.sg6LrPbKTrPCWjz0yyZMez-P8ib8kzmpBojvpSg6dEQ) In Crosswell’s own words:_“I’ve prosecuted many, many people for coming to this country illegally.”_ That wasn’t just a small part of his job. It was the work. From 2018 through 2020, as Trump officials pushed prosecutors to take these cases as far as possible, Crosswell stayed in that role. He didn’t step away. He didn’t speak out. He chose to do that work. Only after Donald Trump returned to power did he switch parties and begin asking voters here in PA-07 for their trust. When he had the power to fight back against Trump during the first term, he stayed in his role, carrying out immigration crackdowns. **But here in the Lehigh Valley, working families remember what those years felt like.** Families in Allentown are still making plans for what to do if ICE shows up. Parents in Bethlehem are having to prepare their kids for that possibility. That reality doesn’t just go away. So when voters look at this race, the question of who’s actually been on our side isn’t complicated. **That’s why the Working Families Party endorsed Bob Brooks.** Bob has spent years organizing in the Lehigh Valley, and unlike Crosswell, his immigration platform aligns with our values. He was the first candidate in the race to call for Kristi Noem to be removed as head of DHS, and he vowed to bring ICE and CBP into the halls of Congress to testify about their overreach after he wins this seat. We must elect WFP champions like Bob to Congress so we can build governing power with leaders who have working people’s backs. That means fighting for healthcare we can rely on, good jobs that support our families, and childcare when and where we need it. clean_body: Bob Brooks’ Democratic opponent prosecuted immigrants — now he wants your vote. | | | Peter, New reporting raises serious questions about a candidate challenging Working Families Party-endorsed Bob Brooks in Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District. Ryan Crosswell, who is running in the Democratic primary against Bob, admitted to voting for GOP presidential candidates and actively carrying out immigration enforcement during Trump’s first term — all while he was a registered Republican. That raises real questions about his values and about whether we can trust him. In a leaked video, Crosswell admitted that he voted for George W. Bush, John McCain, and Mitt Romney.1 He was even a registered Republican until after 2024 — through the chaos of Trump’s first term and the full Biden administration. This is disqualifying. This also means that Crosswell has support from big-money corporate interests who want to elect a Democrat in Name Only to this seat. The primary is a little over a month away, and Crosswell is the most well-funded candidate in the race. The new reporting raises additional questions about whether Crosswell has the values to represent this community in the House. He spent three years prosecuting immigration cases for the Trump administration in San Diego , through the administration’s disgusting immigration crackdowns and family separation policy. In Crosswell’s own words:“I’ve prosecuted many, many people for coming to this country illegally.” That wasn’t just a small part of his job. It was the work. From 2018 through 2020, as Trump officials pushed prosecutors to take these cases as far as possible, Crosswell stayed in that role. He didn’t step away. He didn’t speak out. He chose to do that work. Only after Donald Trump returned to power did he switch parties and begin asking voters here in PA-07 for their trust. When he had the power to fight back against Trump during the first term, he stayed in his role, carrying out immigration crackdowns. But here in the Lehigh Valley, working families remember what those years felt like. Families in Allentown are still making plans for what to do if ICE shows up. Parents in Bethlehem are having to prepare their kids for that possibility. That reality doesn’t just go away. So when voters look at this race, the question of who’s actually been on our side isn’t complicated. That’s why the Working Families Party endorsed Bob Brooks. Bob has spent years organizing in the Lehigh Valley, and unlike Crosswell, his immigration platform aligns with our values. He was the first candidate in the race to call for Kristi Noem to be removed as head of DHS, and he vowed to bring ICE and CBP into the halls of Congress to testify about their overreach after he wins this seat. We must elect WFP champions like Bob to Congress so we can build governing power with leaders who have working people’s backs. That means fighting for healthcare we can rely on, good jobs that support our families, and childcare when and where we need it. Your support helps us knock doors, have real conversations, and make sure voters know exactly who’s been on their side. In solidarity, The PA Working Families Party Source: 1\. , X, March 1, 2026 Become a Working Families Party Member! Other political groups have corporate donors. We have you. . name: Scott Brown
subject: The fight we’re in now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc
body:
Friend,
The U.S. Supreme Court recently heard a case that could change everything for
girls’ and women’s sports – including right here in New Hampshire.

<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/girls-sports-scotus-email-cs?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=cs&utm_campaign=20250404_girlssports_cs?&utm_term=SUMMIT>
If the Court sides with the Left, girls could lose their spots, their
scholarships, and any hope of fair competition.

As a former girls’ basketball coach and, more importantly, as a dad, this hits
close to home.

<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/girls-sports-scotus-email-cs?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=cs&utm_campaign=20250404_girlssports_cs?&utm_term=SUMMIT>
I coached my daughter’s team. I watched those girls push themselves, support
each other, and give everything they had on the court. They earned every win,
and they played by the rules.

But now, the Left is trying to rewrite the rules and erase fairness for girls
like my daughter. And they’re using the courts to do it.

That’s one of the many reasons I’m running for U.S. Senate.

New Hampshire needs someone who won’t be afraid to tell the truth. Who won’t
bend to the woke mob. Who will fight like hell for fairness, biology, and
common sense.

But I can’t do this alone. This race is already one of the most competitive
in the country. National Democrats are pouring in millions to defend this seat
and keep another strong conservative voice out of the Senate.

If we’re going to flip this seat and keep the Senate, I need a grassroots team
behind me. Can I count on you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to
help us fight back and WIN, Friend?
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/girls-sports-scotus-email-cs?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=cs&utm_campaign=20250404_girlssports_cs?&utm_term=SUMMIT>
TAKE A STAND
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/girls-sports-scotus-email-cs?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=cs&utm_campaign=20250404_girlssports_cs?&utm_term=SUMMIT>
This campaign isn’t about me. It’s about protecting opportunity, protecting
our daughters, and protecting the values we believe in.

Let’s build a team that fights as my girls did with heart, grit, and
everything we’ve got.

Thank you for standing with me,

<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/girls-sports-scotus-email-cs?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=cs&utm_campaign=20250404_girlssports_cs?&utm_term=SUMMIT>
Scott P. Brown

Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc.
Scott Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank,
job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Army
or the Department of Defense.

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: “Still, I rise”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
celebrating Maya Angelou
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=3506%2E52803%2E4Ll1Mp)
| | Today, on what would have been Maya Angelou’s 98th birthday, I’ve been thinking about the power of her words — and what it means to live them. She once wrote, _“Do the best you can until you know better. Then when you know better, do better.”_ I carry that with me. In her honor, I want to highlight the work of the _Maya Angelou Schools & See Forever Foundation_, an organization carrying her legacy forward every single day. Too many young people in this country are told their future is already decided. But I’ve seen what happens when we choose a different path; when we invest in people, not just punish them. When we lead with opportunity, not judgment. This organization helps justice-involved youth rewrite their stories and build brighter futures. It’s exactly the kind of moral leadership we need right now. Leadership that invests in education and community.
Leadership that refuses to give up on people. That’s the kind of leader I’m working hard to be in the Senate. I firmly believe no one should be counted out. Not in Maryland. Not anywhere. Today, we honor Maya Angelou not just by remembering her words but by living them every day. **[Will you chip in $10 today to help me keep fighting for a future where every Marylander has the chance to rise above?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/40443?t=9&amount=10&akid=3506%2E52803%2E4Ll1Mp)** | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/40443?t=10&amount=10&akid=3506%2E52803%2E4Ll1Mp)
---
With gratitude,
Angela Alsobrooks
| | [ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=2&akid=3506%2E52803%2E4Ll1Mp)
---
| | An important update from Team Alsobrooks:

Angela is so thankful for this grassroots team’s support and is eager to get to work for Marylanders in the Senate. That’s why you’ll be receiving fewer fundraising emails from us moving forward, in an effort to not clog up your inbox for the next six years.

Instead, we’d rather send you emails you want to read – like updates on Angela’s work in the Senate, or rundowns of key issues and news stories from Washington.

But to make this possible, we’re relying on supporters like you to consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution of $3 or even $5 to keep our operations running while Angela is busy fighting for Maryland families.

[Make a recurring contribution to Angela Alsobrooks' campaign here.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/33703?t=3&akid=3506%2E52803%2E4Ll1Mp)

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw

Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]
