name: James Carville
subject: A damn close race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I need your attention RIGHT NOW!
**Chris Pappas and his Republican opponent John Sununu are TIED in the latest poll out of New Hampshire. THIS RACE IS CLOSER THAN NC, GA, AND ME!**
**[We have a decision to make: Are we gonna do EVERYTHING we can to help Chris Pappas win and flip the Senate? Or are we gonna risk another Trump Trifecta? I know where I stand, and if you’re with me, don’t wait another minute – chip in RIGHT NOW to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue »** I’ve seen a lot of campaigns in my day, so trust me when I say: This TIED poll is a **_jump ball_** in this Senate race. Whoever grabs it first gets a huge advantage. In a race that will see INSANE amounts of spending (we’re talking hundreds of millions of dollars here), we need _every win we can get._ These stakes are ASTRONOMICAL: You’ve got Chris Pappas, a tried and true fighter for working families, vs. a guy who’s promised to be a yes-man for Donald Trump and his TRILLIONAIRE class. **And now they’re tied in the polls.** If we don’t rally around Chris right now, we could LOSE this Senate race. So I have to ask you again: **_Will you do what it takes to win and hold this seat for Democrats?_** **[It’s time to fight like hell for New Hampshire and the country’s future. Chip in $5 or whatever you can right now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260404_1.0jPyix&refcode=em20260404-1&t=2&akid=5928%2E582294%2EjLoaux)** **[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260404_1.0jPyix&amount=5&refcode=em20260404-1&t=21&akid=5928%2E582294%2EjLoaux)** **_45-44._** That’s a damn close race. name: Katie Porter
subject: I packed up the minivan and hit the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41094%2E3422442%2EVsIs3q)
Peter,
I’ve packed up the minivan, grabbed my markers, and hit the road for the **Whiteboard Warriors Tour** —talking to Californians in every corner of the state about the struggles we all face.
Recently, I stopped in Bakersfield, Kings County, and San Luis Obispo, meeting with families trying to stretch every dollar, small business owners juggling payroll, and parents trying to balance work and life.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260404_1_ak.u2F48n&refcode=em20260404-41094&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41094%2E3422442%2EVsIs3q)
_I shared my plan to make life more affordable for working Californians:_
* Single-payer health care for all.
* Free child care, so parents don’t have to choose between their kids and their job.
* Tuition-free public college, because no one should go into debt just to get an education.
* Housing that doesn’t cost a fortune and push families out of California.

I know the struggle so many Californians face firsthand. I’m a single mom who clips coupons, balances the budget at the kitchen table, and drives an old car. I live it every day.
**And unlike my billionaire and corporate-backed opponents, I get it—because I’m in it with you. We’ve had enough of leaders who are bought and paid for.**
Staying on the road, meeting voters, and having these conversations takes resources, but it’s what we need to do to win this race. So I’m asking:
**[Can you chip in today to keep the Whiteboard Warriors Tour going and reach voters before the June primary? Every dollar helps us talk to more people and share our plan for a California that works for families—not just the wealthy.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260404_1_ak.u2F48n&refcode=em20260404-41094&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41094%2E3422442%2EVsIs3q)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260404_1_ak.u2F48n&refcode=em20260404-41094&t=23&akid=41094%2E3422442%2EVsIs3q)
Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260404-41094&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=41094_3422442_VsIs3q&akid=41094%2E3422442%2EVsIs3q)**

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

subject: Dirt poor and raised by my Mamaw
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email, but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:
[](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=c52e15487d1c4ee880daf497e36a7839&_e=ABGTJMZkmunmhRIZrobZbUdLnD1-8d7idG8e2L4pyqtXcPsdzNPeCnx3mzWGZhtmF99tOmYwXaW-5EjtgjSzAg3XHSjuMNzjQyyW3eu96Jm1Yhj33ANcovu2sWGIinRo1N0LkuZSyBvVjwS2n85JbBXkOgq2fEjVvFBbXhWp3aYSWFHqB0lh32-IX01sAd-9yJnPWdh8rB-6Om5EAu06JEdzZiSRMh_LHuY75S_Hkot3kujhkC2RojYBq8TyJ77ZTlcvz_mquKRS7KKrh3u0qH_pQn1KKZJWLxPoXGrFZKLJ5K2GA5RIYpeKvLh6_jVFzn8LcHcKbPk6nenFoMEgtBFlD_PQ8gqfEPQ9EFhNYO_how10OuGCz5CuMhn5Wu8zRYhLc8mNSO1rYhKslpyI4KQvPSoLzKbCC1VgktJphjimWhgS0Ohf7DOr6A8K8gg1mCDptAeLBPqvmtzsNJENpDfs73xToc-em5NSJpYayYUzvnNpOUiz8BKjUdWJdCqm9pp76busvZ-r24NvJuj7xeZBfWEO-EDzjUyKLJP3rsu47kfC1gMQcT83zlsFFvEgFbRzpTwJ1y-uWyhsR6s9tKaoXu40wZuv1XPsanvhfgFekFtt3aRAQee0H70G02gxpzDS0dCwjczB_cAu0Ra0zSFBPlJltSl-fp8zQwvq02oDtJ6GvWChgt61LCTZWi-Ms5XLXPOv-D-rNBHlOX13vA%3D%3D) My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.
[This is a longer email, but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish.](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=c52e15487d1c4ee880daf497e36a7839&_e=ABGTJMZkmunmhRIZrobZbUdLnD1-8d7idG8e2L4pyqtXcPsdzNPeCnx3mzWGZhtmF99tOmYwXaW-5EjtgjSzAg3XHSjuMNzjQyyW3eu96Jm1Yhj33ANcovu2sWGIinRo1N0LkuZSyBvVjwS2n85JbBXkOgq2fEjVvFBbXhWp3aYSWFHqB0lh32-IX01sAd-9yJnPWdh8rB-6Om5EAu06JEdzZiSRMh_LHuY75S_Hkot3kujhkC2RojYBq8TyJ77Zr-p3RRTvfszEyBVYZWl7B1jvwXZ71edTozcx1OSnTEifZ_p92lXVq3a6ysgXpP7DaH-LLt9afAemX3J4m-91Ot7t5zqGs4p8hfJ3CmOtBWGKPyFcKRiigB-o-cCfHWjh16PnGObs79MIXL7Qyek-eFsuAqVpOd2nvXgclb4JSjt5v7pRvCX5oAWIsl6DnLo-qcEZ4t34gH5dv6joA3zqCJVRrYclWMpMLNXhyKm4R8t9mNA2yyBErhm-vhdLCXAozTqxkAZUrL3YVJfv0qC3HfJGrBHa9-9HHu-TbNawziw8E-8wJTsFumq5Cwxp-HAorJAksc4IAHXs6OC-XGRW4FaQgf7YTamVeOPo_J64HJW-sD4ZyoM42A2BualgtmHCNSDf1DqyEPBQF1KgfJUy2FR3DsGN9htXJbe2KZ-Kz6ehE41Vf0X-KcwueD7xInru_-9R9kT_BmQ3O-gZI1TT5w%3D%3D)
It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up dirt poor, I was raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.
It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.
But I felt God called me to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I believe millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.
As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC.
I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.
I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.
[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=c52e15487d1c4ee880daf497e36a7839&_e=ABGTJMZkmunmhRIZrobZbUdLnD1-8d7idG8e2L4pyqtXcPsdzNPeCnx3mzWGZhtmF99tOmYwXaW-5EjtgjSzAg3XHSjuMNzjQyyW3eu96Jm1Yhj33ANcovu2sWGIinRo1N0LkuZSyBvVjwS2n85JbBXkOgq2fEjVvFBbXhWp3aYSWFHqB0lh32-IX01sAd-9yJnPWdh8rB-6Om5EAu06JEdzZiSRMh_LHuY75S_Hkot3kujhkC2RojYBq8TyJ77Z1VK9Htnj30Scd77EZbmDKeXg55i8IjGSY9H87lwyL2akyZHrMUM2YwlWLFc6Of_VgFDUQo32ENjIx4K1g3JQUtZhTs-7-GHvfRU5GOGr8I0BEjV4HF6My4XBlFZJZ5zZiVpWuXmkYALpCtpqFMknQxVd9SyGnjWgERC4GsxM-8uqR312j7OPV9LxAkJgzDuf88HYvPeFZDgA3rQtTIQR_NmR0N5mEuTeIjgkjuMFGwwI2siF-ZNC_aIGf1r9GnWL-LurXxN2KmNAed_rlmxH9aX94491fULrv_Dx3tUArCQhS5yj2LjuxbXf9570Wgxr5B49I57oGZObveAxNmA3nW2-sppg1He6y288bjWjhQLojRBgaybiPm6qIW6BZNFd4vaxGq0SHVqayX9AiGrxozjP_gJFOWcqS0Z4PS0Hz9t9cbAMOPReOpY7kkABR1dUkNkwypHQpbKIDzebzqhntw%3D%3D)
We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.
So now we're forced to rebuild.
The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.
At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.
So here's my final pitch to you:

clean_body: This is a longer email, but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up dirt poor, I was raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt God called me to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I believe millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer. I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance \- Democrat Leadership formed an anti-Trump task force \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are suing the Trump Administration \- A House Democrat just introduced 7 Articles of Impeachment If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT! **Hunting them.**
Drones. Military-grade rifles. Coordinated ambushes designed to kill Americans in uniform.

And Jon Ossoff?

Silent as a church mouse.

Because Chuck Schumer told him to be.

See, Schumer needs the border open. He needs the chaos. He needs the cartels moving freely so Democrats can keep counting bodies and calling it a "humanitarian crisis" instead of what it really is:

clean_body: 🚨 THEY'RE HUNTING OUR BORDER AGENTS. THIS ENDS NOW. Patriot, let me tell you something that ought to make your blood boil. Not sneaking across. Not running from law enforcement. Hunting them. Drones. Military-grade rifles. Coordinated ambushes designed to kill Americans in uniform. And Jon Ossoff? Silent as a church mouse. Because Chuck Schumer told him to be. See, Schumer needs the border open. He needs the chaos. He needs the cartels moving freely so Democrats can keep counting bodies and calling it a "humanitarian crisis" instead of what it really is: An invasion. And Ossoff has voted with Schumer's open-border agenda every single time he had the chance to stop it. While American families bury loved ones lost to fentanyl, fentanyl that crossed that same border Ossoff REFUSES to secure, They live behind walls. They have private security. Their kids don't go to schools flooded with cartel poison. Yours might. I'm Mike Collins. I'm a Georgian, a businessman, and a fighter who believes if you won't defend this country's border, you've got no business sitting in the United States Senate. But right now, I need to hear from YOU. We're building a Rapid Response Poll from America First patriots across Georgia and this great country. I want to know exactly where you stand, because your voice shapes this fight. 👉 Thank you, Mike Collins (R-GA) Candidate for United States Senate PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO BOX 6491 ATHENS, GA 30604 Hey, if you're still reading this, don't forget to follow Mike Collins for Senate on and and TEXT MIKE TO 70622 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please . |

We did it.

With your support, we closed out our first FEC deadline of the year strong — and I don’t take that for granted.

I know what it means to give right now. People are making real choices with their time, their energy, and their resources. So when you choose to be part of this, it matters. It truly does.

**Now, we’re less than two months out from the June 2 primary.** Every conversation, every door we knock, every person we reach between now and then will shape the outcome of this race.

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquO38L98SklfBdoDq94y0bmIPp1sMsxRlzUR9IaKq2v2puU8kJVX-AM67qyxOu1ekQaKKvCMANTqU0goUhuEfJx5IVCm7yEMuSRcr47lVKuDne44S9xGXOkLNIX_b1JcEbxfMktEd7bYSH4a8hz368GIsm-egB-OPnHnD-g4LwwdiJ_Wirt4cR1vPpM8Ho5PMuLGmH3PRUccFT_n6LKWOg_RqCEMcDmMmFJVCACyfBgDdXreTkFu6YYH8A9ktCQclzZv4oxGuGQgPMOMexM2TGamW1thru6hV1xKQs22R34B82CKxzZAVubRNgOtQg53tc/4pi/ajGGatAJTESmoHwrFEF7VQ/h1/h001.CRmRbb6-6zysTiiY84XMywx5v6bDqKw5q7AmwWuABGQ) _Two months out. This is the team building something real, together._
Because when I look at this campaign, I’m reminded of what it actually is. It’s not consultants or corporate money. It’s people showing up. Neighbors bringing in friends. Trust being built, one conversation at a time.

That’s how we got through this deadline. And that’s how we’re going to win.

Thank you for showing up for this campaign — and for believing in what we’re building together.

Mai is the daughter of Hmong refugees, born and raised in Sacramento. Mai’s parents fled war in Laos and arrived in California to find a new life.

As the oldest of 16 children, she helped raise her siblings while working hard to build a career dedicated to helping her community thrive. Mai is a proud product of public schools and was the first in her family to attend college. As a young organizer, Mai returned home to serve the community that raised and supported her.

name: Jerri Green
subject: It’s Time to Flip Tables in Tennessee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Green for Governor
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128776084/612318747/-1977837920?refcode=4.04_Easter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWJiM2I1Ni0zZjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-oLul6gZaNWrG-oa1Y9xWD626jxv6FwylJSD_RBjx_w=&emci=58fccfe5-3130-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=01bb3b56-3f30-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=53531271)
---
Friend,

As we enter Easter weekend, I find myself reflecting on a powerful moment in the life of Jesus, when he entered the temple and witnessed money changers exploiting a sacred space for profit and in righteous anger at that injustice, he began flipping tables. He didn’t whisper about injustice. He confronted it. **Loudly. Publicly. Unapologetically.** _That same moral clarity is urgently needed in Tennessee today._ **Jesus fed the hungry.** Yet today, politicians are working to strip away SNAP benefits while families struggle with rising grocery costs. **Jesus healed the sick.** Yet we’re watching healthcare access shrink and rural hospitals close across our state. **Jesus embraced the marginalized,** the Samaritan woman, the lepers, those cast aside by society. Right now in Tennessee, immigrant families live in fear as harsh policies tear communities apart. **Jesus also reminded us:** “It is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich man to enter the kingdom of God.” Still, we see billionaire-backed politicians pushing policies that consolidate more wealth and power for the super-rich while leaving working families behind. **That’s not compassion. That’s not justice. And it’s not reflective of the Tennessee we believe in.** Many politicians, like Marsha Blackburn, invoke faith as a weapon, wielding it to justify policies that harm the very people Jesus called us to love and protect. But faith should never be a cudgel. It is a call to serve, to uplift, and to stand unyielding against injustice. _**If Jesus was willing to flip tables over the exploitation and hypocrisy he witnessed his time, then surely we are called to act in ours.**_ We can't settle for the status quo. We can’t sit quietly while our neighbors struggle. We _can_ organize, we _can_ speak out, and yes, **we __can__ flip Tennessee blue.** Together, we can build a state that reflects our shared values: **_compassion over cruelty_ , f _reedom over fascism_ , **and**_people over profits._** This Easter, let’s remember that change has always required courage and willingness to do what is hard. But hard is not impossible. Let’s make a commitment today, to honor Christ’s legacy not just with words, but with works, even and especially when it's hard.. _**Let’s get to work. It’s time to flip tables in Tennessee! **_ _**[Now is the moment to act. To organize. To get involved and do your part in whatever way you can. I’m ready to put in the work that its going to take to win this race. Are you ready to stand with us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128776085/612318748/-843357993?refcode=4.04_Easter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWJiM2I1Ni0zZjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-oLul6gZaNWrG-oa1Y9xWD626jxv6FwylJSD_RBjx_w=)**_ | | [JOIN OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128776086/612318749/-1977837920?refcode=4.04_Easter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWJiM2I1Ni0zZjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-oLul6gZaNWrG-oa1Y9xWD626jxv6FwylJSD_RBjx_w=&emci=58fccfe5-3130-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=01bb3b56-3f30-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=53531271)

Jerri Green

If Jesus was willing to flip tables over the exploitation and hypocrisy he witnessed his time, then surely we are called to act in ours. We can't settle for the status quo. We can’t sit quietly while our neighbors struggle. We can organize, we can speak out, and yes, we can flip Tennessee blue. Together, we can build a state that reflects our shared values: compassion over cruelty , f reedom over fascism , andpeople over profits. This Easter, let’s remember that change has always required courage and willingness to do what is hard. But hard is not impossible. Let’s make a commitment today, to honor Christ’s legacy not just with words, but with works, even and especially when it's hard.. Let’s get to work. It’s time to flip tables in Tennessee! = | | | With hope and determination, Jerri Green Democratic Candidate for Governor Green For Governor P.O. Box 40034 Memphis, TN 38174 United States mailto:team@greenforgovernor.com | Paid for by Green for Governor. Hendrell Remus, Treasurer.

Friend, We are witnessing the same genocidal playbook used against Palestinians in Gaza, now in Lebanon. In less than a month of escalated U.S.-backed Israeli attacks, entire generations of families are gone, from grandparents to toddlers to days-old infants. High-ranking Israeli government and military officials have announced their plans to use “the Gaza model, but in Lebanon.” They’ve ordered the forced displacement of more than 1.2 million people (20% of Lebanon’s population) and are telling the refugees that they won’t be allowed to return to their homes. They’re also openly planning to indefinitely occupy Lebanese territory. Their genocidal intent to ethnically cleanse southern Lebanon is clear. We must act now to stop these crimes against humanity, which are only possible because of U.S. support and U.S. taxpayer dollars. [**Will you demand Congress end this ethnic cleansing? Please sign our petition to support new policies I introduced to stop the U.S.-backed Israeli military’s illegal invasion of Lebanon.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9HWtiGz5LuqdYdydHcioHim5IEQYatb6Q98O8Cpy0TjJTRT6yU1JJvThwZ-ZFynI-2cmJH7HhzzzsrShJSkuHfpSJmOiIanrYDCDyT9I0IGUxVRVsCBYzlYaUHkCkfObiR9j8bxihVFjRA7XeR_8WgJvQudtstiBsMaGcqnxHFKqN2-F6BfGz-PNo_8X6OJM8nLXPbNdxWRNjCs_wpZyFEnQ_II2pv2ap-5eHqIDVO0Wuc7BUvoWQHU02fyP2BIbNTu2EZkemZj9A4NfGHfQx2J9T7be1DJB3MQOEskeS5IAg5TiRGujkK6bmV1xTNQHRsp5_aplQztcz0rCeFBYoZFhtW579vXpr43dvg-0JmPuitJKRm7w7nlBDugY67VF2IMVYuMRzYzb5z0Um3dCZunrnjKf0brahKlXgB_fE_RaPShvZMQLwwcYD_FByPxUbyp163bbRS_A9I9WAf1ziFQ/4pi/xEgkj0CSSJmbL4XYAFkLxQ/h1/h001.6UmspR_Hzr_5w3HIuAhtYm1BB1CQzacBLemboSbfyDQ) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9HWtiGz5LuqdYdydHcioHim5IEQYatb6Q98O8Cpy0TjJTRT6yU1JJvThwZ-ZFynI-2cmJH7HhzzzsrShJSkuHfpSJmOiIanrYDCDyT9I0IGUxVRVsCBYzlYaUHkCkfObiBIQoteP8gTJmeew1ilJ9G4dwj7UmrSO2-nyW7jfvDPOfJkmsGm9ORv3vdHZIPicsOmlfpgly5IXCBOUAVcPDU9WY1eq0liMVmR0gFzKPNSTxHQIdsyBdaCZhQgBSmwChn8ZrpIMlR_HDs1WPGNV3r1BK_NbzrSxE-Ihim2ZvQrRG3srBhHusnW3giBaZENZN_4wC3oZeLk7m_9kCIGA8fvL6RtF8e0YvM5mBY99iIczou3tDOBRKlPgwKQP60CTDH5d6UtH8ynDNrR9kLXLg4EkDe7aIjKk4UHlEQKsPtH0AkDFTiAns6IiTcLjRtxc30ByzCe6Y9hOQYvCJFbHuWg/4pi/xEgkj0CSSJmbL4XYAFkLxQ/h2/h001.HsdSF4JVHLbVBBWdUcqAgqWIzXsg13LW4Uv0RIlvHTU)

In its latest assault on Lebanon, the Israeli military has committed additional war crimes, such as targeting medical facilities, ambulances, and first responders; destroying critical civilian infrastructure, including homes, apartment buildings, churches, mosques, bridges, electricity networks, and water and sanitation networks; and firing poisonous white phosphorus on residential neighborhoods.
Groups like Amnesty International and Human Rights Watch are urging governments to end military assistance to Israel.
And it’s clear that the United States is assisting this destruction, through the weapons, intelligence, logistics, and diplomatic cover it provides the Israeli government.
**Congress has the power and duty to put an end to this illegal invasion,** so last week I introduced:
* The **Lebanon War Powers Resolution** , co-led by Congresswoman Delia Ramirez. **This resolution orders the removal of all U.S. Armed Forces’ participation in unauthorized hostilities in Lebanon** , including involvement in targeting assistance and intelligence sharing for Israeli airstrikes and ground invasion. War Powers Resolutions are privileged, meaning that any member of the House of Representatives can force a vote on the legislation.
* The **House Resolution Standing with the People of Lebanon Against the Illegal Invasion, War Crimes, and Ethnic Cleansing Perpetrated by the State of Israel** , which calls on the United States to use its immense leverage to force an end to the Israeli military invasion, reject threats of the illegal occupation of Lebanese territory, end U.S. support and participation in this invasion, extend Temporary Protected Status for Lebanese nationals in the United States, support the right of return of all displaced Lebanese to their homes, and more.

[**Please add your name to support my new resolutions and demand Congress stop the Israeli military’s genocidal ethnic cleansing campaign in Lebanon.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9HWtiGz5LuqdYdydHcioHim5IEQYatb6Q98O8Cpy0TjJTRT6yU1JJvThwZ-ZFynI-2cmJH7HhzzzsrShJSkuHfpSJmOiIanrYDCDyT9I0IGUxVRVsCBYzlYaUHkCkfObiwbjfyiscgMNQzcYBzRN1oJVjnCyTD-IR-QyLTTqRXoUvnpc3BAxRpShjCFZc_fJzkjzqN_8uEVyGPkH-ChWivCLLn4QMfyJCgITUcdBlETetsGysheTLOJVg4YLun_9BZS84cem5hBKgGMRr1xWQGHvI4eFOHJuJQ95KFPN8wUMRmmAhMDZQ_T_fQ9kfwWqy9gn1r4vs-qWiqMgkMHQ-07hRr7j-FAZP-zrVimlSGLDWPSEk1qHjmhICu9m9LOlWjrN8rDglpm6WZELzCzTX2Se-rB4puA-5keTdJM55vQZ19MGB_3RzONSgWz8zh5U3CZkPlSiRNP_Gg22V_kmAtQ/4pi/xEgkj0CSSJmbL4XYAFkLxQ/h3/h001.qNt9olLexURsm5SOmQwErq-TU68KMym4Nw9QyH7sASE)

Friend,
My Congressional district has the largest Lebanese community in the United States.
During the latest U.S.-backed Israeli attacks, thousands of families in my district with strong ties to Lebanon have watched their family’s towns be completely destroyed, seen relatives uprooted from their homes, and lost loved ones.
These attacks have killed more than 1,268 Lebanese people, including 125 children—wounding or killing children every day, including in classrooms.
They’ve forcibly displaced more than 1.2 million people, including 370,000 children. The Israeli government has told them that they won’t be allowed to return, and leaders such as the defense minister are openly planning to occupy Lebanese territory.
**These war crimes and crimes against humanity are funded by our tax dollars—and they’re only possible with U.S. support.**
**Congress has the power to stop this, so I just introduced new legislation, including a resolution calling on the U.S. to force an end to the Israeli military’s illegal invasion of Lebanon—and a Lebanon War Powers Resolution** , which orders an end to the U.S. Armed Forces’ involvement in unauthorized hostilities in Lebanon.

Top Israeli leaders are openly celebrating and talking about using Gaza as a “model” for destroying Lebanon.
They’re using the same genocidal playbook, using U.S.-made bombs to carpet bomb civilian homes, refugees in tents, and 128 ambulances and medical facilities so far. The same military has bombed every hospital in Gaza. Just like in Gaza, the military is committing “double tap” strikes to kill first responders.
Israel’s military is also escalating its ground invasion and assassinating more journalists. The IDF recently revealed in a TV interview that they photoshopped a photo of Ali Soheib, a now-slain Lebanese journalist, to show him as a militant. This follows a pattern of lying about Palestinian reporters.
They’ve also fired U.S.-produced white phosphorus on south Lebanon’s residential neighborhoods—a banned practice that poisons the land and people, and can burn through skin to the bone.
These horrific actions are _all_ war crimes.
My new **House Resolution Standing with the People of Lebanon Against the Illegal Invasion, War Crimes, and Ethnic Cleansing Perpetrated by the State of Israel****** calls on the United States to:
* use its immense leverage to force an end to the Israeli military invasion
* reject threats of territorial expansion and the illegal occupation of Lebanese territory
* investigate and prosecute war crimes
* end U.S. support and participation in this invasion
* deliver unconditional humanitarian and reconstruction aid
* extend Temporary Protected Status for Lebanese nationals in the United States

clean_body: U.S.-backed Israeli attacks on Lebanon are using the same genocidal playbook we’ve seen in Gaza. | | | Friend, We are witnessing the same genocidal playbook used against Palestinians in Gaza, now in Lebanon. In less than a month of escalated U.S.-backed Israeli attacks, entire generations of families are gone, from grandparents to toddlers to days-old infants. High-ranking Israeli government and military officials have announced their plans to use “the Gaza model, but in Lebanon.” They’ve ordered the forced displacement of more than 1.2 million people (20% of Lebanon’s population) and are telling the refugees that they won’t be allowed to return to their homes. They’re also openly planning to indefinitely occupy Lebanese territory. Their genocidal intent to ethnically cleanse southern Lebanon is clear. We must act now to stop these crimes against humanity, which are only possible because of U.S. support and U.S. taxpayer dollars. | In its latest assault on Lebanon, the Israeli military has committed additional war crimes, such as targeting medical facilities, ambulances, and first responders; destroying critical civilian infrastructure, including homes, apartment buildings, churches, mosques, bridges, electricity networks, and water and sanitation networks; and firing poisonous white phosphorus on residential neighborhoods. Groups like Amnesty International and Human Rights Watch are urging governments to end military assistance to Israel. And it’s clear that the United States is assisting this destruction, through the weapons, intelligence, logistics, and diplomatic cover it provides the Israeli government. Congress has the power and duty to put an end to this illegal invasion, so last week I introduced: The Lebanon War Powers Resolution , co-led by Congresswoman Delia Ramirez. This resolution orders the removal of all U.S. Armed Forces’ participation in unauthorized hostilities in Lebanon , including involvement in targeting assistance and intelligence sharing for Israeli airstrikes and ground invasion. War Powers Resolutions are privileged, meaning that any member of the House of Representatives can force a vote on the legislation. The House Resolution Standing with the People of Lebanon Against the Illegal Invasion, War Crimes, and Ethnic Cleansing Perpetrated by the State of Israel , which calls on the United States to use its immense leverage to force an end to the Israeli military invasion, reject threats of the illegal occupation of Lebanese territory, end U.S. support and participation in this invasion, extend Temporary Protected Status for Lebanese nationals in the United States, support the right of return of all displaced Lebanese to their homes, and more. Thank you! Together we will keep pushing to save lives and ensure everyone’s human rights are respected. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Apr 3, 2026 Subject: Sign to support my new resolutions to stop ethnic cleansing in Lebanon To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, My Congressional district has the largest Lebanese community in the United States. During the latest U.S.-backed Israeli attacks, thousands of families in my district with strong ties to Lebanon have watched their family’s towns be completely destroyed, seen relatives uprooted from their homes, and lost loved ones. These attacks have killed more than 1,268 Lebanese people, including 125 children—wounding or killing children every day, including in classrooms. They’ve forcibly displaced more than 1.2 million people, including 370,000 children. The Israeli government has told them that they won’t be allowed to return, and leaders such as the defense minister are openly planning to occupy Lebanese territory. These war crimes and crimes against humanity are funded by our tax dollars—and they’re only possible with U.S. support. Congress has the power to stop this, so I just introduced new legislation, including a resolution calling on the U.S. to force an end to the Israeli military’s illegal invasion of Lebanon—and a Lebanon War Powers Resolution , which orders an end to the U.S. Armed Forces’ involvement in unauthorized hostilities in Lebanon. Top Israeli leaders are openly celebrating and talking about using Gaza as a “model” for destroying Lebanon. They’re using the same genocidal playbook, using U.S.-made bombs to carpet bomb civilian homes, refugees in tents, and 128 ambulances and medical facilities so far. The same military has bombed every hospital in Gaza. Just like in Gaza, the military is committing “double tap” strikes to kill first responders. Israel’s military is also escalating its ground invasion and assassinating more journalists. The IDF recently revealed in a TV interview that they photoshopped a photo of Ali Soheib, a now-slain Lebanese journalist, to show him as a militant. This follows a pattern of lying about Palestinian reporters. They’ve also fired U.S.-produced white phosphorus on south Lebanon’s residential neighborhoods—a banned practice that poisons the land and people, and can burn through skin to the bone. These horrific actions are all war crimes. My new House Resolution Standing with the People of Lebanon Against the Illegal Invasion, War Crimes, and Ethnic Cleansing Perpetrated by the State of Israel**** calls on the United States to: use its immense leverage to force an end to the Israeli military invasion reject threats of territorial expansion and the illegal occupation of Lebanese territory investigate and prosecute war crimes end U.S. support and participation in this invasion deliver unconditional humanitarian and reconstruction aid extend Temporary Protected Status for Lebanese nationals in the United States support the international right of return of all displaced Lebanese to their homes Thank you for taking action and continuing to demand a better world, with safety and freedom for all. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . subject: My opponent is propped up by an Epstein co-conspirator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |

Friend,

**I’m sick of the two sets of rules in this country – one for the rich and well-connected, and one for everyone else.**
And I’m angry when I see politicians like my opponent, Jon Husted, protect their billionaire donors at all costs.

Here’s what happened: Husted received more than $116,000 in donations from Jeffrey Epstein’s co-conspirator Leslie Wexner.

Then recently, Wexner testified before Congress about his relationship with Epstein and admitted to backing Husted, saying, “I’m sure I helped him. I helped him politically.”
And it gets worse. Husted didn’t just take Wexner’s money – **he accepted a maximum donation just weeks before voting to block the release of the Epstein files.**
You do the math.

This is why when people say the system is rigged, they’re right. Politically connected insiders avoid consequences as victims are pushed aside. Billionaires get tax breaks while working families pay more for health insurance. And elites do whatever the hell they want while regular folks are told to just be grateful and “earn more.”
Ohioans deserve better.

I’ve spent my career holding powerful interests accountable, and I’m not stopping anytime soon. But I need your help.

| Peter, I went on CNN Thursday night to make one thing clear:

Pam Bondi may be out of office, but she’s not off the hook. She still needs to testify about what’s in the Epstein files.

The subpoena stands. And the American people deserve answers.

**Peter, this isn’t just about one person – it’s about a pattern.** Too often, those in power try to rewrite the rules and walk away without accountability, while everyone else is expected to just move on.

I’m not going to let that happen.

As the only Gen-Z member of Congress, I take that responsibility seriously – asking tough questions, pushing for transparency, and making sure no one is above the law. And yeah, that makes some people uncomfortable.

But that’s the job.

And as I keep fighting for transparency, they’re going to double down on their attacks against me. That’s why I need you with me.

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: A massive blue wave is sweeping red + purple states across the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
But momentum + hope alone won’t be enough to carry Democratic candidates across the finish line. That’s why we need your help, Peter »
#
🌊🌊🌊🌊🌊🌊
**A massive blue wave is sweeping red + purple states across the country right now, Peter – and it's getting impossible for the GOP to ignore.**
Democrats have already flipped 25+ GOP-held state legislative seats since Trump's 2024 election, signaling a powerful rejection of MAGA extremism where it matters most.
**This kind of momentum gives us real hope heading into the 2026 midterms.**
But hope alone won't be enough to carry Democratic candidates across the finish line.
We need real resources to fuel these fights – in the places that are too often overlooked. After all, the billionaires + shady mega-donors funding the GOP are already spending MILLIONS of dollars to crush our momentum.

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: We’re in Ann Richards territory
body:
And we’re going to win this race.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
Polls are showing only 3 points between me and Greg Abbott.
**Let me break down what this actually means.**
**3 points** is the same thin margin that sent Ann Richards to the Governor's mansion — the last time a Democrat led Texas.
**3 points** is some of the closest polling Greg Abbott has ever seen.
**3 points** means we are not just competing, _we are a real threat and inches away from making history._
**[Every dollar counts. Will you contribute $5 today to help turn 3 points into an electoral victory?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260404_1_ann.ME-z1j&refcode=em20260404-869&amount=5&t=1&akid=869%2E299639%2Eg73JPu)**
This isn’t just a fantasy anymore. We have a _real path to win_ — but only if we have the resources to fight against Abbott’s millions.
This team's support is exactly what we need for the sprint to November, to fund digital ads for Texas screens across the state. For thousands of text messages to mobilize our supporters. For door-knocking and conversations in neighborhoods Abbott has ignored for years.
**[We’re in winning territory. Can you help us swing the polls with $5 now?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260404_1_ann.ME-z1j&refcode=em20260404-869&amount=5&t=2&akid=869%2E299639%2Eg73JPu)**

name: Turning Point PAC
subject: Consultants get rich. Ground wars win elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
There are two ways campaigns spend money...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | [View in browser](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D "View in Browser")
---
_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| Turning Point PAC | | | | | [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
---
| | Patriot,
---
There are two political worlds in America.
One is run by consultants.
* They produce strategy decks.
* Buy expensive TV ads.
* Host donor receptions.

Consultants make a _lot_ of money.
The other world is the **ground war.**
* Men and women in the trenches.
* Registering voters. Hosting turnout blitzes.
* Chasing ballots and banking early votes.

Charlie Kirk chose the ground war.
**And as Democrats learned the hard way in ‘24...Charlie’s world _decides_ elections.**

[SUPPORT CHARLIE’S BALLOT-CHASING ARMY](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
Turning Point PAC is digging in ahead of the 2026 Midterms and we’re (again) gearing up to fight the Democrat ground operation in key Congressional districts.
In the near term, we’re funding a hiring surge: **700 _new_ full-time ballot-chasers** to join America First patriots already deployed in key districts.
Each has a simple assignment: Find unengaged conservatives and **bank 10 votes every day** when the voting months happen.
That’s **7,000 votes** a day. That’s **140,000 votes** before Election Day.
And that’s just _this_ class. We’re hoping to fund more.
**[Will you stand with us?](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)**
Consultants _talk_ about winning.
Turning Point PAC makes it happen.
Don’t hesitate...
Don’t tell yourself “other patriots will step up”...
**If this plea gets ignored, the Left will win in 2026. Period. Full stop.**
**[Take 30-seconds and chip in what you can. Adding even _1 more ballot-chaser_ to the ground game puts HUNDREDS OF BALLOTS on the final scoreboard!](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)**
Fund Charlie’s ground war and let’s **BUILD A RED WALL** in 2026.

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)

For Charlie,
Turning Point PAC
|
---
Non-Contribution Account (For TPPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TPPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
| | **_Paid for by Turning Point PAC_**

If you’ve donated recently, by check, or with another email address, that may not be reflected here. TEAM DEB HAALAND SUPPORTER RECORD Supporter ID: Contribution Status: PENDING Deadline : MIDNIGHT TONIGHT | | Friend, if we want to reach our $150,000 goal and raise the resources needed to elect Deb Haaland as New Mexico’s next governor in November, then we absolutely cannot afford to miss tonight's deadline. So we’re personally asking: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Team Haaland | | | | |

name: NEGOP
subject: Reminder: 🚨 Your Weekly Update From The NEGOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nebraska Republican Party 1610 N St
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
Fellow Republicans,
There's a definite shift in the atmosphere as the May 12th primary approaches. The NEGOP is helping key districts to set up Days of Action. Yard signs are being printed and distributed. Mailers are being designed and readied for posting.
The election cycle has a definite rhythm, and this year is no different. Preparation is key and the NEGOP has been in preparation mode for several weeks to help campaigns and candidates in a variety of ways. Our walk app and data software are offered to and to available all Republican candidates without charge. We continue to offer training on a variety of topics. We're helping candidates with printing and mailing. County candidates are also contacting us for help with mail rates, yard signs, and information.
Ongoing county conventions are resulting in some leadership changes and onboarding new county chairmen is critical. We have several counties with very experienced chairmen and several with less experienced leadership. Assuring counties can navigate ways to help their candidates is crucial.
Building relationships is a big part of politics and the NEGOP is reaching out to potential new constituencies who are frustrated with the Democratic Party. For years, Democrats have made diversity their rallying cry. But when faced with a candidate who doesn't fall in lockstep with their extreme agenda, they make their position clear: diversity of thought, especially pro-life thought, is not welcome in the Democratic Party. In contrast, the Nebraska Republican Party is and will remain, a big tent party that respects differing perspectives and trusts Nebraskans to think for themselves.
All the while, we're preparing for our State Convention. We're contacting speakers, sponsors, candidates, officeholders and more. Delegates and Alternates are still being selected by their county delegates, and all the election results are being sent to the NEGOP so we can begin our credentialing process.
I am very proud of the work effort accomplished by the NEGOP staff and volunteers. We have a dedicated group of committed individuals who keep their eyes on the goal of electing Republicans. Fortunately, many excellent, hardworking candidates have been recruited and are out knocking doors and speaking to voters.
I encourage all our readers to find a way to engage in this important election cycle. We cannot allow complacency to set in. Walk with a candidate, make calls for a candidate, and/or donate to a candidate. Midterms are tough and we must be vigilant to keep radical Democrats who want to appear moderate from gaining ground in Nebraska.
As always, the NEGOP also appreciates your support so that we can continue offering "free" apps and services to our candidates. And so that we can continue our mission of sustaining a party structure for all Republicans in Nebraska.
Together, we win!

For Nebraska, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party

| Update from Political Director Joe Hagerty...
GOTV is underway -- and we need all hands on deck.
The NEGOP and local county parties are going to be running door knocking days of action in key legislative districts across CD2, and between now and May 12th, our volunteers are the most important asset we have. We're on the ground connecting with Republican voters, making sure they know when, where, and how to vote in the Primary -- because an informed voter is a voter who actually shows up.
These legislative races are close. The margins are tight. And in cycles like this one, volunteer-driven turnout operations are what separate the wins from the near-misses. A few hours of your time between now and Primary Day can make a real difference for our candidates and for Nebraska.
Not sure where to vote or need to check your registration? Visit [vote.ne.gop](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016GnbE9OoS3f09n1766OVBiiOeRuEyeV7b8_2-mrRq2jdhH3TaJY3dsffbMJ9_OhQIcJoqqes-3zZvMly1UyYea8CLhvA105aUI3M0AtzLwU6WsoJpwbgIDI5yDkp6EP3FiVGMJSyaPWO6W8Gvwf35Q==&c=79bIZqhcxBRoPibOQFSG_0y2heScAXlhPIsx1YJYpW7p6lT3OvDxXQ==&ch=IysVCyaPjSc01hXbl7eutLiRPwBGgBthVo822yKtY9IXhCyR6sWRBA==) for everything you need heading into May 12th. Share it with your neighbors, your family, and anyone you know who needs to make a plan. And if you haven't voted yet -- make a plan today. Know your polling location, know your hours, and make May 12th a priority. Every Republican vote cast on Primary Day is a step toward winning Nebraska in November.
Ready to get involved? Here's your next opportunity: Join us on Friday, April 11th for a day of action in LD 36 supporting Rick Holdcroft. Canvassing starts at 10:00 AM -- grab coffee and donuts with the team at 9:30 before we head out. Sign up here: [https://forms.gle/tf3ze5TTCosSCN918](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016GnbE9OoS3f09n1766OVBiiOeRuEyeV7b8_2-mrRq2jdhH3TaJY3dsffbMJ9_OhQ0eejcGN0TRvCkNsKpxSEHIA6Y2dvFD3kSJufayHBW1HRDbG6nikJ8hb_9E0z5t4JdvEEn4s-tqpa4Jq1S2J0lWPmJZYdhwSmaHCYZbwdXMY=&c=79bIZqhcxBRoPibOQFSG_0y2heScAXlhPIsx1YJYpW7p6lT3OvDxXQ==&ch=IysVCyaPjSc01hXbl7eutLiRPwBGgBthVo822yKtY9IXhCyR6sWRBA==)

clean_body: News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong. | | | | | | Letter from the Chair Fellow Republicans, There's a definite shift in the atmosphere as the May 12th primary approaches. The NEGOP is helping key districts to set up Days of Action. Yard signs are being printed and distributed. Mailers are being designed and readied for posting. The election cycle has a definite rhythm, and this year is no different. Preparation is key and the NEGOP has been in preparation mode for several weeks to help campaigns and candidates in a variety of ways. Our walk app and data software are offered to and to available all Republican candidates without charge. We continue to offer training on a variety of topics. We're helping candidates with printing and mailing. County candidates are also contacting us for help with mail rates, yard signs, and information. Ongoing county conventions are resulting in some leadership changes and onboarding new county chairmen is critical. We have several counties with very experienced chairmen and several with less experienced leadership. Assuring counties can navigate ways to help their candidates is crucial. Building relationships is a big part of politics and the NEGOP is reaching out to potential new constituencies who are frustrated with the Democratic Party. For years, Democrats have made diversity their rallying cry. But when faced with a candidate who doesn't fall in lockstep with their extreme agenda, they make their position clear: diversity of thought, especially pro-life thought, is not welcome in the Democratic Party. In contrast, the Nebraska Republican Party is and will remain, a big tent party that respects differing perspectives and trusts Nebraskans to think for themselves. All the while, we're preparing for our State Convention. We're contacting speakers, sponsors, candidates, officeholders and more. Delegates and Alternates are still being selected by their county delegates, and all the election results are being sent to the NEGOP so we can begin our credentialing process. I am very proud of the work effort accomplished by the NEGOP staff and volunteers. We have a dedicated group of committed individuals who keep their eyes on the goal of electing Republicans. Fortunately, many excellent, hardworking candidates have been recruited and are out knocking doors and speaking to voters. I encourage all our readers to find a way to engage in this important election cycle. We cannot allow complacency to set in. Walk with a candidate, make calls for a candidate, and/or donate to a candidate. Midterms are tough and we must be vigilant to keep radical Democrats who want to appear moderate from gaining ground in Nebraska. As always, the NEGOP also appreciates your support so that we can continue offering "free" apps and services to our candidates. And so that we can continue our mission of sustaining a party structure for all Republicans in Nebraska. Together, we win! For Nebraska, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party Follow us: == | ==| ==| == Donate today: Support the NEGOP at == For more information, visit == | Update from Political Director Joe Hagerty... GOTV is underway -- and we need all hands on deck. The NEGOP and local county parties are going to be running door knocking days of action in key legislative districts across CD2, and between now and May 12th, our volunteers are the most important asset we have. We're on the ground connecting with Republican voters, making sure they know when, where, and how to vote in the Primary -- because an informed voter is a voter who actually shows up. These legislative races are close. The margins are tight. And in cycles like this one, volunteer-driven turnout operations are what separate the wins from the near-misses. A few hours of your time between now and Primary Day can make a real difference for our candidates and for Nebraska. Not sure where to vote or need to check your registration? Visit == for everything you need heading into May 12th. Share it with your neighbors, your family, and anyone you know who needs to make a plan. And if you haven't voted yet -- make a plan today. Know your polling location, know your hours, and make May 12th a priority. Every Republican vote cast on Primary Day is a step toward winning Nebraska in November. Ready to get involved? Here's your next opportunity: Join us on Friday, April 11th for a day of action in LD 36 supporting Rick Holdcroft. Canvassing starts at 10:00 AM -- grab coffee and donuts with the team at 9:30 before we head out. name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Donald Trump is trying to end birthright citizenship
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
This is a position that is wildly at odds with the Constitution and more than a century of settled law.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128778226/612326175/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWFkNWY2OS00MTMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I_fTiyRN9SSyc9O5JBUPBy_lL8GBmCEhRqWxanwS7LM=&emci=772580d8-9d2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=05ad5f69-4130-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=7731215)
---

| | This week, Donald Trump took the extraordinary step of attending a Supreme Court hearing as his administration tried to defend an executive order to end birthright citizenship — a position that is wildly at odds with the Constitution and more than a century of settled law. **The 14th Amendment is clear: if you are born in the United States, you are a citizen.** That principle has been the law of the land for over 125 years. Yet Trump is trying to rewrite it with the stroke of a pen — something no president has the power to do. This executive order — like Trump's attacks on asylum and his efforts to turn ICE into a force that operates without transparency — swims in a current of racism and bigotry. It's about who gets to belong in America, and who doesn't. I believe the Supreme Court should — and likely will — reject this unconstitutional attempt to strip away a fundamental right, but we cannot afford to be complacent. Because we know Trump's playbook. When he loses, he doesn't back down. He digs in and doubles down. He looks for new ways to push the same harmful policies, often even more aggressively than before. We have to stay engaged, we have to raise our voices, and we have to defend the basic principles that define our country — that the Constitution matters, that rights cannot be erased by executive order, and that no one is above the law. Let's save our republic! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: Join our 6th annual Immigrant Day of Resilience Celebration!🧡
body:
From Immigrant Day of Resilience to May Day, we’re building power beyond fear ✊ | | | Hi Peter, When was the last time you shared a laugh with a loved one? [**April 15 is our sixth annual Immigrant Day of Resilience, and we want you to be part of this powerful moment with us! 🧡** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHphQ_YVCdbDui8VfGITNnwRhfoDQTJMYTPBwbTNLzMDc2emP5xKWYK8J_qNjQCN07XxfPMcQU-sfBbW9kY45MuV4Hc1HqGodyE7C5srxeU1hD52SM73cp87rU1YvwQorTxvB_rYZXTYo9h-kwKYJndeqgf9FrpEj6GvJz_D93IxI5UGie7sj1v2FhzGcGOtgrfoHbRAsC0hlzGi5gCAV8oKbVGpPSkntRoAzslwz6kkp6u2DbZk1CH1XHWBc4rWPg9/4pi/Te66FK_SS-ijRUo5CpeUbQ/h0/h001.24bFQRQegPq07u8MsAED7GUyQnt34MEFCrcWlLFiSVc) We’ve faced a painful year. With immigration agents deployed into our cities, schools, workplaces, and airports, we’ve mourned the death and disappearance of our neighbors. While ultra-wealthy billionaires and corporations profit from our labor, we’ve watched the price of rent, groceries, and gas go up. **But, through all of it, we’re still here, and we’re still fighting.** Our resilience comes from every moment where we’ve lent a hand to a neighbor in need, where we’ve shared a meal with a loved one, and where we’ve refused to let this administration strip us of our joy and hope. ✊ **And, on April 15, our power is growing!** We’re coming together as immigrants, neighbors, working people, and allies to make it clear that our courage in the face of this terror has always been our strength. **[Will you join us for a comedy night with activist Che Guerrero and a breakdown of how to participate in the nationwide May Day of Action?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN5sFN7uyIDHDQ_kqfTbgHphQ_YVCdbDui8VfGITNnwRhfoDQTJMYTPBwbTNLzMDc3EuZYpXYIH7q2BY9MVo0Vu69K7z5HgaIkxB12C6YL8ROE92j9ijvvfWZWWzWRo-Z2cDrPqM5mbxsa1oo973VM1p3S22spFkNkUJJ71lRwZ-EExhbgS_qLvmmu4z8cW1sayQ96ZLAIjPVZNQwztVUxkZRAY2B8u1SulTWCfCRrt0pFVsAl7alXjdkcl983NrhdL48ds21WtBaowek9eNAxr/4pi/Te66FK_SS-ijRUo5CpeUbQ/h1/h001.3MdCpRK6zJV-uBjj7MybJfQSOpbPmkl_LAimY_jyuyE) **From Immigrant Day of Resilience to May Day, the power of the people will build lasting change in this country. With immigration agents deployed into our cities, schools, workplaces, and airports, we’ve mourned the death and disappearance of our neighbors. While ultra-wealthy billionaires and corporations profit from our labor, we’ve watched the price of rent, groceries, and gas go up. But, through all of it, we’re still here, and we’re still fighting. Our resilience comes from every moment where we’ve lent a hand to a neighbor in need, where we’ve shared a meal with a loved one, and where we’ve refused to let this administration strip us of our joy and hope. ✊ And, on April 15, our power is growing! We’re coming together as immigrants, neighbors, working people, and allies to make it clear that our courage in the face of this terror has always been our strength. From Immigrant Day of Resilience to May Day, the power of the people will build lasting change in this country. Sign up today to attend our “Live, Laugh, Organize: Immigrant Day of Resilience” Community Call on Wednesday, April 15, at 6:30 pm ET/ 5:30 pm CT: We’ve been honoring Immigrant Day of Resilience for the past six years. Through art, conversation, and connection, we’ve honored the decades-long fight our existence represents. Never before has our unapologetic joy been more important. Our laughter, joy, and hope is not a distraction — it’s how we choose to replenish our mind and soul in this challenging moment. At our Immigrant Day of Resilience Community Call, we’re honoring all that we’ve overcome and all that we’ve yet to build. name: Chip Roy
subject: Texans don't like being pushed around.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
Self-funders. Out-of-State PACs. Political Insiders. |
**Self-funders.
Out-of-state PACs.
Political insiders. **
Peter, this is who is trying to control the race for the next Attorney General here in Texas.

I can tell you one simple truth: **Texans don't like being pushed around, and we sure don't like people trying to buy our state.**

In the Republican primary for Texas Attorney General, millions of dollars were poured into this race by people who think they can buy power in Texas.

They think if they spend enough money... they can drown out the voice of the people.

But Texans know better.

Peter, it's time to show these out-of-touch outsiders that our movement is strong. I need YOU and grassroots supporters to send a loud, clear message that we're not backing down and we're going to win.

I am setting an aggressive goal of adding 102 new grassroots supporters in the next 24 hours.

If you haven't joined this movement yet, that's ok. **[Now is your chance to step up in a big way – even if it's just a couple of bucks.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d831ce2ab8bd408cbf1b23045f7a6c1a&_e=PsqHiQvDnChgbIqTJ2Un-G09yko9zs8WzRW418nbnFQ1_h86rle8S0YaW0K45SwIFAbhObjiaFfZaoIOabjN-qsxdQXt5KUSE2BjOCC-ElF_Tq_7Nlmv37NOYS61JpFRLeSw8DXztgy5DJN51ztW15Y0kl6-OGuoDI5XlSiPdXDrG-eZ68quGlwdzIpFntcX8Xt3iKjuAV6Ha9ZTaKTjxc4n8Sh3Ael32XS3GmH3sNkgsB-oighIt_L750jf9d6Vm_npzopo2WZsoRgaS_T1xokjxkYJqNSmb1XME120IdBqW1nlvGdHnTPJwASW_PMOato88ARapcC_yq6TytdVsVl9mbKiinum_KCkMvSxNy5sp6yY2_x2tSubzCfjmp6aNI9tQe96f8agYg-hxNhzLxBlsBfPRhnz_fJ9jqe73xSIt9sxX9e9QGUbAjlARSz7nFggCEu_PSs6-XptbcNFC3hY0B4tGdqcN02LBMev43lNWEfUp9pDwMU4G2qN9AYhtpH6ugXjKQgz8K1DJNeV4Y9PzhFZl-RwJpdqaxV0NuBN0acf9vZ0hNcloIZPZw0vnOtvVhhchnSQXcd4Lo644op8Rl2aSorGF-JAFp4uRZLTxmVQ8nEmXtwB6MLAoLKIRyqm1DiSfFv-Dsh70uvbG9Bpoti7CnAlQ4uCug5XIhg%3D)**

I've spent my career fighting for this state - taking on Washington bureaucrats, standing up for border security, defending election integrity, and stopping radical policies that threaten Texas.

And because of your support, we forced this race into a runoff. We overcame a $16 million hurdle.

clean_body: Self-funders. Out-of-State PACs. Political Insiders. | Self-funders. Out-of-state PACs. Political insiders. Peter, this is who is trying to control the race for the next Attorney General here in Texas. I can tell you one simple truth: Texans don't like being pushed around, and we sure don't like people trying to buy our state. In the Republican primary for Texas Attorney General, millions of dollars were poured into this race by people who think they can buy power in Texas. They think if they spend enough money... they can drown out the voice of the people. But Texans know better. Peter, it's time to show these out-of-touch outsiders that our movement is strong. I need YOU and grassroots supporters to send a loud, clear message that we're not backing down and we're going to win. I am setting an aggressive goal of adding 102 new grassroots supporters in the next 24 hours. If you haven't joined this movement yet, that's ok. I've spent my career fighting for this state - taking on Washington bureaucrats, standing up for border security, defending election integrity, and stopping radical policies that threaten Texas. And because of your support, we forced this race into a runoff. We overcame a $16 million hurdle. But here's the bad news, Peter. The same people who tried to buy the first round are preparing to spend even more. But this campaign has never been about big money. It's about Texans. The people who knock doors. The people who spread the word. The people who believe our state is worth fighting for. If we stand together - - we will win this runoff and prove something to the entire country. There’s no quit in them. They just keep their heads down and keep playing.” That’s like us, every single election. We get our heads down and we work our butts off. Because elections in this state are just about the hardest-fought in the country. From Selection Sunday all the way through to the Final Four! As one coach told ESPN, “There’s no softness to them. There’s no quit in them. They just keep their heads down and keep playing.” That’s like us, every single election. We get our heads down and we work our butts off. Because elections in this state are just about the hardest-fought in the country. Every time. As the University of Arizona fights through the Final Four, we’re fighting to secure Democratic victories across our state. = | = When the Wildcats pull together on the court, the whole state rallies behind them. name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: From dark money to a lifetime seat on the bench
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260404-61328&t=1001&akid=61328%2E1407376%2E4jcPaa ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260404-61328&t=1002&akid=61328%2E1407376%2E4jcPaa ]Demand Justice PAC

Trump nominated his loyalist, Justin Smith, to the U.S. Court of Appeals —
and the facts about him are shocking.

Smith openly brags about fighting for “conservative values” while
personally representing Trump in his effort to overturn the civil judgment
in the sexual abuse and defamation case brought by E. Jean Carroll.

If that’s not a conflict of interest, we don’t know what is.

And it gets worse.
Smith is deeply entwined with dark money networks that fund far-right
court capture.

He’s served on the boards of multiple organizations linked to Leonard Leo,
the mastermind behind the Supreme Court’s conservative supermajority.
These groups exist to funnel money, influence, and power to allies like
Smith — and now Trump wants to put him in a lifetime judicial seat.

It’s corruption, plain and simple.

Smith’s history shows one thing: he’ll rule in lockstep with Trump’s will,
protecting the powerful at the expense of everyday Americans.

We’re not staying quiet. Demand Justice PAC is organizing, pressuring
senators, and mobilizing on the ground to stop these loyalist puppets from
taking lifetime power on the bench. But we can’t do it without you.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260404.S8Tlrr&refcode=em20260404-61328&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61328%2E1407376%2E4jcPaa ]Will you rush $5 to Demand Justice PAC right now to

name: David Hogg
subject: They’re getting organized
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We need an answer to young conservatives running for office.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260404-1&t=1&akid=3329%2E587540%2E5RnqPP)
Peter — this should alarm all of us.
_The New York Times_ just profiled a Gen Z Republican candidate for governor of Florida named James Fishback. If you haven’t heard of him, he’s a conservative firebrand who is building his campaign around racist, sexist, and antisemitic rage bait.
I have said before that there are young people who absolutely should not be in power. Fishback is a prime example.
At a campaign event at UCF, Fishback stood in front of a cheering crowd and used a white nationalist slur pulled straight from the antisemitic corners of the internet. He’s also repeatedly used dehumanizing terms to describe his Black opponent, Byron Donalds, and showed no remorse after doing so. These aren’t even dog whistles, they’re acts of open, unbridled bigotry in broad daylight.
While we’re out here supporting young progressive candidates who are ready to lead us into the future, people who actually care about fixing problems instead of going viral online, this is what young conservatives have to offer in response.
**We’re fighting back, but building a strong bench takes real resources, Peter.**
**[Will you pitch in $5 to help us keep electing bold young progressives?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260404_1_fishback.R1sXSg&refcode=em20260404-3329&amount=5&t=2&akid=3329%2E587540%2E5RnqPP)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260404_1_fishback.R1sXSg&amount=5&refcode=em20260404-3329&t=21&akid=3329%2E587540%2E5RnqPP)**
**Our mission is even more important if James Fishback is the kind of candidate young conservatives are rallying behind. These people do not belong in power.**
Young Republicans running increasingly extreme and divisive campaigns are getting organized and running for office. **And we need to be there with an answer to them.**
Peter, I know we can win the debate about what kind of future Americans want to see for this country, but only if young progressives can compete in the fight.
And right now, with special interests and corporate PACs bankrolling the other side (as well as many establishment Dems), we are one of the few organizations courageous enough to stand with the rising generation of progressive leaders and help them win out against candidates like James Fishback who belong nowhere near power, no matter their age.
**[If you’re with us, I’m asking you to donate $5 or any amount right now.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260404_1_fishback.R1sXSg&refcode=em20260404-3329&amount=5&t=22&akid=3329%2E587540%2E5RnqPP)**
Thank you for your support,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260404-1&t=23&refcode2=3329_587540_5RnqPP&akid=3329%2E587540%2E5RnqPP)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=3329%2E587540%2E5RnqPP)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3329%2E587540%2E5RnqPP)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

|

Hi Peter, it’s Katie Hobbs, Governor of Arizona. Let me tell you why this election matters: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128779475/612328825/-1981658856?refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260404_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzE4Nzc3MC00NjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RBKwleDbYMoqY5Qk8LP6Vd3s8tRVrd11M6mawarWqaU=) **Donald Trump refuses to let go of his 2020 loss, and his administration is officially coming after Arizona to relitigate the presidential election.** This move to subpoena Arizona for voting records comes after the FBI raided an elections office in another swing state, and as Trump continues to push conspiracy theories about voter fraud that cost him the 2020 race. [**We can’t afford to lose this governor’s seat to a Trump-endorsed 2020 election denier in November, Peter. Rush a split $10 to support myself and Yassamin Ansari now →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128779478/612328827/-1981658856?amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260404_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzE4Nzc3MC00NjMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RBKwleDbYMoqY5Qk8LP6Vd3s8tRVrd11M6mawarWqaU=) Why? _So he can justify rolling back our voting rights and giving the federal government more power over elections._ **This is exactly why this year’s gubernatorial election is so critical:** I’m being challenged by Andy Biggs, a Trump-backed MAGA congressman who voted against certifying the 2020 election results and was reportedly involved in planning the Jan. 6th insurrection. If Biggs wins this toss-up seat, there’s no telling what he’ll do in 2028, but he already has a record of putting Trump before Arizonans and the Constitution. As Secretary of State, I protected our democracy and will always stand up against election deniers and fight to protect the integrity of Arizona’s elections as governor. [**Our future free and fair elections are at stake this November. clean_body: | Hi Peter, it’s Katie Hobbs, Governor of Arizona. Let me tell you why this election matters: = Donald Trump refuses to let go of his 2020 loss, and his administration is officially coming after Arizona to relitigate the presidential election. This move to subpoena Arizona for voting records comes after the FBI raided an elections office in another swing state, and as Trump continues to push conspiracy theories about voter fraud that cost him the 2020 race. = Why? So he can justify rolling back our voting rights and giving the federal government more power over elections. This is exactly why this year’s gubernatorial election is so critical: I’m being challenged by Andy Biggs, a Trump-backed MAGA congressman who voted against certifying the 2020 election results and was reportedly involved in planning the Jan. 6th insurrection. If Biggs wins this toss-up seat, there’s no telling what he’ll do in 2028, but he already has a record of putting Trump before Arizonans and the Constitution. As Secretary of State, I protected our democracy and will always stand up against election deniers and fight to protect the integrity of Arizona’s elections as governor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = — Katie Hobbs Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

Trump is spearheading an unconstitutional voter suppression effort

Team, yesterday, [**President Trump signed an executive order that represents a direct attack on the fundamental right of every American to cast their vote and have it counted.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128779554/612329091/2132514265?refcode=email_040426_kotek&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTI5MTYwNS00NzMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C__qOhFri3pA_uaedzia1i7g5GY6XJCJb3uMXNiPjy0=) This order is not about election integrity; it is a massive and unconstitutional voter suppression effort spearheaded by President Trump. name: Sarah McBride
subject: What I told the No Kings rally in Wilmington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
250 years ago, America declared our independence from a tyrannical monarch.
# [](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1269?t=1&akid=3062%2E21716%2EffYs8y)
Last Friday, after voting no on House Republicans’ blank check for Donald Trump’s mass deportation regime, I drove up to Wilmington at midnight to make sure I could be there for the No Kings rally on Saturday.
**And the turnout was absolutely incredible.**
[****](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260404-1.wKcK-V&refcode=em20260404-3062&%3Bamount=5&t=2&akid=3062%2E21716%2EffYs8y)
I told the crowd that 250 years ago, America declared our independence from a tyrannical monarch. And every generation since has faced a choice: do we destroy, or do we build?
There are those right now who want to destroy our government and sell it for parts. They thrive in a culture of cynicism and hopelessness, and they want to destroy our faith in one another, and our belief in a different kind of politics.
But we turned out last weekend because we know that a different kind of politics is possible: a politics of hope, not hatred. Grace, not grievance. A politics that serves the many, not the wealthy few.
And I know that when we turn on social media or cable news, it can be easy to feel that we are hopelessly divided, and that those who want to destroy are winning.
But what I know from traveling up and down Delaware, speaking to anyone and everyone in red areas and blue areas alike, is that we are not as divided as the algorithms make it seem.
So as we move forward, our responsibility is to continue to grow our coalition, fight for working people, and defend our freedoms and our democracy. If we do that, we will not only win elections — we will make it clear that here in America, there are no kings. It’s the people who rule.
**As we look toward the midterms, I need your help to keep doing this important work.[**So if you’re with me in this fight, please consider pitching in $5 or whatever you can today to support my campaign and help flip the House this November.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260404-1.wKcK-V&refcode=em20260404-3062&amount=5&t=3&akid=3062%2E21716%2EffYs8y)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260404-1.wKcK-V&amount=5&refcode=em20260404-3062&t=22&akid=3062%2E21716%2EffYs8y)**
In solidarity,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-2026-footer?refcode=em20260404-1&t=23&refcode2=3062_21716_ffYs8y&akid=3062%2E21716%2EffYs8y)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=3062%2E21716%2EffYs8y)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=25&akid=3062%2E21716%2EffYs8y)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3062%2E21716%2EffYs8y)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

But here's the problem: **Democrats are trying to kill the SAVE America Act.**

They know they can't win this fight on the merits. So instead, they're planning to block the bill and hoping Senate Republicans give up and move on. That's why Heritage Action is pushing Senate Republicans to _**STAY**_ on the Senate floor and keep fighting until Democrats _**CAVE.**_

🚨 _**[Will you rush an emergency contribution to help Heritage Action pressure the Senate to KEEP UP THE FIGHT?](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/WMZZM5HoPLJvfFMPcQI8fHURyUlcTq2riNIyJ2IfYhyojgrRDlD_djpCkQddPjgQEdwmpg2sYprTRW6eTRDRBhyp2IiuzWPB2323R4_3CgVB-xKnq45YeKi301kgjIPpxrmP9ROS69qSCXOoVReNgjLHG2kUiP35EGKg4SqzfmuRaP-OwwrsljkS9vF98tHkfaKdSU6RURSM76mu3K9J6TrX2DnFppT5q3CAwDKPfV9csyL4wuvLDWDUQOlkbm_d6N-R6w3z259jYobap2K7qXUU6OUQQumtF48YAZxhdUwRhEI-dxAbMuvJf3ILEHvmySrjqrgshx2m7axXKCY0zbwW4tmEfbYkvDLIyVXRrVbsCK9QdmZUWXoMWRb6uqibpYKx5tL75TsKaP_y2deAA64tsscDqb0QMcbL3MI4fvQYk71HM6xah6WGvE-JIxMjIrypN3BO3AzLpsDvzW2KAdithcF6VIwob6f8tXpOMAXzQwQC_wWBp7ZosscqdmeF54ZWYp2CXIl0z2dMvfUuKav4GtqbjcoLU38EsWl7kketfv8L9C2DSEiGf_v4AMR0MNVctvgC5mEGehCFYNidc__cgdVfCrR6eLWIjupyAyHrTRASxuPKVkzb32BMg2_1oSQb2ILD7LKXIVtVNzMHe04AL3HOSWbVg3deCd-Uh0xX8KhI_IzPSDYKlSjiHevLjNJAbPc9We1f29-7XFxW3ipTECALYr8jyIAcGvXLTNTzdHqfiM20UQ4OFvaBQE3vC9PWtvfTG6PPXpZ7slPnySUtfRuAfYUuQf6t9Y9k76JzSIT-IAbuMyaFhJWgEqeTsesPrQoe3C1IWGM/mB-SbV1JaRiQT0_GV7DAgd32_Ms6biMm/19)**_
