name: Fund People not War via Our Revolution
subject: Tell Congress: Block Trump's cuts to fund his War in Iran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

This is outrageous — Trump wants $1.5 TRILLION for his War in Iran — and
he’s pushing to cut Medicaid, Medicare, day care and other critical
programs to fund it.

Trump just said: "Don’t send any money for day care... We’re fighting
wars... You got to let a state take care of day care, and they should pay
for it too."

Let this sink in. No money for healthcare. No money for child care. No
money for working families. But unlimited money for war. This is
unacceptable.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36323?source=email-20260404&t=1011&akid=10489%2E5885482%2EZUM-6B ]If there was ever a time for Congress to take a stand. It’s NOW. Tell
Your Reps to draw the line: BLOCK more funding for Trump’s war and protect
Medicare, Medicaid, and critical social programs here at home.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36323?source=email-20260404&t=1012&akid=10489%2E5885482%2EZUM-6B ]ADD YOUR NAME

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36323?source=email-20260404&t=1013&akid=10489%2E5885482%2EZUM-6B ]Headline: Trump says it's not possible for the U.S. to pay for
Medicaid, Medicare, and day care: We're fighting wars

Congress is preparing to vote on whether to fund this war. Will they stand
with working people — or with the war machine? Because this isn’t just
about foreign policy. It’s about priorities.

At a time when families are struggling with rising costs, when parents
can’t afford childcare, when people are drowning in healthcare bills —
Washington is preparing to write a blank check for war.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36323?source=email-20260404&t=1014&akid=10489%2E5885482%2EZUM-6B ]Add your name ASAP and demand Congress vote NO on more funding for
Trump’s reckless war in Iran. No more bombs. No more death. No more cuts
to critical services here at home.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36323?source=email-20260404&t=1015&akid=10489%2E5885482%2EZUM-6B ]ADD YOUR NAME

We’ve seen this before. Politicians say they oppose war...And then they vote
to fund it. Not this time. Across the country, people are rising up and
saying: If you oppose the war — don’t fund it.

Your voice can make the difference right now.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ ]ADD YOUR NAME We’ve seen this before. Politicians say they oppose war...And then they vote to fund it. Not this time. Across the country, people are rising up and saying: If you oppose the war — don’t fund it. Your voice can make the difference right now. When we organize, we win. name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: Whoever reaches undecided voters first, and most effectively, will win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
But reaching this many voters isn’t cheap, and we're counting on grassroots support to keep this momentum going.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260404-1338&t=1&akid=1356%2E294397%2E_T7V-a)
Folks, this is concerning:
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260404_2_ak.5b7eRm&amount=10&refcode=em20260404-1338&t=3&akid=1356%2E294397%2E_T7V-a)
Election Day is in just three days, and 53% of voters still haven’t decided who they're supporting.
This race is wide open, and whoever reaches those undecided voters first — and most effectively — will win.
We’ve already launched our first TV ad to introduce Judge Chris Taylor as the fair, impartial justice Wisconsinites can trust. **But reaching this many voters isn’t cheap, and we're counting on grassroots support to keep this momentum going.**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d7a007be-0e6e-4df9-96d2-dafc090fe930?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### **Help us defeat the mainstream media and promote capitalism and American exceptionalism.**
### **[Support The Capitalist, become a paid subscriber today:](https://substack.com/redirect/d7a007be-0e6e-4df9-96d2-dafc090fe930?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVjYXBpdGFsaXN0bWFnLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.3kXs6RLK9cOstbPDC02Y017AFx6EFLYFooH1Mx7mpK8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=193074334)
* * *
**By Wendy Yurgo**
Canada did not arrive at this moment overnight, and it did not begin with chaos or extremism or some radical policy imposed without warning. It began in a courtroom, under the language of compassion, dignity, and autonomy, when the Supreme Court issued its ruling in Carter v. Canada and struck down the country's prohibition on assisted suicide.
The decision was presented carefully, almost cautiously, as a narrow response to extreme suffering. Canadians were told this would be limited, tightly controlled, and reserved only for those facing grievous and irremediable medical conditions at the end of life. It was framed as mercy. It was sold as restraint.
But once a nation crosses the line and redefines death as a form of care, the line does not hold. It does not stay where it was drawn. It shifts, it expands, and over time it disappears entirely.
That is exactly what has happened.
Today in Canada, death is no longer a last resort quietly debated at the margins of medicine. It has been absorbed into the system itself, formalized and administered under the program known as Medical Assistance in Dying (MAID), where more than 16,000 Canadians in a single year are now ending their lives through a process facilitated by the state.
That number does not represent an exception. It reflects a system that has scaled, expanded, and embedded itself into the fabric of healthcare.
And it is still moving...
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c15f57f8-c2a5-4bfd-b9dd-50c6a1a927b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* If you have outstanding credit card debt, getting a new 0% intro APR credit card could help ease the pressure while you pay down your balances.
* Our credit card experts identified top credit cards that are perfect for anyone looking to pay down debt and not add to it!
* Some are even offering generous welcome bonuses up to $250! Click through to see what all the hype is about.

[Get yours now](https://substack.com/redirect/c15f57f8-c2a5-4bfd-b9dd-50c6a1a927b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Piece continues below)**_
Reports continue to surface of individuals who are not terminally ill being presented with death as an option, including veterans seeking support, patients navigating chronic conditions, and individuals struggling with disability or despair who find themselves offered death as if it were a legitimate treatment pathway rather than the irreversible end of a human life.
This is no longer confined to the edges of medicine. It is occurring within it.
At the same time, the normalization has extended beyond policy and into culture, with public messaging that softens the reality and reframes the act. Campaigns now present the process in calm, clinical language, removing the moral weight and replacing it with the language of choice, as if the decision to end a life can be made morally neutral simply by placing it within a medical framework.
There is no urgency in these messages to heal, to restore, or to fight for life. There is only the quiet presentation of an option to exit.
And once that option is normalized, the underlying question inevitably changes, because the issue is no longer whether death should be permitted, but under what circumstances it should be encouraged.
If death is considered a solution to suffering, then the definition of suffering becomes the central issue, and that definition is inherently unstable. It shifts with culture, with economics, with pressure on systems and families, and with the quiet human fear of becoming a burden.
In that environment, what begins as compassion can slowly take on a different character, where the availability of death influences the expectation of it, particularly for the vulnerable, the elderly, and those who feel their suffering has become inconvenient or costly.
This is how a culture changes.
Not through a single dramatic moment, but through a steady progression of justifications that reshape what is acceptable until what was once unthinkable becomes understandable, then permissible, and eventually normalized.
That progression is no longer theoretical in Canada. It is unfolding in real time.
### **[Support The Capitalist, become a paid subscriber today:](https://substack.com/redirect/d7a007be-0e6e-4df9-96d2-dafc090fe930?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVjYXBpdGFsaXN0bWFnLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.3kXs6RLK9cOstbPDC02Y017AFx6EFLYFooH1Mx7mpK8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=193074334)
There are now active discussions about expanding eligibility even further, including to those suffering solely from mental illness and, in some cases, to minors, raising questions that cut far deeper than policy and into the fundamental issue of how a society assigns value to human life.
Because once the foundation shifts from preserving life to evaluating its worth, there is no logical place to draw a final line.
This is no longer a medical debate. It is a moral one.
Canada still identifies, in large part, with a Christian heritage, and many who live there continue to claim that identity. Yet the normalization of assisted death stands in direct conflict with one of the most basic truths of that faith, which is that life is not ours to give and it is not ours to take.
When a nation institutionalizes death as a form of care, it is not simply adjusting its healthcare system. It is redefining its moral framework.
And the cost of that redefinition is not abstract.
It is measured in human lives.
More than sixteen thousand of them in a single year.
This is no longer a warning about where this path could lead. It is a clear picture of where it already has.

Her work is rooted in light, guided by principle, and grounded in truth.

name: Scott Presler
subject: I stopped waiting on Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC
body:
Congress debates. We register voters. Here's why that matters more...
| Patriot, I'll be honest with you. I've been watching the debate over the SAVE America Act in Washington — and while I'm cheering for it to pass, I've been in this fight long enough to know something most people won't say: **We cannot afford to wait on Washington to save our elections.** While politicians debate, the Democrat ground game does not stop. Their voter registration staffers are at their tables right now. Their ballot chasers are making their calls. Their door knockers are hitting their lists. _And if we are not doing the same thing — right now — we are falling behind._ **I know this because I've lived it.** In 2024, my team spent over a year embedded on the ground in Pennsylvania before Election Day. We helped register hundreds of thousands of new Republican voters. We chased down every outstanding mail-in ballot we legally could. We drove voters to the polls on Election Day. **That is why Pennsylvania went red.** Not because of any law. Not because of any court ruling. Because of boots on the ground, day after day, doing the unglamorous, exhausting, absolutely essential work of grassroots organizing.

clean_body: Congress debates. We register voters. Here's why that matters more... | Patriot, I'll be honest with you. I've been watching the debate over the SAVE America Act in Washington — and while I'm cheering for it to pass, I've been in this fight long enough to know something most people won't say: We cannot afford to wait on Washington to save our elections. While politicians debate, the Democrat ground game does not stop. Their voter registration staffers are at their tables right now. Their ballot chasers are making their calls. Their door knockers are hitting their lists. And if we are not doing the same thing — right now — we are falling behind. I know this because I've lived it. In 2024, my team spent over a year embedded on the ground in Pennsylvania before Election Day. We helped register hundreds of thousands of new Republican voters. We chased down every outstanding mail-in ballot we legally could. We drove voters to the polls on Election Day. That is why Pennsylvania went red. Not because of any law. Not because of any court ruling. Because of boots on the ground, day after day, doing the unglamorous, exhausting, absolutely essential work of grassroots organizing. My team is on the ground in Pennsylvania and preparing for the 2026 midterm elections. We are registering new Republican voters every single day. We are building the infrastructure to chase ballots and knock doors at a scale we've never done before. But I need sponsors to keep my team in the field. Whatever you can do makes a real, direct, measurable difference in the number of Republican voters who are registered, mobilized, and ready to vote in 2026. The SAVE America Act debate will resolve itself one way or the other. What's not going to resolve itself is the Democrat ground game — unless we outwork them. I'm on the ground. I'm not stopping. I just need to know you're with me. In Liberty, Scott Presler Founder, Early Vote Action | | Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC 2465 Centreville Rd J17-714 Herndon, VA 20171

subject: “The Talarico takeover of Texas”

body:
#
Peter —
The truth is, we don’t have to get past just Cornyn or Paxton in order to win this U.S. Senate seat.
Even Greg Abbott is focusing much of his campaign and $100 million war chest on defeating James.
The Dallas Morning News confirmed Republicans are deeply worried about the grassroots movement we are building. They reported, “[Abbott’s] concerned down-ballot Republicans could get washed away in a blue wave. Attacking Talarico...is a top priority of Republican leadership inside and outside of Texas.”
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260404-1-ak&t=1&akid=557%2E1347274%2EvhYf53)
At every opportunity, he is training his fire on James and our movement.
Why? Because Greg Abbott just pledged, **“we are not going to allow the Talarico takeover of the state of Texas.”**
This is a testament to our threat level.
Abbott could unleash his $100 million against us at any point, and we cannot wait until we’re already under attack to fight back.
**[Please consider making a $5 contribution today to help us lay the groundwork necessary to win in November. Every dollar will go toward our efforts to send James to the U.S. Senate and take back Texas — up and down the ballot.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260404-1-ak&t=2&akid=557%2E1347274%2EvhYf53)**

Attacking Talarico...is a top priority of Republican leadership inside and outside of Texas.” At every opportunity, he is training his fire on James and our movement. Why? Because Greg Abbott just pledged, “we are not going to allow the Talarico takeover of the state of Texas.” This is a testament to our threat level. Abbott could unleash his $100 million against us at any point, and we cannot wait until we’re already under attack to fight back. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Team Talarico Paid for by Talarico for Texas Talarico for Texas PO Box 14508 Austin, TX 78761

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Cutting an establishment candidate’s lead by 9 points in just 6 weeks is a huge deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
He’s been in this fight with us for years, and now he’s stepping up to represent San Francisco in Congress.
#
Peter,
Something incredible is happening in San Francisco.
**Justice Democrat Saikat Chakrabarti is quickly gaining ground on his establishment opponent, Scott Wiener, in the CA-11 Democratic primary.**
Just look at the numbers for yourself ⤵️
[](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260404-sc.7Jvug0&refcode=em20260404-37640&%3Bamounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&%3Bamount=5&t=2&akid=37640%2E1203867%2EWdp0Bm)
Cutting a corporate establishment candidate’s lead by **9 points in just six weeks** is a _huge deal._ The people of San Francisco aren’t looking to carry on the same corporate-backed policies as Nancy Pelosi.
**They want a progressive fighter who will stand up for the working class, and that’s exactly who Saikat is.**
He worked for Bernie Sanders’ 2016 campaign, cofounded Justice Democrats, and then served as Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s chief of staff. He’s been in this fight with us for years, and now he’s stepping up to represent San Francisco in Congress.
Saikat was an easy endorsement for us because he’s fighting for the same bold priorities he always has: **Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, and real investments in working-class communities across the country.**
And when new fights emerge, he’s on the right side of them. **In Congress, Saikat will fight to abolish ICE and end U.S. complicity in Israel’s genocide by ending ALL funding to Israel’s military.**
With less than two months until his primary election — and ballots dropping soon — we need all hands on deck.
Saikat’s surging in the polls, but he has to pull into the lead before voting begins.
**[Peter, will you split a donation of $5 between Saikat’s campaign and Justice Democrats to make sure he has the resources to get his winning message to voters across San Francisco before the June 2 primary?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260404-sc.7Jvug0&refcode=em20260404-37640&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=3&akid=37640%2E1203867%2EWdp0Bm)**
**[Contribute $5](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260404-sc.7Jvug0&refcode=em20260404-37640&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=22&akid=37640%2E1203867%2EWdp0Bm)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260404-37640-footer&t=23&refcode2=37640_1203867_Wdp0Bm&akid=37640%2E1203867%2EWdp0Bm)**

name: McMorrow HQ
subject: 4 ways you can help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorrow for Michigan
body:
Want to help Mallory, but you don’t have the $$$? We’ve got you covered.
# [](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?refcode=&t=1&akid=4375%2E898137%2EUFBBA7)
Happy April 4th. It’s the fourth day of the fourth month — AND it just so happens to be 4 months until the primary. 🤯
So here are four ways you can help Mallory’s campaign:
1. **Donate:** **[This is one of the most important Senate races this year, and it will be one of the most expensive. Because of you, we have more grassroots contributions than our opponents combined.](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-april2026.vCnu4h&refcode=AU_MAM_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20260404_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=4375%2E898137%2EUFBBA7)**
2. **Volunteer:** We appreciate your time just as much as your hard-earned dollars. You can sign up for our volunteer opportunities here: **[mobilize.us/mcmorrowformichigan/event/882716/](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/1602?t=3&akid=4375%2E898137%2EUFBBA7)**
3. **Substack:** Subscribe to Mallory to get more personal updates from the campaign: **[mallorymcmorrow.substack.com/](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/2088?t=4&akid=4375%2E898137%2EUFBBA7)**
4. **Follow on social:** Like, share, and subscribe to Mallory’s posts — you name a platform, and we’re on it!
* [**facebook.com/mcmorrowformichigan**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/2089?t=5&akid=4375%2E898137%2EUFBBA7)
* [**instagram.com/mallorymcmorrow**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/2090?t=6&akid=4375%2E898137%2EUFBBA7)
* [**x.com/MalloryMcMorrow**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/822?t=7&akid=4375%2E898137%2EUFBBA7)
* [**tiktok.com/@mall0rymcmorrow**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/2091?t=8&akid=4375%2E898137%2EUFBBA7)
* [**threads.com/@mallorymcmorrow**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/1738?t=9&akid=4375%2E898137%2EUFBBA7)
* [**bsky.app/profile/mallorymcmorrow.bsky.social**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/826?t=10&akid=4375%2E898137%2EUFBBA7)
* **[youtube.com/@mallory-mcmorrow](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/2092?t=11&akid=4375%2E898137%2EUFBBA7)**
Most important of all, **show up** and stay involved! We’re stronger together — and that’s how we’ll win this race.
Thanks for your support and your time.
— McMorrow HQ

| Peter,
I'd like to take this opportunity to wish you a blessed and joyful Easter. This sacred day reminds us of God's enduring love, mercy, and the hope we find through faith.
May the message of the cross bring renewed strength, peace, and purpose to you and to those around you.
Rep. Mike Soboleski Proudly Serving House District 73

name: George Whitesides
subject: My NASA career taught me the impossible is possible
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128783058/612340914/336227065?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjhkOWQ0ZS01MDMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_i5WpZ3RDNAyHe_bcB7UBX0jszvO1YefEyhrjrJW8c=)
Peter,

On Wednesday, NASA launched Artemis II – the first manned mission around the moon in over fifty years. I was honored to attend the launch.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128783059/612340916/-349382464?refcode=em-4.4.26-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjhkOWQ0ZS01MDMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_i5WpZ3RDNAyHe_bcB7UBX0jszvO1YefEyhrjrJW8c=)
**My time at NASA as Chief of Staff under Obama taught me that with clear goals and resources, the impossible is made possible. The Artemis II launch is a timely reminder that when we are bold and innovative, we can solve big problems.**

We are long overdue for that kind of thinking in Congress. So many pressing issues – healthcare, housing, affordability – would be made better.

I believe if we treat these challenges like space missions, we can move past the red tape by focusing on the outcomes that matter for the American people.

That’s why I ran for Congress – to actually solve problems, not get stuck in endless process loops.

Now is the time to be bold and commit to the real coordination and investment it takes to uplift families, lower costs, and build a strong foundation for our future.

**[If you’re interested in following along with the Artemis II’s 10-day mission, click here for live coverage.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128783060/612340917/-803653937?v=m3kR2KK8TEs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjhkOWQ0ZS01MDMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_i5WpZ3RDNAyHe_bcB7UBX0jszvO1YefEyhrjrJW8c=&emci=5c8d9d4e-5030-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=6b8d9d4e-5030-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=36198509)**

Thank you,

George
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128783061/612340918/-349382464?refcode=em-4.4.26-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjhkOWQ0ZS01MDMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_i5WpZ3RDNAyHe_bcB7UBX0jszvO1YefEyhrjrJW8c=)****

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128783063/612340919/-2104984614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjhkOWQ0ZS01MDMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_i5WpZ3RDNAyHe_bcB7UBX0jszvO1YefEyhrjrJW8c=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128783065/612340921/-723877621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjhkOWQ0ZS01MDMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_i5WpZ3RDNAyHe_bcB7UBX0jszvO1YefEyhrjrJW8c=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128783067/612340923/1617125231?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjhkOWQ0ZS01MDMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_i5WpZ3RDNAyHe_bcB7UBX0jszvO1YefEyhrjrJW8c=) George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. [Chip in to George's campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128783069/612340926/336227065?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjhkOWQ0ZS01MDMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_i5WpZ3RDNAyHe_bcB7UBX0jszvO1YefEyhrjrJW8c=)

To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: [GeorgeWhitesides.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128783070/612340928/-1896241937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjhkOWQ0ZS01MDMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_i5WpZ3RDNAyHe_bcB7UBX0jszvO1YefEyhrjrJW8c=)

We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7Lng7fM74EmfvnJSCPSYrg2?unsubscribedata=T3A2jQtqsS4z%2Ffzcvxp0GbVAIh%2B%2BrNdPZAdawqQ%2BjRJ78aemOjIAQ7JSujeAOKbGvo6QaT4yPY4Xtg9bF5eMHNejdOXPFaeHm7kKLA%2FrM2won9QMaH5WC1AxgJMo%2BtG%2Fz9pb%2BjiBqWiJMPVjNJNUZDPsfugTlLrqXmEpP55H6A4bt0KkblpniwaCEWw62RAHRV5YtTCCm%2B07%2F2do1BtEjptuU%2FWpE2frKGgk4KSYLbmktpjWCEUKAEI8JfWJchtkWmiLewTbwI88Aj64BxWAWzT%2Fj30sduS%2BO6MkRoxS7KcP%2BRO1GH78I0M34Nfhu3FL1HrIM42MVPgj1c8Xb0s7I5XJ%2FJl1vz4uDtZySnY5OBZ4caK3MmcENYVybsbqhxVgJsdynmfVtuNWPk6Pgdj40mFOIwRJ%2FvRxTKh12kN1c6id8Kc3rTlV2UKapae05twK).
George Whitesides for Congress

name: Letitia James
subject: I’m running:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hi there, it’s Tish James, and I want you to hear this directly from me:

**I’m officially running for reelection as New York’s Attorney General.**

[Before I share more, will you become a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign by splitting a donation between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign today?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106289?t=6&akid=23479%2E878179%2ELPVytr)

Since 2019, I’ve had the honor of serving the people of New York. I’ve taken on the powerful — from big corporations, to the ultra-wealthy, to powerful politicians like Donald Trump — and delivered real results for New Yorkers.

When the Trump administration pushed their dangerous and immoral policies that target our immigrant neighbors, I fought back because protecting all New Yorkers makes us stronger.

When Donald Trump defrauded the people of New York, I took him to court and held him accountable.

And as Trump and extreme Republicans ramp up their attacks on everything we stand for – threatening immigrants’ rights, raising prices for working people, and launching efforts to roll back voting rights – I’m using the full power of the attorney general’s office to fight back.

That’s why it’s no surprise Donald Trump is targeting me. He knows I won’t stop holding him and his administration accountable, and he’s mobilizing the entire weight of the Department of Justice to come after me because of it.

But if there’s one thing I’ve learned, it's that you can never back down from a bully.

**I’m running for reelection, friend, and I need you on my side to keep fighting for the rights of New Yorkers and people all across this country.**

[The road ahead is going to be long and expensive, and I’m grateful to have the Voter Protection Project in this fight with me. Will you split a donation of any amount between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign so we can start this race off strong?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106289?t=7&akid=23479%2E878179%2ELPVytr) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Letitia James and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106290?t=8&akid=23479%2E878179%2ELPVytr)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106294?t=12&akid=23479%2E878179%2ELPVytr)
Together, we’ll keep up the fight for justice, progress, and equality.

Thank you,

Tish James
Attorney General of New York

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

clean_body: | Hi there, it’s Tish James, and I want you to hear this directly from me: I’m officially running for reelection as New York’s Attorney General. Since 2019, I’ve had the honor of serving the people of New York. I’ve taken on the powerful — from big corporations, to the ultra-wealthy, to powerful politicians like Donald Trump — and delivered real results for New Yorkers. When the Trump administration pushed their dangerous and immoral policies that target our immigrant neighbors, I fought back because protecting all New Yorkers makes us stronger. When Donald Trump defrauded the people of New York, I took him to court and held him accountable. And as Trump and extreme Republicans ramp up their attacks on everything we stand for – threatening immigrants’ rights, raising prices for working people, and launching efforts to roll back voting rights – I’m using the full power of the attorney general’s office to fight back. That’s why it’s no surprise Donald Trump is targeting me. He knows I won’t stop holding him and his administration accountable, and he’s mobilizing the entire weight of the Department of Justice to come after me because of it. But if there’s one thing I’ve learned, it's that you can never back down from a bully. I’m running for reelection, friend, and I need you on my side to keep fighting for the rights of New Yorkers and people all across this country. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Letitia James and VPP will go through immediately: | Together, we’ll keep up the fight for justice, progress, and equality. Thank you, Tish James Attorney General of New York 878179 | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: $4.00 a gallon is a breaking point
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:

| | Hi there,

This is the math facing North Jersey families right now: **gas prices have surged 25% in just a matter of weeks, pushing us toward a $4-a-gallon reality that _many simply cannot afford._**

This is a direct hit to the budgets of parents commuting to work, small business owners managing razor-thin margins, and every family in our district trying to stay afloat. When the cost of a basic necessity spikes this aggressively, it’s not just an inconvenience, it’s a crisis.

[We cannot let hardworking families pay the price for chaos in Washington. If you’re with me, can you chip in to help me keep fighting for our Jersey families? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128783481/612342789/334102721?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20260404_FR_Gasprices_0_3MO_Josh_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjg1NjFlNS01MTMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YlhNlQSU5iDo0goVAmICkTD_j8wq8voRlpmdpDJpXtU=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

We cannot simply sit back and accept these skyrocketing costs as the "new normal." While some in Washington are pointing fingers or waiting for the market to correct itself, **I am pushing for a commonsense approach to boost our domestic energy supply, stabilize global volatility, and provide immediate, tangible relief to New Jersey taxpayers.**

We need to be insulating our Jersey families from these price shocks, not forcing them to bear the brunt of global instability.

This is about more than just energy policy; it’s about the fundamental Jersey Value of making sure hard work actually pays off, rather than being drained away every time you pull up to the pump.

But taking on the status quo and the special interests that benefit from high prices requires a campaign with the resources to be heard over the noise. [Will you join me in this fight for lower costs by contributing $10 or whatever you can afford today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128783488/612342796/334102721?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20260404_FR_Gasprices_0_3MO_Josh_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjg1NjFlNS01MTMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YlhNlQSU5iDo0goVAmICkTD_j8wq8voRlpmdpDJpXtU=)

We’ve tackled tough economic challenges before by staying focused on results rather than rhetoric. I know we can do it again.

Thank you for standing with me.

— Josh Gottheimer
|
---

* * *
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128783489/612342797/-312041944?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_JG_20260404_FR_Gasprices_0_3MO_Josh_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjg1NjFlNS01MTMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YlhNlQSU5iDo0goVAmICkTD_j8wq8voRlpmdpDJpXtU=), if you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/FMb1-nySSEqfF9X4UNm1qA2?unsubscribedata=MQPWKa5lbw8HVfUDoaeuiiPXfSwZvrQ2sEfNgvdWfB6aJM%2F8JF2L3UbyC%2BFT5x77DDrZpeWgk95yEXEy9tE45sWAopmAD%2FWDj6r3pmsSOvQCKkGVm0qQr%2F4JrY72W4qXE1k%2BtqE2yl8GHPR2PSweRaf895Rb4woiSTrGwARRv0yYSyANQPruyfTMudyuTYhkxY2nK4L%2F7GXmPxWtfC3MSGqUVei7Jbz0YOSi3Z1m%2F2T9KBZm%2BvqPF8a1RV%2BS8a%2FB%2FXUO5fxE1q83RNIsjMvXkbZJnCczQ9z%2BNJiun%2FE%2FRZegE6Q%2FBFm%2FfoKx5M42fgGuKS%2FCa8HqWlo08zp%2BGBl9%2BzK%2Byz0wrKzxhBUEIRjy5tog3SmahUKdYCbRe9qY9QAc3U%2BEiwXvxnLiyQArbqhqfukJW6TUXfhxE006UW8VJzMLFugf58GBj7Ev07eBMrp0) Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer.

clean_body: | | Hi there, This is the math facing North Jersey families right now: gas prices have surged 25% in just a matter of weeks, pushing us toward a $4-a-gallon reality that many simply cannot afford. This is a direct hit to the budgets of parents commuting to work, small business owners managing razor-thin margins, and every family in our district trying to stay afloat. When the cost of a basic necessity spikes this aggressively, it’s not just an inconvenience, it’s a crisis. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = We cannot simply sit back and accept these skyrocketing costs as the "new normal." While some in Washington are pointing fingers or waiting for the market to correct itself, I am pushing for a commonsense approach to boost our domestic energy supply, stabilize global volatility, and provide immediate, tangible relief to New Jersey taxpayers. We need to be insulating our Jersey families from these price shocks, not forcing them to bear the brunt of global instability. This is about more than just energy policy; it’s about the fundamental Jersey Value of making sure hard work actually pays off, rather than being drained away every time you pull up to the pump. But taking on the status quo and the special interests that benefit from high prices requires a campaign with the resources to be heard over the noise. = We’ve tackled tough economic challenges before by staying focused on results rather than rhetoric. I know we can do it again. Thank you for standing with me. — Josh Gottheimer | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign =, if you'd like to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | = | = | Prefer to donate by mail?** Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 United States

clean_body: Sorry to interrupt on a Saturday | | Matt Maasdam is a husband, a father, and a Navy SEAL. He carried the nuclear football for President Obama — now he's running as a Democrat to flip Michigan's 7th congressional district. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Sorry to reach out on a Saturday, Team, but we’re asking you to please read this short but important email: Our opponent, Tom Barrett, is a rubber stamp for GOP leaders – and these are their priorities. He does not represent Michigan. Everything costs too much, and everyone knows it. Yet, the GOP is choosing to give their donors tax breaks and fund foreign wars. Here’s the deal: Polling shows Matt Maasdam has a clear path toward beating Tom and flipping MI-07 blue. But right now, our campaign is at a serious cash disadvantage. Corporations and dark money groups have bought Tom Barrett. Matt Maasdam refuses to take corporate PAC money , because he knows people power beats corporate power. But that only works if we stay consistent. ** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | | | | | | – Matt Maasdam HQ | PAID FOR BY MATT MAASDAM FOR CONGRESS MATT MAASDAM WAS A UNITED STATES NAVY SEAL. We’re at a pivotal moment. I know the pressure we all feel–from financial volatility, inflation, high taxes, to irresponsible government spending.
Our campaign is focused on representing the community, advocating for what they need and standing up against well-funded special interests.
Peter, for a grassroots campaign like ours, every dollar goes a long way.
Will you make a donation today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-lrfc-2026-em] to help us keep moving forward?

name: Mark Kelly
subject: This wasn’t the plan:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I never intended for things to end up like this. All I wanted to do was keep serving my country, the same way I have since I was sworn in to the U.S. Navy.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784081/612344628/1223101649?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.04_Mark-Kelly_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGI2OGZiNS01NDMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fmVQ2zkhUd5i_eOC6HZdGe-qBuEXET3pFSvKTBZPeqk=) Team, when Gabby and I first agreed that I would run for Senate back in 2019, we knew things would change. We know more than most how public service can change your life.

But I’ve got to tell you, I never intended for things to end up like this. All I wanted to do was keep serving my country, the same way I have since I was sworn in to the U.S. Navy.

I know that service comes with risk, sure. But I didn’t set out to be threatened with a court-martial by the Secretary of Defense, or to have the President of the United States calling for my execution.

Look, I don’t want you to worry about me. I’ve been through a lot in my life, and things like this don’t intimidate me all that much.

I do worry that Trump might succeed at intimidating others, though. Like people just beginning to get involved, or thinking about joining a peaceful demonstration, or speaking out at a town hall. I worry Trump and his cronies are trying to scare people out of resisting him.

But then I see millions of people meeting this moment with the courage and resolve it demands of them. People like my friend Maggie Hassan. It makes me hopeful, sure. But more than that, it makes me incredibly proud.

We’re ready to fight like hell to save our democracy. If you’re with me, please:

[**_Split a donation between me and Maggie Hassan. $10 or anything you can afford. It’s critical that we hit our goals before midnight._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784082/612344629/1223101649?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.04_Mark-Kelly_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGI2OGZiNS01NDMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fmVQ2zkhUd5i_eOC6HZdGe-qBuEXET3pFSvKTBZPeqk=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784083/612344630/1223101649?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.04_Mark-Kelly_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGI2OGZiNS01NDMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fmVQ2zkhUd5i_eOC6HZdGe-qBuEXET3pFSvKTBZPeqk=)

clean_body: I never intended for things to end up like this. All I wanted to do was keep serving my country, the same way I have since I was sworn in to the U.S. Navy. = Team, when Gabby and I first agreed that I would run for Senate back in 2019, we knew things would change. We know more than most how public service can change your life. But I’ve got to tell you, I never intended for things to end up like this. All I wanted to do was keep serving my country, the same way I have since I was sworn in to the U.S. Navy. I know that service comes with risk, sure. But I didn’t set out to be threatened with a court-martial by the Secretary of Defense, or to have the President of the United States calling for my execution. Look, I don’t want you to worry about me. I’ve been through a lot in my life, and things like this don’t intimidate me all that much. I do worry that Trump might succeed at intimidating others, though. Like people just beginning to get involved, or thinking about joining a peaceful demonstration, or speaking out at a town hall. I worry Trump and his cronies are trying to scare people out of resisting him. But then I see millions of people meeting this moment with the courage and resolve it demands of them. People like my friend Maggie Hassan. It makes me hopeful, sure. But more than that, it makes me incredibly proud. We’re ready to fight like hell to save our democracy. If you’re with me, please: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks so much, Mark If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Emily Carmichael, Campaign Director
subject: I wanted to formally introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I’m Emily Carmichael, the new Campaign Director for Pramila’s campaign.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260404-6096-footer&t=1&akid=6096%2E420207%2Eyw4v8l)
Peter,
**I’m Emily Carmichael, the new Campaign Director for Pramila’s campaign.** I reached out last week ahead of our big end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and today I wanted to take a little more time to formally introduce myself.
I’ve worked on a lot of campaigns in the past, but when I had the chance to come work for Pramila, I knew I had to take it. Pramila’s campaign is special because she’s not just fighting _against_ something — **she’s fighting _for_ a better vision for our future.**
That vision includes policies like Medicare For All, justice for immigrants and real immigration reform, and a democracy that isn’t bought by billionaires, but instead serves the needs of working people in Seattle and across the country.
She’s also not just fighting in Congress. She’s working to build a nonviolent resistance movement all across the country with the Resistance Lab, which is one of the most important things happening in our movement right now!
In the Resistance Lab sessions, Pramila and our team train people all over the country in how to organize, resist authoritarianism, and build real power in their communities. Since they first started last year, more than 30,000 people have attended a training already!
**Peter, what makes all of this even more special is that Pramila is doing this work without taking a _dime_ from corporate PACs or lobbyists.**
That matters, because it means everything we’re building together is powered by working people, not billionaires, and not corporate special interests.
At the same time, it also means that none of this work can happen without your support. Because this campaign doesn’t have corporate checks to fall back on — we have _you_.
**So Peter, if you believe in this work like I do — in what Pramila is building and what we can achieve together — then[I’m asking you to join me in supporting her campaign with a grassroots donation today.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260404.DDeNFM&refcode=em20260404-6096&t=2&akid=6096%2E420207%2Eyw4v8l)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260404.DDeNFM&amount=3&refcode=em20260404-6096&t=21&akid=6096%2E420207%2Eyw4v8l)**
Every donation fuels our organizing work all over the country, helps us support more progressive leaders running for office, and keeps Pramila in Congress where she’s standing up to the Trump administration each and every day.
I’m incredibly proud to be a part of this team, and I’m even more excited about the future we’re going to build together. So let’s get to it!
In solidarity,
Emily Carmichael
Campaign Director, Pramila for Congress
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260404-6096-footer&t=22&refcode2=6096_420207_yw4v8l&akid=6096%2E420207%2Eyw4v8l)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

I know what it’s like to have the deck stacked against you, Peter.
Growing up in Dallas, life wasn’t always easy. I was raised by a single mom on a teacher’s salary who sometimes had to work another job to make ends meet. Without her sacrifice and the support of our community, I wouldn’t be where I am today.
I went on to play in the NFL, become a civil rights lawyer, and proudly serve in the Obama administration. I went on to run for office in 2018 and unseat a 22-year GOP incumbent nobody thought I had a chance in _hell_ to beat. I went on to run for Senate and build one of the largest grassroots movements Texas has ever seen.
**Now, I’m ready to work twice as hard to secure victory in our runoff election – but it’s going to take serious resources to reach all the voters we need to win. **
**_[If you can, please chip in $5, $25, or any amount to help keep up our incredible momentum and power our fight to win in TX-33 and flip the House blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784134/612344752/-1937552160?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&recurring=1&refcode=jtk5183-fr-ts1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzcxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTg4NWJhYS01NTMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GQa0w6p_SvmF0u8Hc48caSi1qqLMmb8u2iuQaNCkBx8=)_**
Onward. Thank you.
Colin Allred

clean_body: | | | = Peter – after our primary last month all I can say is thank you. I’m truly honored to have your support and the support of the tens of thousands of Texans who turned out to vote for me. But our fight is far from over – and I need you with me to win this next phase of the race, the runoff election in May.= Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue. | | | = | | = | | = | | = I know what it’s like to have the deck stacked against you, Peter. Growing up in Dallas, life wasn’t always easy. I was raised by a single mom on a teacher’s salary who sometimes had to work another job to make ends meet. Without her sacrifice and the support of our community, I wouldn’t be where I am today. I went on to play in the NFL, become a civil rights lawyer, and proudly serve in the Obama administration. I went on to run for office in 2018 and unseat a 22-year GOP incumbent nobody thought I had a chance in hell to beat. I went on to run for Senate and build one of the largest grassroots movements Texas has ever seen. Now, I’m ready to work twice as hard to secure victory in our runoff election – but it’s going to take serious resources to reach all the voters we need to win. = Onward. Thank you. Timing is everything, especially in a close race like this.

We're looking down the barrel of our next official fundraising numbers becoming public for all to see.

Everyone is watching to see if we have the resources we'll need to turn these polls into power — especially in a state as expensive and difficult to campaign in as Alaska.

And when my opponent and his dark money backers see these polls and realize that we have what it takes to win this Senate seat and take on the rigged DC system, they're going to spend big to try and stop us.

That's why we need a huge number of donations today to show everyone watching that we can and will win this fight for our future.

I'm counting on those of you who understand the importance of this moment to make a donation today before it's too late. So I'm personally asking:

[**_Will you split a donation between the DSCC and my campaign for U.S. Senate before midnight tonight to help us win in Alaska and everywhere? subject: Results and accountability—we can have both
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=em_header [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=em_header]

Friend,

Arizona is a swing state, and that's something to be proud of. It means we don't all think alike. But right now, there's one thing we agree on: we need change.

Change doesn't happen through gridlock. It happens when we have tough conversations, focus on solutions, and find common ground. That's exactly what I'll do. Even if we disagree 99% of the time, I'll fight for that 1% where we can move the needle and deliver real results for the American people.

Transparency plays a big role here, too. We must work together and stay vocal. Applying pressure and accountability are a part of finding common ground. I won't let anyone get away with saying one thing privately and doing something else entirely different publicly. I'll always work to deliver results. Sometimes that means shining the light on hypocrisy and then working to improve the lives of regular people. Arizonans deserve that.

That's what effective leadership looks like, and that's what I'll bring to Congress.

But I need your help. Elections aren't won by sitting back, and in this race, every dollar makes a difference. Will you chip in to my campaign today so I can give Arizonans real results and real accountability? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=260404_mgw_swing_l1&amount=10]

Give $25 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=260404_mgw_swing] Give $50 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=260404_mgw_swing]
Give $100 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=260404_mgw_swing] Give $250 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=260404_mgw_swing]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately

Thank you,

Marlene
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/106088/images/Marlene.png]

About Marlene Galan-Woods
Marlene Galán-Woods is a former broadcast journalist and mother of five who has lived in Arizona for the past 36 years. Her parents fled communist Cuba looking for a better life. Their risk paid off and allowed Marlene to pursue her career as a broadcast journalist which brought her to Arizona. She met the love of her life, Grant Woods, and they raised a family together before he passed away in 2021. Marlene is running for Congress to stand up to extremists and be a voice for all Arizonans. If elected, Marlene will be the first Latina to represent Arizona's 1st district in Congress.

Follow Marlene

subject: Nellie was busy last month!
body:
Endorsements, events, and taking action

| |
---
Hi friend, March was a busy month for Nellie, and we're proud of all that we accomplished together! We earned additional endorsements from Hudson County Democrats, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, and Planned Parenthood Action Fund. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784375/612345467/-200729754?refcode=260404_tp_marchrecap_img1&ms=260404_tp_marchrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU4YzczMTYtNTczMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qPq4Vmu41Yc1tGWfgABWcSQsKvYYtr_24Sh3ryEGPP0=)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784376/612345468/-200729754?refcode=260404_tp_marchrecap_img1&ms=260404_tp_marchrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU4YzczMTYtNTczMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qPq4Vmu41Yc1tGWfgABWcSQsKvYYtr_24Sh3ryEGPP0=) Here at home, we kicked off the election year and celebrated St. Patrick's Day with elected officials, friends, and volunteers from across the district. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784377/612345469/-200729754?refcode=260404_tp_marchrecap_img1&ms=260404_tp_marchrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU4YzczMTYtNTczMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qPq4Vmu41Yc1tGWfgABWcSQsKvYYtr_24Sh3ryEGPP0=) We also joined Passaic County Commissioner Christina Schratz and strong women leaders as we were honored with the Legacy of Leadership Award. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784378/612345470/-200729754?refcode=260404_tp_marchrecap_img1&ms=260404_tp_marchrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU4YzczMTYtNTczMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qPq4Vmu41Yc1tGWfgABWcSQsKvYYtr_24Sh3ryEGPP0=) In Congress, Nellie continued working for our community. While MAGA Republicans have threatened to have ICE present at the World Cup this summer, Nellie fought back to make sure our community is safe and not being used as a pawn for the MAGA agenda. Nellie also spoke up and demanded that the Department of Homeland Security release critical funding they were withholding from our community, and made it clear that we're not falling for their lies. **[Nellie will always advocate for our community in Washington, but winning this swing district won't be easy. Will you chip in today to support her campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784379/612345471/-200729754?refcode=260404_tp_marchrecap_l1&ms=260404_tp_marchrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU4YzczMTYtNTczMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qPq4Vmu41Yc1tGWfgABWcSQsKvYYtr_24Sh3ryEGPP0=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784386/612345478/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=260404_tp_marchrecap&ms=260404_tp_marchrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU4YzczMTYtNTczMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qPq4Vmu41Yc1tGWfgABWcSQsKvYYtr_24Sh3ryEGPP0=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784387/612345479/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=260404_tp_marchrecap&ms=260404_tp_marchrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU4YzczMTYtNTczMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qPq4Vmu41Yc1tGWfgABWcSQsKvYYtr_24Sh3ryEGPP0=)

### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. clean_body: Endorsements, events, and taking action | | Hi friend, March was a busy month for Nellie, and we're proud of all that we accomplished together! We earned additional endorsements from Hudson County Democrats, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, and Planned Parenthood Action Fund. = Here at home, we kicked off the election year and celebrated St. Patrick's Day with elected officials, friends, and volunteers from across the district. = We also joined Passaic County Commissioner Christina Schratz and strong women leaders as we were honored with the Legacy of Leadership Award. = In Congress, Nellie continued working for our community. While MAGA Republicans have threatened to have ICE present at the World Cup this summer, Nellie fought back to make sure our community is safe and not being used as a pawn for the MAGA agenda. Nellie also spoke up and demanded that the Department of Homeland Security release critical funding they were withholding from our community, and made it clear that we're not falling for their lies. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you, Team Pou | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . | | Hello team, **Spring is here, and now, the countdown to the primary begins. It’s only 12 weeks away!! ** Joe Reagan is the ONLY candidate who can beat Jeff Crank in the general. Here are a few reasons why: **→ Joe has built his life here.** He’s raising his two sons in this community, volunteering, serving on local boards, and showing up — not just during a campaign, but for years. **→ He’s built a broad, real coalition.** Through his work supporting veterans, Joe has brought **over $12 million in business growth** to this community. He’s worked across party lines, with business leaders, nonprofits, and elected officials. **→ He reflects this community.** His military service, his career, his family values — and this campaign itself — are rooted in service. That’s why this isn’t just a campaign, it’s a growing grassroots movement. And maybe most important: **Joe has already changed lives here.** His work has made a real difference for veterans and families across Colorado Springs and El Paso County. Around here, people don’t just see Joe as a Democrat — they know him as _the Veteran business guy_ who gets things done. They trust him. And they’re ready to stand with him. [**The primary is coming up fast, and every single day counts. We need to continue building momentum and reaching more voters every day. If you can, chip in today to help us keep growing this campaign and put Joe in the strongest position to clean_body: | | | | | Hello team, Spring is here, and now, the countdown to the primary begins. It’s only 12 weeks away!! Joe Reagan is the ONLY candidate who can beat Jeff Crank in the general. Here are a few reasons why: → Joe has built his life here. He’s raising his two sons in this community, volunteering, serving on local boards, and showing up — not just during a campaign, but for years. → He’s built a broad, real coalition. Through his work supporting veterans, Joe has brought over $12 million in business growth to this community. He’s worked across party lines, with business leaders, nonprofits, and elected officials. → He reflects this community. His military service, his career, his family values — and this campaign itself — are rooted in service. That’s why this isn’t just a campaign, it’s a growing grassroots movement. And maybe most important: Joe has already changed lives here. His work has made a real difference for veterans and families across Colorado Springs and El Paso County. Around here, people don’t just see Joe as a Democrat — they know him as the Veteran business guy who gets things done. They trust him. And they’re ready to stand with him. name: Mary Peltola
subject: Mukluk telegraph
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Here’s how we win: |
#
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784801/612347242/324381178?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260404_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUwMzIwN2ItNTgzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ImToLF4NP6rIep_ulnrYlqDPmHYD2MQDTBd1Hxm6-aI=) Folks — It’s Mary Peltola. Here’s my plan for how we win this election: This is a ground game. This is person-to-person, human-to-human, mukluk telegraph. For those in the Lower 48, mukluk telegraph is a saying we have in the Bush that basically amounts to gossip. It’s passing along a message through our conversations with one another, _which is the only way information can really spread in some parts of the Last Frontier!_ In a state as vast and rural as ours, there really is no other way to reach every Alaskan. That’s why it’s so important for us to travel to their communities and have those person-to-person conversations. There are 585,000 square miles in this state — bigger than Texas, California, and Montana combined. And we’re going to criss-cross it in its entirety. But to be honest with you, reaching every community will be expensive. More than 80% of our communities can only be reached by plane, boat or snow machine. And when we are able to drive, gas up here costs much more than it does in most of the Lower 48! But we don’t have another option. I’m running for U.S. Senate to fight for all Alaskans, and I’m committed to bringing every borough into this fight with me. That’s why I’m asking for your support today. We need to take our message across Alaska, and we can’t do it without your help. **[So if you’re with me, please split a donation today between Fight Like Hell PAC and my campaign for U.S. Senate in Alaska. No matter how much you’re able to contribute, every donation counts because it all adds up when we chip in together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784802/612347243/-297061950?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260404_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUwMzIwN2ItNTgzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ImToLF4NP6rIep_ulnrYlqDPmHYD2MQDTBd1Hxm6-aI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight Like Hell PAC and Mary Peltola will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128784803/612347244/324381178?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260404_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjUwMzIwN2ItNTgzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ImToLF4NP6rIep_ulnrYlqDPmHYD2MQDTBd1Hxm6-aI=)

clean_body: Here’s how we win: | = Folks — It’s Mary Peltola. Here’s my plan for how we win this election: This is a ground game. This is person-to-person, human-to-human, mukluk telegraph. For those in the Lower 48, mukluk telegraph is a saying we have in the Bush that basically amounts to gossip. It’s passing along a message through our conversations with one another, which is the only way information can really spread in some parts of the Last Frontier! In a state as vast and rural as ours, there really is no other way to reach every Alaskan. That’s why it’s so important for us to travel to their communities and have those person-to-person conversations. There are 585,000 square miles in this state — bigger than Texas, California, and Montana combined. And we’re going to criss-cross it in its entirety. But to be honest with you, reaching every community will be expensive. More than 80% of our communities can only be reached by plane, boat or snow machine. And when we are able to drive, gas up here costs much more than it does in most of the Lower 48! But we don’t have another option. I’m running for U.S. Senate to fight for all Alaskans, and I’m committed to bringing every borough into this fight with me. That’s why I’m asking for your support today. We need to take our message across Alaska, and we can’t do it without your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight Like Hell PAC and Mary Peltola will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I’m so grateful for your support. Together, we’re going to win this! Thanks so much, Mary Fight Like Hell PAC PO BOX 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. FightLikeHellPAC.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee

Hi team — Two months! That's all the time we have left before California voters choose their candidate for governor — **_and every single day between now and then matters._** [**If you've been meaning to get involved, to chip in, to make your voice heard — this is the moment. Not next week. Now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128785065/612348204/-1978189107?refcode=AU_XBCA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260404_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWM4MTY2YTItNTgzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1Z6gANVmbP7eojt1XewtMT9PH0XdCjfEFBa_lWqd9zk=) Here's the hard truth about political campaigns: a dollar raised today does far more work than a dollar raised in June. We have time to put it to work — to reach more Californians and get Xavier's message in front of the undecided voters who will decide this race. Wait another month? That window closes. The ads can't run. The voters we could have persuaded... we never reach. Xavier has spent his entire career fighting for California. **He took on Donald Trump 122 times as Attorney General and won landmark victories protecting the ACA and defending California families.** We don't need untested politicians making promises they can’t back up. We need a proven fighter who knows how to deliver. But none of that matters if we can't reach voters.**In a crowded field, resources are what separate campaigns that break through from campaigns that don't.** We are two months out. clean_body: If you've been waiting to chip in, this is the moment. Here's why it matters. | Hi team — Two months! That's all the time we have left before California voters choose their candidate for governor — and every single day between now and then matters. = Here's the hard truth about political campaigns: a dollar raised today does far more work than a dollar raised in June. We have time to put it to work — to reach more Californians and get Xavier's message in front of the undecided voters who will decide this race. Wait another month? That window closes. The ads can't run. The voters we could have persuaded... we never reach. Xavier has spent his entire career fighting for California. He took on Donald Trump 122 times as Attorney General and won landmark victories protecting the ACA and defending California families. We don't need untested politicians making promises they can’t back up. We need a proven fighter who knows how to deliver. But none of that matters if we can't reach voters.In a crowded field, resources are what separate campaigns that break through from campaigns that don't. We are two months out. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support. name: Jason Crow
subject: While you pay tariffs, Trump builds his ballroom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Folks,

One year ago, Trump called it "Liberation Day."

Liberated from what, exactly?

His tariffs are costing American families $2,500 a year. Everything — housing, gas, groceries — is more expensive. Meanwhile, the president is building a golden ballroom for himself and his wealthy campaign donors.

Trump talks about “short term pain” from his tariffs. Easy for a billionaire to say. He’s not talking about pain for him and his family — he’s talking about the pain working people feel when they lose their home, their health care, and can’t put food on the table.

I'm fighting back against this chaos — and I need you with me. I’ve never worked for special interests and refuse to take a dime from corporate PAC money. This campaign works for and runs on donations from people like you.

Will you make a donation of $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can to send a message to Donald Trump that the American people are fed up with his reckless policies? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr26?amount=10]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Jason Crow For Colorado [] Folks, One year ago, Trump called it "Liberation Day." Liberated from what, exactly? His tariffs are costing American families $2,500 a year. Everything — housing, gas, groceries — is more expensive. Meanwhile, the president is building a golden ballroom for himself and his wealthy campaign donors. Trump talks about “short term pain” from his tariffs. Easy for a billionaire to say. He’s not talking about pain for him and his family — he’s talking about the pain working people feel when they lose their home, their health care, and can’t put food on the table. I'm fighting back against this chaos — and I need you with me. I’ve never worked for special interests and refuse to take a dime from corporate PAC money. This campaign works for and runs on donations from people like you. Will you make a donation of $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can to send a message to Donald Trump that the American people are fed up with his reckless policies? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $10 NOW [] DONATE $25 NOW [] DONATE $50 NOW [] DONATE $100 NOW [] DONATE $250 NOW [] ANOTHER AMOUNT [?] Thank you, Jason Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com] Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress *Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. body:
################################# | Peter,

Our party’s position is getting stronger and stronger ahead of the midterms.

Polling shows Republicans have an **8-POINT LEAD** over radical far-Left Democrats.

On top of that, Senate Republicans **OUTRAISED** Senate Democrats by $8 MILLION in 2025!

Given the strong financial position our party is in, we’re not going to ask you for money.

** Instead, we’re laser-focused on securing our lead by focusing our time and resources on the ONE THING that actually wins elections: _[Votes!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6ebac89ad39b477a97cdd790e6eb015c&_e=Mf9GwMJvLA6TBni8PSBwuhq-yX0EbjmakAxDky5WDh4qCDMVmZDhSK0ZFcrd6ErDmvqOo8dUKNj3AE0uieBbDy_NyNpK7OS0wUCiXj0rPPsL5PN0lOPon_Oqx7SHd3D4Ifr2DTRNMTv9ONRgMqqermfH24u2882lP3hYb9dkW40qQWJt2VSORZsmVuwGpTOLyWRoXY4TcjGyX0mOxp_eCx-i3bKKSttU2D4B8oehWWL9PrO9B9wzAkUFsWc4Jwxg0ZhNqHXaaYCiILGqLQ21fEZZtyBA_GZqBdmCIDhHTa_xc3pfaysykoTACxLHpS0sUx4X99npnAA34O8Z4ZyfwjAgYE7vcRacTddSfRemnGK5kqUbxagTF8aRKRUMFJ-QNJ48Qo5b5_Kq2RTjhIFHIBj2k-oMww7-Okhh5LBSsOnqA9TkUPtEzkaB6KX_sOGRauLvrLD1t2Usq9iQt7TrmXQLcqxCguL-yWcW6ziuUThTh37dRHPyhI8lXAghNlZGsm4jLuet-zsqyGqVtt8tXjeEt_WXIba5DOsraYd1ZDagnRDr0v3ylFtVneNGYA37NGEQd3BMpTsVaHejfPQDpJC09nmbEqyBNUHzZLL01WU0coIWlZbjGYy54TDCKoRvsyOmDbkervx7DPMjGGEqqWRepJ-tBBKgjh5DOD-s-g-5bncfXIwt88PFulTCXPLST5tbN-TtnTxWDdJ77HH8nlXvRqLu0AmK56PIAA6osanrPd0ru_YAfQurZG_jMwDP6YD8wS9Dmds2dE38x9fW32hMPDIQ6jOarh6GOzGM90SWcJ7zbncC0Oir3281wVGFOIoQ9M2hkMhthhN74AqwSmus8PPnW9SM39uydXOin04%3D)_ **

name: Save the Persecuted Christians
subject: [URGENT] As we rejoice, do not look away:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save the Persecuted Christians
body:
| | | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0dd22c02e95e41d79af4a97ff7aa8bd3&_e=ByqZvJxKV6L3BnwCJT10eHrcVTw0UGZ1l04lotXkXYaxDRK200LnGSX4FxLukkD8G_ubNh88G14hF0jq7ehJMh2HA8aCMoZKTI654NPgg2w_upNIuoGl096AswZqZqdfQMSXgHlDZkKHCLT1BaY-cqayD7aKzXZmzbMSZSaBlffaXBqhtmSIIq0N9-0rOvve9R28Q6A2Frhq4aFMbbAVxo2GeHOFj_YyQhpJHflcdOaHCgQsPkNCqMgKm071hNTxFVPrnvgJa4AJVc5iJG618y8naK9Wtkl4Jh_Pz22OFdS57uGSj8f5CG8srnmnNUMNDpo9ZutGBQPEitQx10TQkTFIhJUtRfkcj8B8hrJ-ytlAtcPF1DY5P7r2xkLfS3quilRlMbgVmuceknml2xbT7YE6rJDTW6s99ypRy5raSuYzK1OT4HYswQNT5sOFfWld6_pYpeCy-RQyMem6q4zWxEUMNifAIaMO3xV6CqHbU5JDwwo9IXhtakGX9FYL2OYOeZTcXk3rP5x2kXdI8wEq3X74LQm9AD0aHcfEMfTPhbpVr3ypJ1AmlVS3eIt0JV8qNmmJLaSXTlei2FDoXmB8DFbQy4DmBxANwCuDN6rsWSUh_FtqRYJZTjszd-lVqUIs12DBSn7hZY-nR3X2hvxFyQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend, This Easter, as we rejoice that He is risen, our brothers and sisters in Christ in Nigeria are weeping over fresh graves and tending to the wounded from a brutal new wave of jihadist slaughter. **Just days ago, during Palm Sunday week, terrorists unleashed horror after horror on defenseless Christian communities.** Gunmen stormed neighborhoods, opening fire on families gathered after worship — slaughtering dozens in the streets. **At least 28 believers cut down in one community alone.** That same night, attackers raided a Christian wedding celebration, **mowing down 13 guests and dragging others into the darkness.** Across multiple attacks this week, **nearly 100 precious souls were killed** — fathers, mothers, young believers, entire families wiped out _simply for loving Jesus._ The volume of this evil is staggering. One massacre after another. Blood in the streets. Widows left sobbing. Children orphaned overnight. Survivors maimed for life, crying out in agony while far too many across the world look away. **Easter is one of the most dangerous times of the year for persecuted Christians around the globe.** When the Church gathers visibly to proclaim the risen Savior — singing, worshiping, remembering the cross — the enemy strikes with fury. Year after year, hundreds die in Easter attacks. **This Palm Sunday massacre is a heartbreaking reminder that for millions, Holy Week means terror, not triumph.** Yet amid the bloodshed, they still refuse to deny Christ. Their unshakeable faith in the empty tomb humbles and convicts us. **Here at Save the Persecuted Christians, the cries of these suffering saints demand our immediate response. We ended Q1 short of our goal, and the needs are exploding — more widows, more orphans, more displaced families facing starvation and fear.**
---
