clean_body: | | | | Friend, This Easter, as we rejoice that He is risen, our brothers and sisters in Christ in Nigeria are weeping over fresh graves and tending to the wounded from a brutal new wave of jihadist slaughter. Just days ago, during Palm Sunday week, terrorists unleashed horror after horror on defenseless Christian communities. Gunmen stormed neighborhoods, opening fire on families gathered after worship — slaughtering dozens in the streets. At least 28 believers cut down in one community alone. That same night, attackers raided a Christian wedding celebration, mowing down 13 guests and dragging others into the darkness. Across multiple attacks this week, nearly 100 precious souls were killed — fathers, mothers, young believers, entire families wiped out simply for loving Jesus. The volume of this evil is staggering. One massacre after another. Blood in the streets. Widows left sobbing. Children orphaned overnight. Survivors maimed for life, crying out in agony while far too many across the world look away. Easter is one of the most dangerous times of the year for persecuted Christians around the globe. When the Church gathers visibly to proclaim the risen Savior — singing, worshiping, remembering the cross — the enemy strikes with fury. Year after year, hundreds die in Easter attacks. This Palm Sunday massacre is a heartbreaking reminder that for millions, Holy Week means terror, not triumph. Yet amid the bloodshed, they still refuse to deny Christ. Their unshakeable faith in the empty tomb humbles and convicts us. Here at Save the Persecuted Christians, the cries of these suffering saints demand our immediate response. We ended Q1 short of our goal, and the needs are exploding — more widows, more orphans, more displaced families facing starvation and fear. These precious believers desperately need our prayers. But beyond that they need a loud, persistent voice raised on their behalf — exposing the evil to the world, rallying the global Church to stand with them, and pressing leaders in D.C. and abroad to take real action that stops the slaughter and protects the vulnerable. Will you act now? Every hour we hesitate, more blood may be shed. More families shattered. Your generosity right now declares: The risen Christ has overcome the grave — and we will not abandon His suffering Church. He is risen. Let’s act like it — urgently, sacrificially, with hearts fully engaged. In faith and urgent prayer, Dede Laugesen President & CEO Save the Persecuted Christians | | Paid for by Save the Persecuted Christians Save the Persecuted Christians PO Box 543 Monument, CO 80132 USA

# **['America First' Democrat Sends His Party A Warning](http://trk.libertyledger.-S_uLmuW8-NcDkbw)**
---
Mark Moran doesn’t sound like a typical Democratic Senate challenger—and that’s exactly the point he’s trying to make. At 34, the former Wall Street investment banker and reality TV contestant is stepping into Virginia’s August 4 Democratic primary with a message that cuts directly against his own party’s leadership. His target isn’t just Republican opposition—it’s [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-S_uLmuW8-NcDkbw)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/FAg46DL9Gbda0lGVbRUnLA)
# **[NASA Launch Inspires New Generation Of Dreamers](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/FAg46DL9Gbda0lGVbRUnLA)**
---
There are moments in spaceflight where all the engineering, all the delays, all the politics fade into the background—and what’s left is something much simpler: people looking up. That’s exactly what played out at Kennedy Space Center as crowds gathered for the Artemis II launch, a mission that marks NASA’s return to sending humans around [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/FAg46DL9Gbda0lGVbRUnLA)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[Is Lindsey Graham Playing For Both Sides?](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
You can almost hear the gears grinding when a politician changes tone mid-conflict—and with Lindsey Graham, it’s not subtle. For weeks, Graham was out front, beating the drum for escalation against Iran. More strikes, deeper targets, stronger commitment. He wasn’t hinting at it—he was saying it plainly on national TV, pushing for hits on critical [...]

name: Jim Jordan
subject: No one should ever accuse you of being a Democrat
body:
After all you’ve done for our Party, I salute you, Patriot!
| Patriot,
---
I’m sick of seeing text messages that accuse you of abandoning the GOP after all you’ve done for us.
---
All because you didn’t give $15 before some random deadline, that’s supposed to mean you **_“betrayed”_** the Republican Party and became a Democrat?
---
So all the times you stood in line to vote, you knocked on doors, you put up a yard sign, you made phone calls, you filled out surveys, you sacrificed your time and money – suddenly, all of that means nothing?
---
**_Give me a break! That’s just insulting._**
---
_Hand to God, I will never stoop to that low._
---
Truth be told, I try not to write too many emails and texts as it is. I’m busy working in Washington to do the job you asked me to do.
---
Honestly, fundraising just isn’t Priority #1.
---
At the end of 2024, I transferred $2.5 MILLION _**away**_ from my own campaign to help conservatives in tough races who _truly_ needed help.
---
**You know what I care about most?** The _ONLY_ thing that WINS elections – **_VOTES_**.
---
_That means registering voters, verifying every Trump voter’s profile, and constantly getting LIVE feedback from voters like you so that the President and I _always_ have the best, most accurate data in the country._
---
That’s how we won in 2024. And it’s my plan to win AGAIN in 2026.
---
[**Please complete the brief questionnaire to verify that YOU are among the highest propensity voters we can count on in the midterms – and then I’ll officially mark you as “verified” in our GOP Voter file for the month.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=bc0504307dc6466491562a70fb413a38&_e=paASx3c8RJ1V3z3AVaGUJEtSSMra5iVMlJ6-COcQCOAvFSQwbBvUem7CCb-jqEYAJZjWiCwzyl9t9aguYWt8RFHUAS3Bqsur55hnzyuU1AGGV2YHDXhNL8_v9kRlQ2ZdiLQ90PLS3B9HHTTMlo5KPeNqDXwOhehqG9AP6a5osq0LXmMbTW33GgN59pmtgTLWqyA8HK344g3Osfb80i8Sxo2ns8UHax3t2xgp1e9XITVFM3XDDP10qRYq0LFrsZnGmpv9pMXeaXbkwp81t058gQlMjC-9xbyx0m_4ZKXB7m6zthxSE_cT76h7Ow6xXqoVsCVMnruZV1clpb-FOXLmbNDQMvMvHnMtWEEd5Pmg416deD6d1bkdXwP19iYzueFrdgCjsIhlux6qB-JbtyVMb0RH3rfUdUpEvVZ5BCj4Wd8qaJb6_pkmsqsNCMSPzSU3_D_tNJT0PzJbbqtklUvRqnFDLU9Az3D8Bk_r0dWfTHRSBC5Ql_hdYGZ6_QpJv29AqFUwiZy7gmySzPnC4JZjnJ40MNy15H71_hjwE5HZflcWcdW0lPvV38XVPhJcGLkFlzL2j_1Xwa7Dhw0Y__5xUg%3D%3D)

name: NDRC
subject: Quick election update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President

These are critical fights for democracy, and they’re happening in critical states.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128785748/612350405/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlZDI5NzkzLTVhMzAtZjExMS05YTQ4LTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NkvhJEmgBNnom6hfFFYTCxL9IfvAETxXzZKynTD9GJQ=&emci=66cb0c70-9e2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=5ed29793-5a30-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=8431045)

Peter, this month, voters in Wisconsin and Virginia will weigh in on critical elections for our democracy — and voting is underway right now. Here’s what’s at stake:
* **Wisconsin (Election Date - April 7):** Remember last spring, when Elon Musk dumped $25 million into a state supreme court election in Wisconsin to try to elect a MAGA judge? Well, there’s another critical seat on that court at stake in five days — winning this seat could strengthen a firewall against ongoing efforts to undermine fair representation and protect against future attacks.
* **Virginia (Election Date - April 21):** Two weeks later, voters in Virginia will decide on a constitutional amendment that would redraw the congressional map to counterbalance the extreme map manipulation we’ve seen from Republicans in Texas, Missouri, and North Carolina (and which they’re still threatening to do in states like Florida). This is a critical moment for the people to register their opposition to the GOP power grab.

Each of these elections could have major ramifications for fair representation — and the outcomes will help send a resounding message to anti-democracy groups. Both Wisconsin and Virginia are routinely battlegrounds in our national politics. [**That’s why we need your support now to ensure that voters are equipped to take action to defend fair maps, wherever and whenever democracy is on the ballot. Make a gift to power the NDRC continued efforts to help meet this moment and fight back with urgency.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128785749/612350406/359562654?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WIVAElection_email_20260404-NDRC-Tier1-WIVAElection_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260404-NDRC-Tier1-WIVAElection_&utm_campaign=WIVAElection&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlZDI5NzkzLTVhMzAtZjExMS05YTQ4LTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NkvhJEmgBNnom6hfFFYTCxL9IfvAETxXzZKynTD9GJQ=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Here’s what’s at stake: Wisconsin (Election Date - April 7): Remember last spring, when Elon Musk dumped $25 million into a state supreme court election in Wisconsin to try to elect a MAGA judge? Well, there’s another critical seat on that court at stake in five days — winning this seat could strengthen a firewall against ongoing efforts to undermine fair representation and protect against future attacks. Virginia (Election Date - April 21): Two weeks later, voters in Virginia will decide on a constitutional amendment that would redraw the congressional map to counterbalance the extreme map manipulation we’ve seen from Republicans in Texas, Missouri, and North Carolina (and which they’re still threatening to do in states like Florida). This is a critical moment for the people to register their opposition to the GOP power grab. Each of these elections could have major ramifications for fair representation — and the outcomes will help send a resounding message to anti-democracy groups. _**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

subject: A lot happened last month.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
Caucuses, concerts, and a compliment from Trump.

| |
---
Hey friend, March moved fast, so here's where things stand. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128785815/612350588/2090747700?refcode=260404_tm_recap_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGI5OTZkNS01YTMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=11zyIoQ7IpBBT9b5Upfsh-ruGzJHeVKzv6Lkv4zFK78=) Supporters across the state showed up to caucuses and ran to be delegates to get Seth on the ballot. The rooms kept getting bigger, and the momentum is real. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128785816/612350589/2090747700?refcode=260404_tm_recap_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGI5OTZkNS01YTMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=11zyIoQ7IpBBT9b5Upfsh-ruGzJHeVKzv6Lkv4zFK78=) Seth also caught the Dropkick Murphys' St. Patrick's Day show and talked with the band about ICE and immigration. When Ken Casey told the crowd that real patriotism means standing up for your country when it lets you down — yeah, that hit. Seth voted yes when the War Powers Resolution came up for a vote because sending Americans to war without a debate in Congress is cowardice, plain and simple. And apparently, all of that got someone's attention. Here's Trump last week: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128785817/612350590/2090747700?refcode=260404_tm_recap_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGI5OTZkNS01YTMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=11zyIoQ7IpBBT9b5Upfsh-ruGzJHeVKzv6Lkv4zFK78=) We're framing that one. More coming in April — thanks for being in this with us. — Team Moulton | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128785818/612350591/1375639745?refcode=260404_tm_recap_b3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGI5OTZkNS01YTMwLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=11zyIoQ7IpBBT9b5Upfsh-ruGzJHeVKzv6Lkv4zFK78=)

clean_body: Caucuses, concerts, and a compliment from Trump. | | Hey friend, March moved fast, so here's where things stand. = Supporters across the state showed up to caucuses and ran to be delegates to get Seth on the ballot. The rooms kept getting bigger, and the momentum is real. = Seth also caught the Dropkick Murphys' St. Patrick's Day show and talked with the band about ICE and immigration. When Ken Casey told the crowd that real patriotism means standing up for your country when it lets you down — yeah, that hit. Seth voted yes when the War Powers Resolution came up for a vote because sending Americans to war without a debate in Congress is cowardice, plain and simple. And apparently, all of that got someone's attention. Here's Trump last week: = We're framing that one. More coming in April — thanks for being in this with us. — Team Moulton | = | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a Marine and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. Seth’s two young daughters, Emmy and Caroline, remind him every day why new leadership and urgent action can’t wait any longer. | = | = ---|--- Follow Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to: Seth for Massachusetts - PO Box 2013, Salem, MA, 01970 Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Seth for Massachusetts PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Chip Roy
subject: Don't let California buy Texas

body:
Self-funders. Out-of-State PACs. Political Insiders. |
**Self-funders.
Out-of-state PACs.
Political insiders. **
Fellow Patriot, this is who is trying to control the race for the next Attorney General here in Texas.

I can tell you one simple truth: **Texans don't like being pushed around, and we sure don't like people trying to buy our state.**

In the Republican primary for Texas Attorney General, millions of dollars were poured into this race by people who think they can buy power in Texas.

They think if they spend enough money... they can drown out the voice of the people.

But Texans know better.

Fellow Patriot, it's time to show these out-of-touch outsiders that our movement is strong. I need YOU and grassroots supporters to send a loud, clear message that we're not backing down and we're going to win.

I am setting an aggressive goal of adding 102 new grassroots supporters in the next 24 hours.

If you haven't joined this movement yet, that's ok. **[Now is your chance to step up in a big way – even if it's just a couple of bucks.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=081afef2e1344ec38e002e4dce4e3655&_e=YzeTx5KVIBy36PSkzHltZ1yySJWspMeX10D_Ud1a8onFTkPx4TKXk3m3Q_V5owoStMT-6kiPFuPcM6B1pkKd7XR8IWYZuN04JynQjwlfAGYEf0a5_AZCKHD-aXytTrB9mwJazVKuOXMJJ8J21atrG1JGfvZ0A3GWQwXCrktgqqwil_EoGyzA5jvsMIL0YLgEoKEA6Paw-Fxa6imM0yLFw3NlFeL3hQwlA0f3HA5TcoG3JRmf822QMPyRkLHsxS4UaKp85_OIRQ0cmezObw37lZm5unuX3WaBye6hCMLBO3FG7_kYLqyOc9kyIYW5yzLlIfmGc05nhU8HOjFry4qxUic8KbCNRXpFclc3r5zI2uyPLtKwCMuFAOPGEytcCtKISnGHG9rJCEoZuhTyRvkawG98t5cvMOzZDOZlGrJtl_6YdyljslhLZQ0k_wDWoEp__0CJBCWgkslfB72wjlkacSqHd2deZHA09Nnxd6AifU87ikkWQ4F3mbGbx3n0Vd95YvUxXa8o9NnwObrp_0yGP8_UZq9muast-lU9l3pn_iSVKrsorg1ma99i9NAP_dQTX2APNoe_8cyv43M4mrZKDZzgkpSHydDhSM9IxWRGveiQxSDrU8l1Ptgjfnks0tNnlTSH6l4Rwd19vWkgP1RRkwI-xTAUC2Qu7dsID3KCksg%3D)**

I've spent my career fighting for this state - taking on Washington bureaucrats, standing up for border security, defending election integrity, and stopping radical policies that threaten Texas.

And because of your support, we forced this race into a runoff. We overcame a $16 million hurdle.

But here's the bad news, Fellow Patriot. _**The same people who tried to buy the first round are preparing to spend even more.**_

But this campaign has never been about big money. It's about Texans.

The people who knock doors. The people who spread the word. The people who believe our state is worth fighting for.

If we stand together - **[if the grassroots steps up again](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=081afef2e1344ec38e002e4dce4e3655&_e=YzeTx5KVIBy36PSkzHltZ1yySJWspMeX10D_Ud1a8onFTkPx4TKXk3m3Q_V5owoStMT-6kiPFuPcM6B1pkKd7XR8IWYZuN04JynQjwlfAGYEf0a5_AZCKHD-aXytTrB9mwJazVKuOXMJJ8J21atrG1JGfvZ0A3GWQwXCrktgqqwil_EoGyzA5jvsMIL0YLgEoKEA6Paw-Fxa6imM0yLFw3NlFeL3hQwlA0f3HA5TcoE8Q9_d1uDF93MInD25rTZ56frJHpAs--XY3E8N8KSc5aqPpSEF0geT9D9m3fvtar3UIVvSZ_axbjBBqO2NCAhcYmR2cSQDM1exrdqF3zsPmgOw_Y3nVlILoh52R_bAa7fRnInP0Zv8_bxzHpGx7bcw1aFCMu1udCux-uxSoRA1X-zNa73TMntd4fgyvruPXqoQ7sFrW5QF6rJFv00fKvyyQbyA5oNJmX1xZBi0NT74eMWq3Or1xyoS2uv7UJuhG_S4AgGP0AForNygoDBX4QQhGm34QnvioPp-bVWgc42dOnOINjZ-q76MEEwwoNw1_e4kZE1qhaweUBpMeJDSlf7kQQqKRw7WF49MwNK_rg4LU7zr0coUj9nFVn4yfFOPQV1RiW8qICKFsEJnpV8q3dVOZlRyRaD93UWLmUxYjj3pSpmWQ4CAfFt6P4ZcZMNwL6Y%3D)** - we will win this runoff and prove something to the entire country.

clean_body: Self-funders. Out-of-State PACs. Political Insiders. | Self-funders. Out-of-state PACs. Political insiders. Fellow Patriot, this is who is trying to control the race for the next Attorney General here in Texas. I can tell you one simple truth: Texans don't like being pushed around, and we sure don't like people trying to buy our state. In the Republican primary for Texas Attorney General, millions of dollars were poured into this race by people who think they can buy power in Texas. They think if they spend enough money... they can drown out the voice of the people. But Texans know better. Fellow Patriot, it's time to show these out-of-touch outsiders that our movement is strong. I need YOU and grassroots supporters to send a loud, clear message that we're not backing down and we're going to win. I am setting an aggressive goal of adding 102 new grassroots supporters in the next 24 hours. If you haven't joined this movement yet, that's ok. I've spent my career fighting for this state - taking on Washington bureaucrats, standing up for border security, defending election integrity, and stopping radical policies that threaten Texas. And because of your support, we forced this race into a runoff. We overcame a $16 million hurdle. But here's the bad news, Fellow Patriot. The same people who tried to buy the first round are preparing to spend even more. But this campaign has never been about big money. It's about Texans. The people who knock doors. The people who spread the word. The people who believe our state is worth fighting for. If we stand together - - we will win this runoff and prove something to the entire country. Don't let DC insiders and out-of-state liberal PACs buy this race. For Texas, Chip Roy | | PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

### About Chaz Molder
Chaz Molder is the Mayor of Columbia, Tennessee, serving since 2019 and re-elected in 2022. A Columbia native and graduate of the University of Tennessee and the University of Memphis Law School, he returned home to build a career in law and public service. As mayor, he founded the Columbia Mayor’s Youth Council to promote civic engagement among young people and emphasizes the importance of being present and responsive to the community. | | [ Donate Now ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/lp-U4oEh5UktH78X1jX_Xg~~/AAUS1hA~/8Q1Rt-_BWMFuUYN7FusYcL7TMPH8a7hF7bYmWG6-EJBI3HKf-zCZIufDyqxIM3bTn7JFqQxmIT-eEZz2xoJ-8HMLk5NzbesRdQsh1briNnTEiukepyRMKdR3xmvv1070KGAa8nfj-uD7fUEgEKmN1pOm6c_A9ZdiiRY2tIyAK7xda6z8YMVM3xrsy7MbDPcBwibjBJ2TE5SztgXIBZ03WCTM51RyZa3caKZWpiBunQKl7yjV5C9xp2CZIYStmFY9)

#### _**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/6ca869fa-89a9-4157-8b84-e319ba7bd2a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/6ca869fa-89a9-4157-8b84-e319ba7bd2a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
I sat down with **Adam Mockler** and this one got intense. We dug into what feels like a full-on unraveling--firings, panic, war, and an economy that's about to hit people even harder. We got real about what's happening and who's actually paying the price.
**Here 's what we got into: **
* [**00:01:07**] The floodgates open--Trump's firing spree begins and the cabinet starts to crack
* [**00:04:02**] Panic mode--why the chaos, the weird distractions, and the polling all point to one thing
* [**00:07:05**] The budget bombshell--a massive military increase while cutting everything else
* [**00:12:43**] Inside the Pentagon shakeup--Hegseth, the firings, and why this should scare all of us
* [**00:20:17**] The coming economic shock--why the worst of the gas and supply crisis hasn't even hit yet

This conversation covers a lot--Trump's escalating firings, a dangerous reshaping of leadership inside the Pentagon, a wildly out-of-touch budget proposal, and the very real economic pain heading straight for American families. If you're trying to make sense of this moment--what's noise, what's real, and what's coming next--this is essential listening. And if you value honest conversations like this, help me keep them going.
**[Become a paid subscriber to Endless Urgency today»](https://substack.com/redirect/75909fc6-2e3f-49f8-a2e2-8b49f9224c23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

body:
I was officially designated a top target by House Democrats. Now, House Democrat Leader Hakeem Jeffries is saying they “expect to have an extension level event” as part of their effort to take back the Majority. | Fellow American - I don’t have good news.

_**FIRST:**_ I was officially named a top target by House Democrats (DCCC)

_**NOW:**_ House Democrat Leader Hakeem Jeffries says they “expect to have an extinction level event” as part of their effort to take back the Majority.

**Let me translate what that means: they’re raising MILLIONS, and they’re going to spend it in districts like mine.**

clean_body: I was officially designated a top target by House Democrats. Now, House Democrat Leader Hakeem Jeffries is saying they “expect to have an extension level event” as part of their effort to take back the Majority. | Fellow American - I don’t have good news. FIRST: I was officially named a top target by House Democrats (DCCC) NOW: House Democrat Leader Hakeem Jeffries says they “expect to have an extinction level event” as part of their effort to take back the Majority. Let me translate what that means: they’re raising MILLIONS, and they’re going to spend it in districts like mine. They are not wasting any time. On the DCCC website, they have specific pages to fundraise against me: They’re doing this because they think my seat is easy to flip. We have to show them that’s not true. They believe that if they spend enough, they can buy this seat and move one step closer to handing the gavel back to the Left. I refuse to let that happen.... but I can’t do it alone, Fellow American. If we’re going to defend this seat and protect the Republican House Majority, we must build our grassroots war chest now. We need this before their millions start flooding in. Will you rush $10, $25, or even $50 today to help me fight back and prove this seat is NOT easy to flip? This is exactly how Democrats operate: target strong conservatives early, declare momentum, and scare up massive amounts of cash from liberal donors across the country. But we’re not for sale. Thank you for being in this fight with me, Greg Murphy, M.D. | | Paid for by friends to elect Dr. Greg Murphy to Congress Murphy for Congress P.O. name: Breaking:
subject: Voter turnout collapses in major race for Dems
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019K49uVlLl20NQrHKz_aiPCCQ5ja31dBUV3SDpbsWqNCEjLMI4XWaAfwcFezGprBfFt1b8E5_DHSW9c0dVZmXyNFMQR6Tu7AtSD2xm2RHuKgvwtPiIRjZcB5EEoQCg447IH6-S3Tqni18kzkrUMbCcgbErpXGXjItBxUkF5jcpE-iekYyT61GfhenlK0CVCCgrkGtMsnPlmzhKrB3_farNQ_0B8oBkAaY1khXopcKy-s=&c=JR7VnJHSbDTNC7EsBmg7eHsJtt_VO404ftwN8magufzAt3XMTybuaw==&ch=yaqVItCftWBcUBr9VTkNrN_j8Q9zJPbye2YWOzJ3zuKrfKLIq0dAyw==)
---
|
Peter,
Last April, records were shattered in the Wisconsin Supreme Court election.
Two million voters showed up. Over $100 million spent. Elon Musk flew to Wisconsin and handed out million-dollar checks. Democrats won anyway.
But this year's April 7th WI Supreme Court race is a completely different story and it could be catastrophic for Democrats.
Absentee ballots are down 112,000 from this point last year. Spending is down 90%. A new poll shows only 12% of Wisconsin voters have heard anything about this race.

---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019K49uVlLl20NQrHKz_aiPCCQ5ja31dBUV3SDpbsWqNCEjLMI4XWaAfwcFezGprBfFt1b8E5_DHSW9c0dVZmXyNFMQR6Tu7AtSD2xm2RHuKgvwtPiIRjZcB5EEoQCg447IH6-S3Tqni18kzkrUMbCcgbErpXGXjItBxUkF5jcpE-iekYyT61GfhenlK0CVCCgrkGtMsnPlmzhKrB3_farNQna0p1GoM189YDC_aBvPjA=&c=JR7VnJHSbDTNC7EsBmg7eHsJtt_VO404ftwN8magufzAt3XMTybuaw==&ch=yaqVItCftWBcUBr9VTkNrN_j8Q9zJPbye2YWOzJ3zuKrfKLIq0dAyw==)
---

This is how MAGA wins.
And a loss here would be devastating for Dems--it would put MAGA on a path to flip the WI Supreme Court just months before the 2028 presidential election.
State supreme courts decide which votes count, how districts get drawn, and whether any challenge to an election outcome gets heard. Put MAGA judges on that bench and every one of those decisions gets made in MAGA's favor in 2028.
Right now, Defend Our Courts has identified 588,000 Democratic voters in Wisconsin and we're desperately scrambling to turnout as many of them as possible in these final 3 days.
But we don't have the resources to reach all of them. Not yet.
Every dollar we raise in the next 3 days lets us contact more voters -- voters who are largely undecided, in a race where a few thousand votes could decide everything.
Our efforts could be the difference in this race. That's why we're asking you today:
[Peter, there are only 3 days until election day and it's coming down to a mad dash to turnout as many voters as possible. Can we count on you to rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us turnout as many Democrats as we possibly can in these final days and defend the WI Supreme Court?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019K49uVlLl20NQrHKz_aiPCCQ5ja31dBUV3SDpbsWqNCEjLMI4XWaAfwcFezGprBfuQCslUxj5OGQquu2gGWci4pFzev2l3ZgMkgJqj1cII2tqQBbYx571x0kMklGNPRBGMdTQICQC8ixecoDZIcA8eMdg_oTGVbS5TH8nuSu6jU1EzzGi9E-Jlwl0hItKQy8dAmlXFOLL-SAwN-k3j1Cl6_Uenh6Oj_dn7ds6lqa5tLR6uO8ULoNZlUWrk_8L1vY&c=JR7VnJHSbDTNC7EsBmg7eHsJtt_VO404ftwN8magufzAt3XMTybuaw==&ch=yaqVItCftWBcUBr9VTkNrN_j8Q9zJPbye2YWOzJ3zuKrfKLIq0dAyw==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Last April, records were shattered in the Wisconsin Supreme Court election. Two million voters showed up. Over $100 million spent. Elon Musk flew to Wisconsin and handed out million-dollar checks. Democrats won anyway. But this year's April 7th WI Supreme Court race is a completely different story and it could be catastrophic for Democrats. Absentee ballots are down 112,000 from this point last year. Spending is down 90%. A new poll shows only 12% of Wisconsin voters have heard anything about this race. | == This is how MAGA wins. And a loss here would be devastating for Dems--it would put MAGA on a path to flip the WI Supreme Court just months before the 2028 presidential election. State supreme courts decide which votes count, how districts get drawn, and whether any challenge to an election outcome gets heard. Put MAGA judges on that bench and every one of those decisions gets made in MAGA's favor in 2028. Right now, Defend Our Courts has identified 588,000 Democratic voters in Wisconsin and we're desperately scrambling to turnout as many of them as possible in these final 3 days. But we don't have the resources to reach all of them. Not yet. Every dollar we raise in the next 3 days lets us contact more voters -- voters who are largely undecided, in a race where a few thousand votes could decide everything. Our efforts could be the difference in this race. That's why we're asking you today: == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | | | | == | Only 3 days. 588,000 Democrats. We need your help to reach all of them. If you've been waiting for the perfect time to make a contribution, NOW is that time. -- Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: A One-Stop College Shop
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100171622.172656.7&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16947)
**A One-Stop College Shop** _**Nearly 200 local high school students joined us for a College Fair and Workshop at the Alan Horowitz "Sixth Man" Center **_ Senator Hughes was excited to welcome almost 200 high school students to his College Fair and Workshop at the "Sixth Man" Center on Wissahickon Ave. The students spent the morning speaking with different Pennsylvania state (PASSHE) schools and nonprofits. Students also attended workshops that taught them about understanding financial aid, choosing a major, navigating the day to day of college, and how to earn credits before entering college. [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16948) **Pennsylvania State Universities ** **** Pennsylvania has a wide variety of [PASSHE schools](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16949) that provide students with affordable, accessible options for college. All 10 of Pennsylvania's PASSHE schools were present at the college fair to connect with students and answer questions about admissions, life on campus, and what career opportunities look like after attending a PASSHE school. Those schools included: _Commonwealth University_
* [**Bloomsburg University of Pennsylvania**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16950)
* [**Lock Haven University of Pennsylvania**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16951)
* [**Mansfield University of Pennsylvania**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16952)

_PennWest University_
* [**California University of Pennsylvania**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16953)
* [**Clarion University of Pennsylvania**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16954)
* [**Edinboro University of Pennsylvania**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16936)

_Additional PASSHE Schools_
* [**Cheyney University of Pennsylvania**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16937)
* [**East Stroudsburg University of Pennsylvania**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16938)
* [**Indiana University of Pennsylvania (IUP)**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16940)
* [**Kutztown University of Pennsylvania**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16941)
* [**Millersville University of Pennsylvania**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16942)
* [**Shippensburg University of Pennsylvania**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16943)
* [**Slippery Rock University of Pennsylvania**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16944)
* [**West Chester University of Pennsylvania**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16945)

**Nonprofits Working to Support Our Students** A number of nonprofits also joined the College Fair to connect with students about scholarship opportunities, learning programs, and other initiatives designed to help students develop their skills and preparedness for higher education. [Visit our website](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16946) to learn more about available resources and the nonprofits who are out in the community, ready to help young people reach their potential and their dreams for the future. [**College Resources**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16946)
* * *
Continue to follow us on [Facebook](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16955), [Instagram](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16929), [TikTok](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16930), [X](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16931), and [BlueSky](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171622.172656.7&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16932) for the latest news about Senator Hughes' work to improve access to high-quality education in Pennsylvania and what's happening in the 7th Senatorial District.
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes

name: Dr. Jasmeet Bains
subject: I see the impacts of policy that falls short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jasmeet Bains for Congress
body:
As a family doctor, I see people of every age, of every profession, of every race, and every socioeconomic class.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128786244/612351523/981257658?refcode=header-img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyZjRlNGUtNjAzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4hj50lzndAAN3c9l-EBcc6WJiuALOqlHkWXjlcKJGco=)
---
Friend,

As a doctor, **I see the impacts of policy that falls short every day at work.**

After finishing my medical training, I wanted to be a part of the solution to improve access to healthcare in rural areas.

As a family doctor, I see people of every age, of every profession, of every race, and every socioeconomic class. I take care of people who have lifelong chronic illnesses, who struggle with mental health, and who are grappling with affording healthcare.

And serving as the Chief Medical Officer for the Central Valley, I’ve been deployed during fires to take care of firefighters. When I’m deployed, I’m the only doctor with a team of EMTs and a couple of nurses.

[My experiences have shaped my views on policy on issues including accessible and affordable healthcare and emergency preparedness, and it’s why I’m running for Congress. CA-22 needs to send a doctor to Congress. Will you support my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128786245/612351524/-1252702269?amount=25&refcode=jbfc_20260404_emdf_e1_t0_ac_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyZjRlNGUtNjAzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4hj50lzndAAN3c9l-EBcc6WJiuALOqlHkWXjlcKJGco=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128786246/612351525/-1252702269?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=jbfc_20260404_emdf_e1_t0_ac_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyZjRlNGUtNjAzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4hj50lzndAAN3c9l-EBcc6WJiuALOqlHkWXjlcKJGco=)

subject: I need your help to secure marriage equality in Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeremy Moss for Congress
body:
Recently, the Michigan legislature heard testimony on my bill to permanently remove discriminatory language banning same-sex marriage from our state constitution.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128786256/612351564/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-04-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTk3YTQ2OTYtNjAzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8YO2MvXB0ON35tsdJekCCDE1XTCSCRqSykRkAiNf548=)

| Peter,

We’re facing a crucial moment in the fight for marriage equality here in Michigan.

**Recently, the Michigan legislature heard testimony on my bill to permanently remove discriminatory language banning same-sex marriage from our state constitution.**

[_**Will you chip in $10 today to help me keep fighting for LGBTQ+ rights in Congress? Your support helps us continue this critical work, from marriage equality to workplace protections and beyond.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128786257/612351565/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-04-04_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTk3YTQ2OTYtNjAzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8YO2MvXB0ON35tsdJekCCDE1XTCSCRqSykRkAiNf548=)

clean_body: Recently, the Michigan legislature heard testimony on my bill to permanently remove discriminatory language banning same-sex marriage from our state constitution. | = | Peter, We’re facing a crucial moment in the fight for marriage equality here in Michigan. Recently, the Michigan legislature heard testimony on my bill to permanently remove discriminatory language banning same-sex marriage from our state constitution. = | = | = This fight is deeply personal for me. As Michigan's first openly gay State Senator, I’ve spent my career pushing for the rights and dignity of the LGBTQ+ community. I’m proud to be leading this fight here in Michigan today. = But the truth is, we’re seeing attacks on our rights from every corner, and it’s more important than ever that we stand firm in our commitment to equality and justice. Whether it’s the fight for marriage equality, workplace protections, or the right to live freely without fear of discrimination, this moment demands action. I’m running for Congress because I believe in that fight – and I need your help to keep it going. = | = | = Thanks for standing with me in this fight for justice and equality. name: Leah Johnson
subject: I’m getting a little worried
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
I’m Deb’s Finance Director.

| | |
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7619?t=1&akid=8695%2E400544%2EHj0Wso)
Hey friend, it's Leah – Deb’s finance director. I snapped this photo the other day when spirits were high. But to be honest? The last few days have been pretty stressful.
Our biggest fundraising deadline before the primary is TWO DAYS away, and I’m getting worried we might miss our goal.

Here’s why that can’t happen:
1\. Coming up short means we have to scale back our plans, which jeopardizes our chances of winning.

2\. Weak fundraising numbers signal an opening for GOP groups to pour millions into flipping New Mexico.
**Deb and I believe in this grassroots team. We know you always come through when it matters most.**
**_[Can we count on you to pitch in $5 before the deadline to help us close the gap?_**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7658?amount=5&t=2&akid=8695%2E400544%2EHj0Wso)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: I need to be honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Some hard truths about financing a campaign

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=2662%2E49239%2EAuQJPC)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16394?t=2&akid=2662%2E49239%2EAuQJPC)
---
Hey, null, I need to share some hard truths with you about financing a winning campaign.
**Truth #1:** I wish this weren't the case, but resources make a critical difference in the closest races – _especially_ in purple states like Michigan. Don't forget that Trump won this state TWICE!

**Truth #2:** Unlike my opponents in my race, I'm not a millionaire, and I don't have a MAGA billionaire from Texas trying to buy this Senate seat.

**Truth #3:** Polls show I'm Democrats' best chance at defeating Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, Mike Rogers ... but I'm worried we could give this seat to the GOP if we don't have the grassroots support we need.
**That's why I'm humbly asking:[null, will you be one of the 50 donations we need in the next hour to close the gap on our daily goal? Every dollar gets us closer to winning this race, keeping Michigan blue, and helping Democrats take back the Senate.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16384?t=3&akid=2662%2E49239%2EAuQJPC)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16385?t=4&akid=2662%2E49239%2EAuQJPC)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16386?t=5&akid=2662%2E49239%2EAuQJPC)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16387?t=6&akid=2662%2E49239%2EAuQJPC)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16388?t=7&akid=2662%2E49239%2EAuQJPC)
---
Thanks for stepping up,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16395?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=2662%2E49239%2EAuQJPC) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16394?t=9&akid=2662%2E49239%2EAuQJPC)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: No Kings
subject: The next step we’re asking you to take…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line
body:
Thousands of Coloradans stood up and made their voices heard this weekend.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013NuZOhqdauMB1MT9GeVSvD35ayoj_xh8Gd9VXCzB1nc9o3Pojjp6iMJYLFbJ4lmPyLvIPqRRQz2Id7x1Cesoqx0KwjZcsB9g2s0tk6Gm-GgcXiQMzGkHSRWM2FvMgMmFQJ8jMr8BKRziiTLXMOwsrl2hZWswrIq3HwWrpRQuD6rNSDxa-4A8izyIGRDrL8JKOQWTqZ9Y4yG2aNXfzeRdFw==&c=4yCwOnl65msldpAES9zR_aZoliMRbyv1tUp27phCeTDPXx0urd2ItA==&ch=SK7S9_Z1s27zLz1DRIe3s9eJqYVdBVnUb9PCxAH5SlzvVP2mILmUSw==)
---
Peter,
Thousands of Coloradans took to the streets this weekend.
Denver. Boulder. Colorado Springs. Fort Collins. The No Kings marches sent a clear message to Trump and his MAGA extremist regime: We will NOT accept authoritarian rule. We will NOT bow to King Trump.
The energy was electric. The anger was righteous. The solidarity was powerful.
But marching is just the beginning.
Protests wake people up. They build momentum. They show strength in numbers. But they don't flip congressional seats. They don't stop gerrymandering. They don't retake the House and put a check on Trump's power.
Our ballot initiative is the most efficient way to take the next step after No Kings. It's how we turn street protest into electoral power. It's how we flip 3-4 congressional seats and help Democrats retake the House so Trump actually FACES consequences for his authoritarian madness.
Marching says "we're fed up." Redistricting says "we're WINNING."
We can't roll over for King Trump. We have to fight fire with fire.
So here's the connection: You marched to reject authoritarian rule. Now DONATE to make sure we have the power to actually STOP it.
You showed up when it mattered. Now show up again.
[Will you chip in $50, $30, $15, or whatever you can spare to turn No Kings protest energy into real electoral power?](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013NuZOhqdauMB1MT9GeVSvD35ayoj_xh8Gd9VXCzB1nc9o3Pojjp6iMJYLFbJ4lmPFQCBYvGQw1NC68JxutVGy0lOI_N6hvVtqrVEYdm0NXuSXOxWfYLHKEPSfjo3HXW18FnXjJrq5f5IM9wzhi1c52BTMw8yFxDm4jdRv2U0dZw7I4vPUM0EMrWH9Ezpoh7w5mplH_dU4oo6WBKpl4W0fTEbeszcQxGGBpz6fpyCCpA=&c=4yCwOnl65msldpAES9zR_aZoliMRbyv1tUp27phCeTDPXx0urd2ItA==&ch=SK7S9_Z1s27zLz1DRIe3s9eJqYVdBVnUb9PCxAH5SlzvVP2mILmUSw==)

clean_body: Thousands of Coloradans stood up and made their voices heard this weekend. | | | | | == Peter, Thousands of Coloradans took to the streets this weekend. Denver. Boulder. Colorado Springs. Fort Collins. The No Kings marches sent a clear message to Trump and his MAGA extremist regime: We will NOT accept authoritarian rule. We will NOT bow to King Trump. The energy was electric. The anger was righteous. The solidarity was powerful. But marching is just the beginning. Protests wake people up. They build momentum. They show strength in numbers. But they don't flip congressional seats. They don't stop gerrymandering. They don't retake the House and put a check on Trump's power. Our ballot initiative is the most efficient way to take the next step after No Kings. It's how we turn street protest into electoral power. It's how we flip 3-4 congressional seats and help Democrats retake the House so Trump actually FACES consequences for his authoritarian madness. Marching says "we're fed up." Redistricting says "we're WINNING." We can't roll over for King Trump. We have to fight fire with fire. So here's the connection: You marched to reject authoritarian rule. Now DONATE to make sure we have the power to actually STOP it. You showed up when it mattered. Now show up again. == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == We can't just protest tyranny. We have to DEFEAT it at the ballot box. And Colorado Draws the Line is how we do it. Let's finish what we started this weekend. -- Colorado Draws the Line | | | | == | | == | Donate by mail: Colorado Draws the Line == == | Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line. My uncle, Donald Trump, is already spending BIG to prop up his rubber-stamp candidates like ex-NFL reporter Michele Tafoya, who just launched her campaign against Angie — and he has a $300 million war chest at his fingertips. = | | = Here’s what you need to know about this race, folks: 🔴 Fox News is calling Minnesota’s U.S. Senate race one of the TOP races that could decide the majority. That puts a MAJOR target on Angie’s back. 🔴 Trump’s super PACs raised hundreds of millions last year — and the National Republican Senatorial Committee raised over $88 million — to launch attacks against Democrats like Angie. 🔴 MAGA’s top pick , Michele Tafoya, entered the race — and she’s nothing more than a mouthpiece for the worst of their agenda. 🔴 Experts now say Minnesota is a TOSS-UP. That means every dollar could be the difference between a Senate seat won and a Senate seat lost. Angie’s ready to take BACK our majority from the extremists who are running our country into the ground, stand up to the GOP’s endless corruption, and be the fighter Minnesotans need in Washington. But she won’t be able to stand up to the MAGA movement’s relentless attacks without a whole lot of grassroots support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Angie Craig will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for everything, Dr. Mary L. Trump A message from Angie Craig: It’s official: I’m running to represent Minnesota in the U.S. Senate. It’s never been more important to hold the powerful accountable. The Trump administration is running roughshod over the middle class — working overtime for billionaires, drug companies and Washington special interests. I know I can win this race and help Democrats take back the Senate — but I’ll need your grassroots support. This Senate race could be the most expensive in Minnesota history, and Donald Trump is ready to unleash his super PAC's $300 million war chest to defeat Democrats like me. = | | | = Angie Craig for Minnesota PO Box 580439 Minneapolis, MN 55458 United States | mailto:campaign@angiecraig.com | PAID FOR BY ANGIE CRAIG FOR MINNESOTA

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128787520/612355968/-1429052514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVlNjAxNjQtNjkzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tP8jvzNIyJXcmzJ4Kq6yGHETnq7ASpBsfEHKW1n0TZY=)
I need you to see this: Donald Trump just signed an executive order to crack down on mail-in voting nationwide. His order would force states to follow new federal restrictions on mail-in ballots, create a centralized federal list of “approved” voters, and even threaten to cut funding to states that don’t comply. That means eligible voters could be left off the list. Ballots could be blocked. And the federal government could gain unprecedented access to sensitive voter data. **That’s not how our elections are supposed to work.** The Constitution is clear: states run elections – not the President. **[I’ve taken an oath to defend that system. And I won’t stay silent while it’s being undermined. Add your name right now to stand with me against Trump’s executive order and defend mail-in voting.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128787521/612355969/430757750?refcode=em-4.4.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVlNjAxNjQtNjkzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tP8jvzNIyJXcmzJ4Kq6yGHETnq7ASpBsfEHKW1n0TZY=&emci=70c1e75c-6930-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=dee60164-6930-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=27336212)** | **[Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128787522/612355970/430757750?refcode=em-4.4.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVlNjAxNjQtNjkzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tP8jvzNIyJXcmzJ4Kq6yGHETnq7ASpBsfEHKW1n0TZY=&emci=70c1e75c-6930-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=dee60164-6930-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=27336212)**

We’ve already seen where this is headed. Trump has spent years attacking mail-in voting by pushing false claims to justify making it harder for people to vote. Now he’s trying to do it by executive order.
**If we don’t push back, it won’t stop here.**
It will get harder to vote. Harder to register. Harder for everyday Americans – especially working families, seniors, and communities like mine – to have their voices heard.
**[I’m going to keep fighting this in Congress and supporting legal challenges to stop it. But I need you with me. Sign on now to demand this order be blocked and protect the right to vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128787523/612355971/430757750?refcode=em-4.4.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVlNjAxNjQtNjkzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tP8jvzNIyJXcmzJ4Kq6yGHETnq7ASpBsfEHKW1n0TZY=&emci=70c1e75c-6930-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=dee60164-6930-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=27336212)**

name: Jeff Starling for Attorney General
subject: Starling Momentum by the Numbers
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | |
Friend,
We are writing to update you on Jeff Starling’s campaign to be Oklahoma's next Attorney General, because we believe he is exactly the kind of leader our state needs right now.
Jeff Starling is not a career politician. He’s never run for office before.
Jeff Starling is an attorney with over 20 years of real courtroom experience—litigating tough cases, defending Oklahoma energy producers and farmers, and winning. He's a businessman who has built companies, created jobs, and made payrolls. Jeff Starling currently serves as Oklahoma's Secretary of Energy and Environment, where he's fought federal overreach and protected our state's energy industry from the liberal Green New Deal agenda.
---
|
---
[|
---](https://limestone-strategies.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0ee530fee05a1d0a44f9fc4f&id=2f97815bdc&e=4767e8bde4)
| | For more information on the race, please visit [https://jeffstarling.com/2026/02/22/memo-state-of-the-race-for-ok-ag/](https://limestone-strategies.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0ee530fee05a1d0a44f9fc4f&id=d3e0982433&e=4767e8bde4)
---
|
---
| | Jeff Starling is a devoted husband to Sally and a proud father of two daughters. He's actively involved in his church and community.
Jeff is running for Attorney General because he wants to protect Oklahoma’s values and way of life. He's committed to calling balls and strikes, not using the Attorney General's office as a stepping-stone to the next political job.
Here's what Jeff will fight for as your Attorney General:
* DEFEND PRESIDENT TRUMP'S AGENDA: Jeff will stand with the President against liberal legal challenges and federal court obstruction, protecting Oklahoma's sovereignty and our way of life.

* SECURE OUR COMMUNITIES: Jeff will crack down on criminal illegal immigrants, partner with ICE, and use every tool available to stop fentanyl from devastating Oklahoma families.

* STOP CHINESE CRIMINAL OPERATIONS: On day one, Jeff will partner with President Trump and the full force of the federal government to shutdown illegal marijuana grow operations and foreign criminal enterprises behind them for good.

* PROTECT OKLAHOMA'S ENERGY INDUSTRY: As Energy Secretary, Jeff has seen firsthand how federal overreach and green energy mandates hurt Oklahoma producers. He'll fight back as AG.

* DEFEND OUR CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHTS: Jeff will stand firm for the Second Amendment, the right to life, and religious liberty against attacks from the left.

* OPEN OKLAHOMA FOR BUSINESS: Jeff will modernize our legal system, cut regulatory red tape, and make Oklahoma the best state in America for job creators and entrepreneurs.

Now we need your help to reach voters like you across the state.
**Will you join us?**
---
| [DONATE](https://limestone-strategies.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0ee530fee05a1d0a44f9fc4f&id=de660d239a&e=4767e8bde4)
---
| | Thank you for taking the time to get to know Jeff. I think once you do, you'll understand why so many Oklahomans are excited about this race.
For Oklahoma,
Team Starling for Attorney General

---
| | | | | [](https://limestone-strategies.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0ee530fee05a1d0a44f9fc4f&id=3809aa4f96&e=4767e8bde4)

name: Alex
subject: Fertilizer up. Fuel up. Margins down.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
Hey there,
Across Colorado’s 3rd District, I’ve been hearing the same thing from farmers and ranchers: Costs are rising...fast.
Rural economies are being hit hard. Fertilizer prices are up. Fuel costs are eating into already thin margins. And global instability, including the conflict with Iran, is making it even harder for producers to plan, invest, and stay afloat.
And yet, too often, the people most affected feel like they’re the last ones being heard.
That’s why I’m running. But if we’re going to take on the status quo and win, we need the resources to compete. So I’m asking: can you chip in today to help us fight for rural communities, strengthen our supply chains, and lower costs across CO-03? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak?]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $20 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak?amount=20&express_lane=true] DONATE $50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak?amount=50&express_lane=true]
DONATE $75 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak?amount=75&express_lane=true] DONATE $100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak?amount=100&express_lane=true]
DONATE $250 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak?amount=250&express_lane=true] OTHER AMOUNT » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2604-q2-ak]
Our farmers and ranchers are a critical part of the global supply chain. They feed our country and help feed the world. When they’re squeezed, it drives up costs everywhere — from the grocery store to the broader economy.
After 30 years in business, I know what it takes to navigate uncertainty — and I know Washington isn’t making it any easier right now. People want real representation that is focused on solutions that actually lower costs and create opportunity.
Our farmers, ranchers, and rural communities deserve better.
— Alex Kelloff

[?] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $20 » [] DONATE $50 » [] DONATE $75 » [] DONATE $100 » [] DONATE $250 » [] OTHER AMOUNT » [] Our farmers and ranchers are a critical part of the global supply chain. They feed our country and help feed the world. When they’re squeezed, it drives up costs everywhere — from the grocery store to the broader economy. After 30 years in business, I know what it takes to navigate uncertainty — and I know Washington isn’t making it any easier right now. People want real representation that is focused on solutions that actually lower costs and create opportunity. Our farmers, ranchers, and rural communities deserve better. — Alex Kelloff [] [] [] [] [] Alex Kelloff for Colorado P.O. Box 27 Snowmass, CO 81654 United States Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe: Alex Kelloff for Colorado P.O. Box 27 Snowmass, CO 81654 United States

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Tom Steyer has spent over $440 million on his campaigns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Katie’s running to lower costs for Californians, but she will only win this race if we can cut through the billionaire spending blanketing the state in ads.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41087%2E3422442%2E9naEgE)
Peter,
Right now, the average cost of gas in California is up to **$5.84/gallon.**
Many Californians with Affordable Care Act health insurance coverage are paying **thousands more each year in premiums.**
Now compare that to this: Tom Steyer—the billionaire in this race—has spent over _**$440 million**_ on his political campaigns.
He’s not someone who has to think about how rising costs will affect his budget. He doesn’t live the same reality most Californians do.
**Katie Porter does.**
She’s a single mom who drives an old minivan and shops for deals. When costs go up, she feels it, just like the families she’s running to represent. Her policy platform is focused on actually lowering costs for working Californians.
But here’s the challenge: she will only win this race if we can cut through the billionaire spending blanketing the state in ads.
**[Peter, if you believe California needs a governor that knows what it’s like to deal with rising costs, chip in $5 to our campaign today.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260404_2_ak.5Rc5tl&refcode=em20260404-41087&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41087%2E3422442%2E9naEgE)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260404_2_ak.5Rc5tl&refcode=em20260404-41087&t=22&akid=41087%2E3422442%2E9naEgE)
Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260404-41087&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=41087_3422442_9naEgE&akid=41087%2E3422442%2E9naEgE)**

Now compare that to this: Tom Steyer—the billionaire in this race—has spent over $440 million on his political campaigns. He’s not someone who has to think about how rising costs will affect his budget. He doesn’t live the same reality most Californians do. Katie Porter does. She’s a single mom who drives an old minivan and shops for deals. When costs go up, she feels it, just like the families she’s running to represent. Her policy platform is focused on actually lowering costs for working Californians. But here’s the challenge: she will only win this race if we can cut through the billionaire spending blanketing the state in ads. Thank you, Katie Porter HQ Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: Democrats.org
subject: We hate doing this…
body:
---
Derek, **To be honest, we hate doing this.** We know that your inbox is probably full of emails just like this one, asking for help meeting fundraising goals. We know that it can be hard to tell which emails are worth giving to, and even harder to decide which of the worthwhile causes to give to. We don’t love asking for money — nobody does. But the reality is we have to. **We can’t win without you.** While Republican candidates and Republican-aligned super PACs receive millions of dollars from Trump’s billionaire buddies, we rely on grassroots supporters like _you_ to power our work. That means that to keep up, we need our most committed supporters to donate early and often so we can build the campaign infrastructure we need to win back control of Congress. Yes, this election will be tough. We know that Republicans will spare no expense and try every dirty trick. But we also know that when we work together, we can win in places where Democrats haven’t won in decades, because _we’ve been doing it since Trump took office._ [**So, even though we hate doing it, we have to ask: If taking back Congress this November matters to you, can you chip in $7 to the DNC today to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot all across the country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260404_6610_fr&refcode2=6610_22930333_t-9zro&akid=6610%2E22930333%2Et-9zro) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260404_6610_fr&refcode2=6610_22930333_t-9zro&akid=6610%2E22930333%2Et-9zro)**

name: Graham Platner
subject: it’s such B.S
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I’m not going to speak in platitudes or shy away from what I believe. There is a war going on in this country, and the oligarchy and the fascists are winning right now.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102459?refcode=em20260404-10263&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10263%2E614464%2E1JHMmX)
Peter,
Nothing pisses me off more than getting a fundraising text from Democrats talking about how they’re fighting fascism... Because it’s such B.S. We’re not idiots. Everyone knows most of them aren’t doing jack right now to fight back.
People are being kidnapped into unmarked vans by masked police. There is a genocide happening in Palestine. Literal billionaires have taken over our government. And all Democratic leadership can do is send us another fundraising text?
**My name is Graham Platner, and I’m the Marine Corps veteran and Democrat running for U.S. Senate against Susan Collins here in Maine.** I’m not going to speak in platitudes or shy away from what I believe. There is a war going on in this country, and the oligarchy and the fascists are winning right now.
**Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the country.** We have an opportunity to replace her with a working-class Democrat – one who won’t take money from corporations or AIPAC.
But I’m not a wealthy guy, and we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win. **If I’m going to be able to defeat Susan Collins and flip this Senate seat blue, I need folks like you to chip in now to our campaign.**
**[Please, will you split a donation right now between our campaign and Heartland Patriots to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate with a Democrat who will actually fight to defend our democracy like Democrats oughta be?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102459?refcode=em20260404-10263&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10263%2E614464%2E1JHMmX)**
In the history of this nation, power has never been just willingly handed to the people. Another mealy-mouthed Democrat isn’t going to fix things or protect our constitution.
I’m ready to go to the United States Senate and fight – but I need your help today to get there.
In solidarity,
Graham Platner

[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3f8e8e25-64b3-42e5-8c17-242f0fc371b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
After 21 seasons in the NBA, Chris Paul walks away from the game as one of the most decorated point guards in league history. The resume is exhaustive. 12 time All Star, multiple All NBA First Team selections, perennial assist leader, and a fixture on All Defensive teams despite standing barely six feet tall. Statistically, tactically, and intellectually, he elevated the position.
Yet his career will inevitably be filtered through a single lens: no championship ring.
The question is not whether Chris Paul was great. He was. The question is whether his career reached its fullest potential or whether it leaves behind the residue of unfulfilled promise.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ed166bbc-310f-4914-8d29-e290cdb4674f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### **The Case for Fulfilled Greatness**
Paul's prime, particularly in New Orleans and early Los Angeles, was surgical. In 2008, he finished second in MVP voting while leading the league in assists and steals. He controlled tempo with rare precision. His midrange game became a masterclass in patience. His pick and roll IQ remains textbook material for coaching clinics.
By the time he orchestrated the Lob City era with the Los Angeles Clippers, the franchise had shifted from irrelevance to nightly contender. Blake Griffin and DeAndre Jordan soared, but it was Paul's cadence that made the machine run. He was the stabilizer, the closer, the extension of the coaching staff on the floor.
And let's not ignore Phoenix. At age 36, he guided a young Suns team to the 2021 NBA Finals, changing the culture overnight. That leadership impact cannot be dismissed as coincidence.
For two decades, he was the league's metronome.
### **The Case for Incomplete Legacy**
But championships remain the currency of historical debate.
The Clippers years loom large. That roster was not short on talent. Griffin was an All NBA force. Jordan was a Defensive Player of the Year candidate. Depth pieces were strong. The Western Conference was brutal, yes, the Spurs dynasty and the Warriors rise, but internal collapses and injuries cannot fully absolve leadership.
The 2015 playoff collapse against Houston, surrendering a 3 to 1 series lead, remains a scar on that era. Fair or unfair, point guards often absorb disproportionate responsibility. They are labeled floor generals for a reason. When the system breaks down, the general's name surfaces first.
Paul's critics argue that truly transcendent point guards bend fate. They cite Magic Johnson, Stephen Curry, Isiah Thomas, players who converted talent into banners.
Paul never did.
### **Context Matters**
However, nuance is required.
Injuries at pivotal moments repeatedly derailed his teams, including a hamstring injury in the 2018 Western Conference Finals while with Houston, when the Rockets were a game away from eliminating Golden State. That version of the Rockets may have won the title had Paul been healthy.
Basketball legacies often pivot on thin margins.
Additionally, roster construction and postseason variance matter. Leadership is critical, but it is not omnipotent. A point guard can control tempo, not health, not matchups, not opponent shot variance.
To assign total blame to Paul for the Clippers' shortcomings simplifies a complex ecosystem.
### **So Was It a Failure?**
No.
Failure is too blunt a term for a player who redefined professionalism at his position for two decades. He maximized his physical tools, aged gracefully, and remained relevant across eras. He is widely regarded as one of the top five pure point guards in NBA history.
But was it the absolute ceiling of what could have been? That is a more complicated conversation.
The absence of a championship does not erase greatness. It simply narrows the margin between all time elite and mythic.
Chris Paul's career is not a cautionary tale. It is a reminder that greatness and championships are not synonymous. Sometimes a career can be profoundly successful, culturally, statistically, intellectually, and still leave us imagining one more banner.
And perhaps that tension is what keeps his legacy compelling.
In the end, Paul did not fail. He fell just short of immortality.
There is a difference.
Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer

The question is not whether Chris Paul was great. He was. The question is whether his career reached its fullest potential or whether it leaves behind the residue of unfulfilled promise. His pick and roll IQ remains textbook material for coaching clinics. By the time he orchestrated the Lob City era with the Los Angeles Clippers, the franchise had shifted from irrelevance to nightly contender. Blake Griffin and DeAndre Jordan soared, but it was Paul's cadence that made the machine run. He was the stabilizer, the closer, the extension of the coaching staff on the floor. And let's not ignore Phoenix. At age 36, he guided a young Suns team to the 2021 NBA Finals, changing the culture overnight. That leadership impact cannot be dismissed as coincidence. For two decades, he was the league's metronome. The Case for Incomplete Legacy But championships remain the currency of historical debate. The Clippers years loom large. That roster was not short on talent. Griffin was an All NBA force. Jordan was a Defensive Player of the Year candidate. Depth pieces were strong. subject: I’m asking you, Peter.

body:
After a right-wing group made a seven-figure ad buy against me, a poll now shows this race statistically tied.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=937%2E124072%2E8hu1E6)

$3, Peter.
That’s how much I’m asking you to chip in today to help me win in North Carolina and take back the Senate. If that’s all you need to hear, please use the link below:
**[actblue.com/donate/roy-cooper-email](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8474?amount=3&t=8&akid=937%2E124072%2E8hu1E6)**
$3 because a right-wing group has made a seven-figure ad buy against me, and Donald Trump is personally attacking me.
$3 because with Senate control at stake here in North Carolina, experts are predicting this will be the most expensive Senate race ever.
**$3 because a recent poll shows this race statistically tied.**
By the time you get to this point in the email, many other people have decided to give their first donation to support our campaign. Now, I’m counting on you to join them.
**[Peter, will you chip in $3 or whatever you can today to help me fight back against the GOP’s attacks, flip North Carolina blue and return power to the people?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8474?amount=3&t=9&akid=937%2E124072%2E8hu1E6)**

Roy Cooper

* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=937%2E124072%2E8hu1E6)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.
