name: Greg Murphy
subject: They’re Raising Millions to Take This Seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by friends to elect Dr
body:
I was officially designated a top target by House Democrats. Now, House Democrat Leader Hakeem Jeffries is saying they “expect to have an extension level event” as part of their effort to take back the Majority. | Fellow American - I don’t have good news.

_**FIRST:**_ I was officially named a top target by House Democrats (DCCC)

_**NOW:**_ House Democrat Leader Hakeem Jeffries says they “expect to have an extinction level event” as part of their effort to take back the Majority.

**Let me translate what that means: they’re raising MILLIONS, and they’re going to spend it in districts like mine.**

They are not wasting any time. On the DCCC website, they have specific pages to fundraise against me:

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d7c1f67d52544426ab3fbef2a5dcfe0f&_e=TN7DUjwvo6FD7NBVrDrmaYYyWzVNsNUlK5-yed1wMu8NsJiWhjkySIfqQnw1Nlkx2tmQLyhlOtcY-tNfdmwwXyaZfiY9uXj3vKU4w1uB6IFOFO_PC0NM7_RKoHiFjbOrotxKIC1MuyLD9y2_2TnN0YC7_XvFylu9dJV7rXQBbt5pFx9FQUoKNopvJeWai8EnchJdpEKDm-bGw9zH7gY7eIrS786WW7XozzrvVVhKFwxSNyckGglhPh1vxPW0Ky14nFaR7SuOf1HieFN2K7cMQJMeVDH2TL8T7SKw_JkpLDRGimVmkj5UAHCHjhWzWKYu7GAKW0WwEzEpjvQo2TAlwddiXIZvTSqT4d9itgAzAwpPXIkohgfcu6Ptp0ydCIrcw_tOx4-iKSJWWtyPQ24vSQKD59Ekxo4G1DvH2VGjuMYH708JdgPNN8R6gU-xEAIfuUXMnoiqyeYZYAJ7bUZNYJe8Trrw4GOZa1QjGTvN7iucP81LqkFwgw1W4uDNtx_yMDOqeWeuaJXZGT9XdsdONEiqe-T_GoI4Ju7SaA9OZKsnuDD06b6CKQT5fTJ6RbBfCCElmQBX4BK1XleYb0C7XHlizdnFrmipC-6dE4EBi85tG9ubnv2sqnJxqLHnLuAUvfY0YfCYPTk_Ly3l2VasruL4rSevN60uO9fginnyfGDiSa-Cv3qIyQcATUZAiolyKeUbkLbe50BUWG_nJXYNab8rOvFFDbbwQXS6VPnBJ9yIbDmoQg1b-W6c-alTK_0P)
They’re doing this because they think my seat is easy to flip. _**We have to show them that’s not true.**_ They believe that if they spend enough, they can buy this seat and move one step closer to handing the gavel back to the Left.

[**Join Our Fight**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d7c1f67d52544426ab3fbef2a5dcfe0f&_e=TN7DUjwvo6FD7NBVrDrmaYYyWzVNsNUlK5-yed1wMu8NsJiWhjkySIfqQnw1Nlkx2tmQLyhlOtcY-tNfdmwwXyaZfiY9uXj3vKU4w1uB6IFOFO_PC0NM7_RKoHiFjbOrotxKIC1MuyLD9y2_2TnN0YC7_XvFylu9dJV7rXQBbt5pFx9FQUoKNopvJeWai8EnchJdpEKDm-bGw9zH7gY7eIrS786WW7XozzrvVVhKFwxSNyckGglhPh1vxPW0Ky14nFaR7SuOf1HieFN2K7cMQNLcDXtG971Shg4J7iftOXdmN3en-VASqoddfxU4auoQ6-mSwtPnQAmz_S4K7olarwpxc50HRR1QImCOtIUqYAe790Q4End7igprLqitsuaY84Qq5e7wQIYBuBguLfTZxqpn6z53-qC8agG2Ng40KEMFLsSorTXLXopUUIgZ2xpB5gBxbQwHdx0mz-TO5YPko6K0FZGHJMbqsKCdx-SfMTqcmopkE8R5fqLpb9YIMcSrLEtHgMbIdHVs6mHoclBsiMVVxufGBdXu7irODyFa14yZbRoUmwmn59ijdZZziBOBnJjob_DK88XeR7-vUih3ZNI_az1GLoxSNtAONBchBA2TetPyjRwqQR8aeBG-aUQkCzZqmUzWxG5Brg1Cwhd_cRv_WQOSfDep8i2EuRoExaalD5mfHICgv0Rgrl33HRLHQVfR2rpnH-4ZTyRPg534VBEBTmB_cuydF2KCLzAVlFRlYBe_uDRKKQ70ffafbsVS)
_**I refuse to let that happen.... but I can’t do it alone, Fellow American.**_

If we’re going to defend this seat and protect the Republican House Majority, we must build our grassroots war chest now. We need this before their millions start flooding in.

_**Will you rush $10, $25, or even $50 today to help me fight back and prove this seat is NOT easy to flip?** _

clean_body: I was officially designated a top target by House Democrats. Now, House Democrat Leader Hakeem Jeffries is saying they “expect to have an extension level event” as part of their effort to take back the Majority. | Fellow American - I don’t have good news. FIRST: I was officially named a top target by House Democrats (DCCC) NOW: House Democrat Leader Hakeem Jeffries says they “expect to have an extinction level event” as part of their effort to take back the Majority. Let me translate what that means: they’re raising MILLIONS, and they’re going to spend it in districts like mine. They are not wasting any time. On the DCCC website, they have specific pages to fundraise against me: They’re doing this because they think my seat is easy to flip. We have to show them that’s not true. They believe that if they spend enough, they can buy this seat and move one step closer to handing the gavel back to the Left. I refuse to let that happen.... but I can’t do it alone, Fellow American. If we’re going to defend this seat and protect the Republican House Majority, we must build our grassroots war chest now. We need this before their millions start flooding in. Will you rush $10, $25, or even $50 today to help me fight back and prove this seat is NOT easy to flip? This is exactly how Democrats operate: target strong conservatives early, declare momentum, and scare up massive amounts of cash from liberal donors across the country. But we’re not for sale. Thank you for being in this fight with me, Greg Murphy, M.D. | | Paid for by friends to elect Dr. Greg Murphy to Congress Murphy for Congress P.O. body:
We’ve made a hell of a lot of progress over the last three years

We’ve made a hell of a lot of progress over the last three years. But there’s more to do. We’ve got more homes to build, more roads to fix, and more jobs to create. And Derek, I’m more determined than ever to get it done. [_**But elections like this one? They’re a team sport — I can’t build the progress Pennsylvania needs on my own. We have to win this race, and I can’t do it without you. [_**It’s an onslaught, Derek — and it’s the clearest sign yet that the Republican Party sees an opening here in Pennsylvania. Peter,

clean_body: If Republicans sweep, it proves the majority is GROWING. Peter, You want to know the fastest way to make Hakeem Jeffries sweat? That's what's on the table right now. Georgia. New Jersey. California. Three races happening simultaneously -- and the results could define the tone for the entire 2026 midterm cycle. I've been in rooms with Democrat strategists. I know how they think. And I can tell you this: Because if Republicans sweep these special elections, it proves that our majority isn't just "surviving" -- And that's their worst nightmare. Here's how you make it happen: I led the Revolution of '94, we didn't just win -- we That's the message we need to send right now. 3 races. 3 wins. finish this. name: Turning Point PAC
subject: Consultants get rich. Ground wars win elections.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
There are two ways campaigns spend money...
| | | [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15077507/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvOTVDc2RneXRBUw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MDQ/LbmNsYmdCU2E3QQ/qP2hpZHM9bmM0WkxTN29Cc1lXOGFscw/gadGWFw/s0tf29a3a84)
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15077507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2JfbWJfY29ucy1ndHJoX2JyXzIwMjYwNDA0Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MDQ/LbmNsYmdCU2E3QQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MDMyMGVtOCZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjc2NF93cjE/gadGWFw/sfkfca8920c)
---
| | Patriot,
---
There are two political worlds in America.
One is run by consultants.
* They produce strategy decks.
* Buy expensive TV ads.
* Host donor receptions.

Consultants make a _lot_ of money.
The other world is the **ground war.**
* Men and women in the trenches.
* Registering voters. Hosting turnout blitzes.
* Chasing ballots and banking early votes.

Charlie Kirk chose the ground war.
**And as Democrats learned the hard way in ‘24...Charlie’s world _decides_ elections.**

[SUPPORT CHARLIE’S BALLOT-CHASING ARMY](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15077507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2JfbWJfY29ucy1ndHJoX2JyXzIwMjYwNDA0Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MDQ/LbmNsYmdCU2E3QQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MDMyMGVtOCZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjc2NF93cjEmYW1vdW50PTUw/gadGWFw/sdkc3366e0f)
Turning Point PAC is digging in ahead of the 2026 Midterms and we’re (again) gearing up to fight the Democrat ground operation in key Congressional districts.
In the near term, we’re funding a hiring surge: **700 _new_ full-time ballot-chasers** to join America First patriots already deployed in key districts.
Each has a simple assignment: Find unengaged conservatives and **bank 10 votes every day** when the voting months happen.
That’s **7,000 votes** a day. That’s **140,000 votes** before Election Day.
And that’s just _this_ class. We’re hoping to fund more.
**[Will you stand with us?](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15077507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2JfbWJfY29ucy1ndHJoX2JyXzIwMjYwNDA0Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MDQ/LbmNsYmdCU2E3QQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MDMyMGVtOCZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjc2NF93cjE/gadGWFw/sfkfca8920c)**
Consultants _talk_ about winning.
Turning Point PAC makes it happen.
Don’t hesitate...
Don’t tell yourself “other patriots will step up”...
**If this plea gets ignored, the Left will win in 2026. Period. Full stop.**
**[Take 30-seconds and chip in what you can. Adding even _1 more ballot-chaser_ to the ground game puts HUNDREDS OF BALLOTS on the final scoreboard!](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15077507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2JfbWJfY29ucy1ndHJoX2JyXzIwMjYwNDA0Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MDQ/LbmNsYmdCU2E3QQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MDMyMGVtOCZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjc2NF93cjE/gadGWFw/sfkfca8920c)**
Fund Charlie’s ground war and let’s **BUILD A RED WALL** in 2026.

[CONTRIBUTE](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15077507/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2JfbWJfY29ucy1ndHJoX2JyXzIwMjYwNDA0Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MDQ/LbmNsYmdCU2E3QQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MDMyMGVtOCZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjc2NF93cjEmYW1vdW50PTUw/gadGWFw/sdkc3366e0f)

For Charlie,
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TPPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TPPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
I'm looking at our Official 2026 Membership Roster right now, and we have a problem. Your name has been FLAGGED FOR REMOVAL.
Republican State Leadership has reached out multiple times for you to renew your membership, but as of this morning, your file was still marked as INACTIVE.
Peter, if we don't hear from you in the next few hours, we will have no choice but to purge your name from our records and pass your leadership spot to someone else in ${Recipient.STATE}.[[RE-VERIFY YOUR 2026 MEMBERSHIP NOW]

Republican State Leadership has reached out multiple times for you to renew your membership, but as of this morning, your file was still marked as INACTIVE. Peter, if we don't hear from you in the next few hours, we will have no choice but to purge your name from our records and pass your leadership spot to someone else in ${Recipient.STATE}.[[RE-VERIFY YOUR 2026 MEMBERSHIP NOW] ]( let the Radical Left celebrate your exit. name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: I won’t forget what JD Vance said about our people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
I went to JD Vance's hometown, and here's what I learned:
Peter,

You may have seen JD Vance talking a lot about his roots—about Kentucky, Appalachia, and the struggles people there face. And I'll be honest: this isn't just political for me—it's personal.

JD Vance made his name writing a book that **trashed Kentuckians** and the communities I love and fight for every day.

I'm proud to be Kentucky's governor, and I've always believed this job is about helping people—**not using their hardships to get rich and make a name for yourself.** But when it comes time to actually do the work, _JD Vance hasn't shown up for the communities he claims to support._

That was on my mind when I traveled to Butler County, Ohio (Vance's real hometown). [**But before I go any further, if you're able, consider making a contribution today to help us keep showing up for working families and fighting back against self-serving politicians like Vance. >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128789505/612362755/57398372?refcode=em26_260404_vance_fndd_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260404_vance_fndd_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=fa08aad3-7a30-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmEwOGFhZDMtN2EzMC1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y4DT7kT1mzK9OJhQu8zWJg7-Dt0dyufB_15Rmm3vX2c=)

Peter, I met folks in Butler County who reminded me of Kentucky: hardworking people doing everything they can to support their families and build a better life. And the more I listened, the more it stayed with me just how out of touch Washington can feel with the reality people are living every day.

Vance has openly talked about the people who powered this country—from our mines to our factory floors—as if they were lazy. And when it comes to addiction, he's been quick to blame those suffering instead of the companies that flooded our communities with opioids to turn a profit. That tells you a lot about him. Where I come from, that's not leadership. It's abandonment.

I don't take this job for granted. I know who elected me, and I know who I serve. I'm proud that here in Kentucky, we've spent the last three years delivering real results for working families— _including three straight years of declining opioid overdose deaths._ But if we're going to keep fighting for families, we have to do it together.

[**So I'm asking you: Will you chip in today to In This Together PAC to help us keep fighting for working families and supporting the candidates who will always do the right thing for their communities? clean_body: I went to JD Vance's hometown, and here's what I learned: Peter, You may have seen JD Vance talking a lot about his roots—about Kentucky, Appalachia, and the struggles people there face. And I'll be honest: this isn't just political for me—it's personal. JD Vance made his name writing a book that trashed Kentuckians and the communities I love and fight for every day. I'm proud to be Kentucky's governor, and I've always believed this job is about helping people—not using their hardships to get rich and make a name for yourself. But when it comes time to actually do the work, JD Vance hasn't shown up for the communities he claims to support. That was on my mind when I traveled to Butler County, Ohio (Vance's real hometown). = Peter, I met folks in Butler County who reminded me of Kentucky: hardworking people doing everything they can to support their families and build a better life. And the more I listened, the more it stayed with me just how out of touch Washington can feel with the reality people are living every day. Vance has openly talked about the people who powered this country—from our mines to our factory floors—as if they were lazy. And when it comes to addiction, he's been quick to blame those suffering instead of the companies that flooded our communities with opioids to turn a profit. That tells you a lot about him. Where I come from, that's not leadership. It's abandonment. I don't take this job for granted. I know who elected me, and I know who I serve. I'm proud that here in Kentucky, we've spent the last three years delivering real results for working families— including three straight years of declining opioid overdose deaths. But if we're going to keep fighting for families, we have to do it together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Andy | Kentucky Gov. name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: Over $11 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260404-450&t=2&akid=450%2E12592%2EBaU-Gs)
****
We need to be clear about what’s happening right now in Virginia.
Republicans and their allies have already poured **more than $11 million** in dark money into this race, and they’re flooding the Commonwealth with misleading ads and misinformation about the redistricting amendment.
_They’re not spending that kind of money by accident._
They’re doing it because they know this amendment would stop Trump’s power grabs and protect Virginia voters.
So they’re trying to confuse people. It’s why they’re flooding the Commonwealth with mailers comparing the redistricting amendment to Jim Crow (_seriously!_).
And the truth is: **if we go silent now, their message is the only one voters will hear.**
That’s why keeping our YES campaign ads on the air isn’t optional, it’s essential.
Our ads are how we:
* **Cut through the misinformation**

* **Reach voters across the Commonwealth**

* **Explain what this amendment actually does, and why it matters**

[**But staying on air takes real resources, can we count on you to chip in $3 today to help us keep our ads running and make sure voters hear the truth?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260404_2.BRjqxF&amount=3&refcode=20260404-450&t=3&akid=450%2E12592%2EBaU-Gs)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260404_2.BRjqxF&amount=3&refcode=20260404-450&t=22&akid=450%2E12592%2EBaU-Gs)**
This moment is bigger than any single ad or any single day.
It’s about whether voters get clear, honest information or whether dark money and misinformation drown everything out.
_Virginia voters deserve the truth, and with your help, we can make sure they hear it._
Thank you for being part of this,
Virginians for Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=23&refcode2=450_12592_BaU-Gs&akid=450%2E12592%2EBaU-Gs)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=450%2E12592%2EBaU-Gs)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/update-contact-information/?&t=25&akid=450%2E12592%2EBaU-Gs)
